title: El Campo Santo
address: 2410 San Diego Ave, San Diego, CA 92110

descriptions: Small burial ground & historical landmark established in 1849, with interpretive signs.
about: null
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kytka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFbLxCr0yvAqfHQCyTsjXfQy9R17dE_EQqu_BX8i1OgxMFORH4zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Campo Santo Cemetery is one of San Diego’s oldest and most fascinating historic sites, offering a glimpse into the city's rich past and enduring legends. Established in 1849, this small yet significant cemetery in Old Town San Diego was the final resting place for many of the area’s early residents, including pioneers, politicians, and notorious figures of the time.

Walking through the cemetery, you can still see weathered headstones, some with names barely visible, reminding visitors just how long this ground has held history. Many original graves were disturbed in the 1880s when San Diego expanded, and a streetcar line was built right through the burial site. Today, parts of San Diego Avenue run directly over unmarked graves, and you can even spot brass markers in the sidewalk, showing where bodies still lie beneath the road.

Beyond its historical importance, El Campo Santo is known for its paranormal activity. Many visitors and locals claim to have seen ghostly apparitions, flickering lights, and even felt cold spots as they walk through. Some say the spirits of those whose graves were paved over still linger, making it one of San Diego’s most haunted locations.

Despite its eerie reputation, El Campo Santo is a beautiful and peaceful place to visit, with its traditional Spanish-style crosses, iron fencing, and old-world charm. Whether you're a history buff, a fan of ghost stories, or just someone who appreciates preserved historic landmarks, this cemetery is a must-visit in Old Town. It’s a powerful reminder of San Diego’s early days, and a truly unique piece of the city’s past that continues to tell its stories, even after more than 170 years.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCA2ob67AE&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2025-1-31"},{"Name":"Craig Bellavance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxzwfsT0lh2U44xoaGIuQDB8tgzVNv7q0uunZITdQhjCiVIxjesA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The cemetery itself wasn’t very impressive, but the Day of the Dead (Día de los Muertos) decorations added some much-needed color and life to the place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzT7Mb-MHTCzK1ZzFDNjFl&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"RedBullKC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE0VNHbFLRgM15VezO8r_lCph6xZrJiQJKrOY8N2GEJYtGIIjNkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a historical treasure! The history says it all when you walk thru the gate or even walk past it while on the sidewalk! Astonishing to read the headstones 🪦 and the information posted on the site! To see the actual grave markers strewn throughout the sidewalks and streets is mind boggling! Amazing tourist attraction with so much history! Is a must see/visit if you're in the area! It's won't be a disappointment and you'll happy you did!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDespOxVw&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2022-10-6"},{"Name":"O.k Tomahawk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEdy474yJTICQw4ne5aAXTXhExVl0EpyoimbtPq3-TiDRdrvH0vw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very old and historic small cemetery came to visit those who passed on.  So sad to see all the indigenous ancestors who are left unmarked. Had to show some respect for those resting here.  Really interesting to see the plaques and markers on the side walk especially of the unmarked Graves. Nothing spooky or eerie here just really interesting step back into time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZu-r40QE&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2023-9-19"},{"Name":"Tiffany","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFqzOSgkUHaVxjSvGUfN1GVI3iZzWktDKSp9HhZw_KXlvjcGBTTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A beautiful, peaceful resting place for the souls buried here. The cemetery is very tiny and easy to miss. Interesting stories on many of the headstones and graves. The history of the cemetery is heartbreaking, but important to learn to understand the history of San diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICFx6rq6gE&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2023-11-3"},{"Name":"Val","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7FnTiDArIJApw3QpA1QGduk7-ikzktQMYSgI5LsFR8QWmdYk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a small but historical cementery. It is just a few blocks away from the cities most haunted building! When walking by the graves, you definitely feel a sense of respect. A lot of the grave sites have white fencing around them while others have rocks outlining their location. I remember as a child, I visited this cementery a lot for school field trips. We were told that a lot of people have had spiritual activities/ghost sightings at this cementery. I've never experienced such thing though. I always feel at peace and in aw when walking through this place. Highly recommend stopping by!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICuneLpmAE&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2022-8-3"},{"Name":"Perry Harrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOOjiz3w4xFukydPjHBum86aq04Q8nF4sTgMAqNKFKhzKxGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little cemetery not to be missed if you're in Old Town. Overall you won't have to spend a lot of time here but even 5-10 minutes would be worth it to walk around, read a bit about the history and some of the people buried here.

Then head towards town and look under your feet on the sidewalks for the gravesites taken by development.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChvradSA&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2023-2-14"},{"Name":"Jennifer Crosthwaite","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQurvhS-5mzECP_BO9kam0vcxux0Xmkc48MvBip8dkP83s4OA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this place. So peaceful and full of history. I love the plaques with all the information on them. There is a list of names of people buried through out Old Town and spots of unmarked graves. It is well taken care of, gifts are left for some of the graves. I enjoy this place so much and come as often as I can. This last time I came at night, it was a real treat to experience it in another light. (Also, “Yankee” Jim is buried here. He is one of the spirits said to haunt the Whaley and Crosthwaite house. Which is just a few yards down the road.)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICy74jvgQE&fid=0x0:0xf3fe9c586f376dc8"],"When":"2021-2-18"}]

[{"Name":"Just TheChowdah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkVC_GbL5WBAi5ntme-LZCrfXl3iK8BjQPOzm3731xFe_zSrTwvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"All the great staples with a little something more that makes the dishes shine. Edit: Unfortunately I've had to lower my rating. I enjoy lamb and the last few times we've gone back it's been dry, chewy, and full of gristle (understewed?). I really liked this place and had a great experience at first. Maybe don't order lamb takeout?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPT3quMAjsoGOT8eAN-1mt&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Shelby Pickler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMKIlIAkOo7CJs9EAc9e7S8LGiBW4lPgCOa0bv8UBcKGA2MZZy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you like Taste of Himalayas, you’re going to immediately stop going and start going here instead because WOW!

The Chicken Jhol Momo was FANTASTIC (seriously I could just get 2 orders of this and be on cloud 9).

We also ordered the Palak Peneer and Bitter Chicken with a side of Garlic Naan. Both dishes were diverse with flavor. The chicken was seasoned to perfection and the curries were the perfect temp to keep indulging from the first bite.

The staff here are very kind and helpful too! We can’t wait to come back again and try more of their dishes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7qle-z4thpmPkVNRa53Uh&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Dee Um","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJH4tki71fQsxSpy-GZk3AhNOTdKTLlANbJAgGt19YxW9O8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally you already know if you’ve seen my post I only post positive reviews but this by far BLEW my mind !!  The best I mean ONE of the best restaurants I’ve been to in San Diego !! I will definitely be back for several reasons!! Chow mein BOMB, lentil soup BOMB , Goat meat daily special OUT OF THIS WORLD!!! Amazing food and the customer service was spectacular! I have never seen my husband eat so fast and he usually never finishes his food he was looking for more !! Delicious beyond this world amazing!! Oh if you still don’t get it RUN NOT WALK to this superb restaurant!! You won’t regret it !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmfp8Ps2wLNso3AWDDcE7Q&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Kimberly Floyd","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL2D7hx0zyDH4ueZo_nM2TzZ0PcnvoE8nXA7ll-c3L4bGWqnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a nice Nepalese/Indian restaurant in Old Town. They have indoor and patio dining. We ate on the beautiful patio. They gave us complementary lentil soup (delicious). We had several Nepalese appetizers and then chicken Tikka masala, saag paneer and garlic naan for dinner. All dishes were great. The service was friendly and helpful suggesting dishes and spice levels. We will definitely be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCq4wJjLbXMm6smcnazirHm&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2025-6-24"},{"Name":"Rick West","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEOsmEH_pe9Nd8ulaJ20_Ahgne6YP8PpuNEhSp5r0lcJDBleMo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a gem this is, surrounded by about 52,427 Mexican restaurants in the Old Town area of San Diego!

My fiancée and I ate here for our anniversary this past weekend and found everything about it really relaxing and super friendly. The interior of the restaurant is small, with most guests opting for outdoor dining on their large patio, which is clean and really inviting. We did choose to eat inside, however, as it was a bit chilly outside for us.

The staff are very friendly and super attentive — we never had to ask for water to be refilled or wave at them for anything; they were on top of our needs from start to finish, and couldn’t have been nicer. Service was prompt and food/drink was served in a very timely manner.

The food here is delicious. The star of the meal were the steamed Chicken Momo dumplings! Oh, man! You could literally each order a plate of these little nuggets of yum, and that could be dinner; no joke! These are a must.

We also had the Cheese Naan bread, along with their Chicken Tikka Masala, both of which were fantastic. Of note — since this isn’t a straight-up Indian restaurant, their Chicken Tikka Masala is creamier and sweeter than what you might expect (other Indian places make it more savory and spicy). I asked for “mild” heat on mine, and easily could have had “medium,” I believe.

I had Mango Iced Tea and my fiancée had Mango Lassi, both of which were refreshing and super tasty.

The prices here are definitely very good, considering the tourist hot spot this restaurant is found in. If we were San Diego locals, this would definitely be in our rotation! Dining here was definitely a highlight of our anniversary weekend! Highly recommend it! GET THE CHICKEN MOMOS!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDol-emmAE&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2025-4-29"},{"Name":"Terrence Sylvester","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0YHYfZQPC8MZTX04x_9mlqLQ0w-eBQlnzEhIJjWWSkYF-kV_6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service was excellent. We were seated promptly upon arrival, and our food arrived quickly. While we requested a spice level of 7 out of 10, the food was not spicy at all. However, the flavor was good. We had a curry and a Momo. The portion sizes were somewhat small. The curries were served with a bowl of rice, but the rice was a bit insufficient to go with the entire curry. The Momo contained approximately 6-7 dumplings, which were also relatively small.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gautam Balasundaram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXzPtWBR5P1Me3dveNDmCjHasMbdZYqp9UCIVQNQiAWFtcJ0YET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Was craving some Indian food and this was one of the few close enough to my hotel.
Naan: bread was a little dry and tough but it did take 45 mins for delivery.
Lamb Biryani: was absolutely delicious! Huge portions and the most meat I've seen in a biryani in a long time.
Goat curry: was piping hot even after the long delivery. Very flavourful and good amount of meat in it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay Oshiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKgTfTdbCLlnJMVBFVTEZmT85FXMUqNaRkeZUoRSjeNY3rd0or_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the Shrimp Masala. I had ordered the garlic Naan bread since the masala came with rice.  Really nice portions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdxs1UCQeSWxKOZ0k92Z66&fid=0x0:0x1e34111ea05f1dce"],"When":"2026-1-27"}]

[{"Name":"Robyn Jimenez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqFa5y3a4rJ-9gq-E0eW6chHrvluOt2smA4sbBbGwXTGYCBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"AMAZING FOOD! Great, fast service. Staff are very friendly. Huge selection of dishes, sides, entrees, and specialties. Huge drink menu, too. Cash preferred. Call ahead of you want to ensure your dining table during busy meal times. There is indoor and patio seating, and the atmosphere is fun - enjoy the many decorations! There are a lot of TVs with different sports. No non-service pets allowed. There are two bars inside. Bathroom available for customers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCflrDHlspdixyJSFFoy-aL&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Mike Sperando","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_en4hstmxQlXEez9ODYd4-J_QV5-fzf9jhq4e4RBikF-eflXL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited Old Town Mexican Café based on numerous positive recommendations and was not disappointed. I walked in without a reservation, and despite the café being quite busy, I was able to get seated after a reasonable wait.

I ordered the mini carne asada tacos and the red pozole with corn tortillas. The food was very good, and the flavors felt authentic and satisfying. Although the service was a bit on the slower side, it wasn’t a major issue for me, as it gave me time to enjoy the atmosphere and relax. The restaurant had a lively, bustling vibe throughout my visit, which added to the experience.

Overall, I’d recommend Old Town Mexican Café to anyone looking for a good Mexican meal in the area. It’s a solid choice if you’re in Old Town San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB93nSeCgPYOWKxDj1kTGNu&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Jonathan Siau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhuSjWF8T35o2SNuufXajrPY15nGVphfUvwqCQn4JkHjdgQtLS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a fantastic meal at Old Town Mexican. The food was authentically Mexican, full of flavor, and very reasonably priced. The service was great—friendly, attentive, and welcoming.

The crispy carnitas were absolutely out of this world—perfectly cooked with amazing flavor and texture. The homemade guacamole was fresh and delicious, and you could truly taste the quality. We also loved that the tortillas were being made when we walked in; they were fresh, warm, and incredibly tasty.

And don’t skip dessert—the churros were delicious and the perfect way to end the meal. Overall, an excellent experience with great food, great service, and great value. We’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbHKjekcvwRQ8GT71ztoS1&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"caimiao liu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV79URcJr1Ee2DC3Lw8Og_3qc9Jg3PSUrEtOdXx_I4s3MMycV28=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got their ceviche, carnitas plate and street tacos. It was simple cooking. Though they may not look that appealing, they surely tasted delicious. Reasonable price for a popular tourist destination. The server was very nice and patient even though it was busy. Loved their corn tortilla and fried beans. The cocktail was okay and the ceviche was average. Meat was well seasoned. Overall pretty good experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFBFOSQSu8EDRPar7ijmKQ&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"C Neon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn6PkjLRNy-1NrvtpBbWRApqTrvWhHm83hzO-XGcdQ1OfTurn2Sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is an authentic Mexican restaurant at the mouth of Old Town San Diego.   The decorations and vibes are very Mexican.   They even had a mariachi band.   The food is very tasty and authentic.   Even the chips and dips are fresh and had a bit of spicy goodness.   Overall, we have been coming here for decades and it remains true to its roots.   Good experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVRayMTxO9EZQtDDB5-7pB&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"SugarBottoms99","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9xXA3slAw0PhNpmeuvR2ZGAisbNyYUdE1h6Fkm-CgyYxN9tA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10! 1000/10!!! LOVE LOVE LOVEEEE THIS PLACE!!! Whenever I visit I get the menudo and watermelon margarita and it is so delicious the menudo is maid to perfection you can tell that they actually clean the skin before cooking it which is very rare a lot of people do not know how to make menudo correctly and this place makes it correctly!!! And the watermelon margarita always gets me nice and right and a little less uptight 😝🥴😁 love it here 10/10 recommend!! (I've also tried the pork ribs and they are absolutely delicious!!)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfx2bV7IK2uQK7kP946MI2&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"M Abalos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWRch6l9j_rv0Z2A7Uhp46jZIapCKWQaruFopICMbYukk_7j7Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's been several decades that I have been coming to this restaurant. It's large (both patio and indoor area ) and it has a variety of tables and chairs to choose from. Mexican decor is timeless at this place.

Our server was welcoming and attentive. Didn't have to ask for water refill.

The food is definitely authentic, but its  portioning compared to other similar places
in the neighborhood, is on the skimpy side. I did not feel I got my monies worth with my machaca dish. The albondigas soup could have used a little kicker. It was missing something. Nonetheless, both dishes were good to go.

Fresh corn tortillas freshly made. They were good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqtny1rnBwtaFoRxKJSKQr&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"drawonnoodles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf11UYkDy4s7H23IC7lrH2Hpy31x0wm8c7I3GeDEUmwB7PJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The crispy carnitas was the best dish here. It was very cripsy and meaty, not overly salty. The tortillas are also very soft and delicious. For the price, I think the portion was decent considering the other restaurants in the area charging extortionary prices. It's a pretty solid Mexican spot but it wasn't mind blowing. The service was also spotty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABvtTilSEztXSAN3DAll5f&fid=0x0:0x4abf2dc87b241382"],"When":"2025-12-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lauren & Santiago Castillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVar0iTBzvIUC7fEKKaYPI3YOXI1R8FbGaqxBdhf1JINVKa9Gb1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was okay, but the service was lacking. We had to wait our entire meal for a refill on drinks and our server kept ignoring us. Pretty atmosphere.  I would definitely consider coming here if it’s convenient and you’re hungry but not to go out of your way to stop in. Churros were good but she brought them with our lunch instead of after. Expensive as well. A lunch plate was $26-$30.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy5-On8uAX1NSoB1LKsKy4&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Princess Swan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUD-UfoJXZgEuhcJ65P28yIMIwnO6spnCw0jFP44NcY_bJcAPU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"There's a lot to say about this place. The experience was okay; I wouldn't say it's the best. It feels overrated and more like a tourist spot. The service was lacking—our server hardly checked on us after the food arrived. The place is quite busy, so reservations are recommended. On the positive side, the atmosphere is really nice. The restaurant is surrounded by small shops, and they have live music and dancing. I enjoyed strolling through the different stores and seeing what they offered.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjCeh7a6IZXz_BXog98Q8D&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"LINN MORSE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZSJ7Y8h4OOFsrwpl-DoDmzMTDN3s51_NhXTDJ3hpCHAYkfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Today I decided to reward myself with a nice lunch out and I was going to go to OTMC, but my parking space ended up being closer toCasa de Reyes so I went there instead.   I don't know if they have new owners or what, but the rolled tacos were SO hard I could not even bite them!   And the food was so UNDERSEASONED. It wasn't worth biting them!  Itvwas horrendously overpriced. $24.95 for 5 Rolled Chicken Tacos, NO rice, NO beans!!!   I realltvdon't know what happened to the salsa that was served with the chips, but it had ZERO flavor!
I was terribly disappointed because we've been eating there for years and we have had many co - worker reunions there, but I can guarantee you, that's the last time I will eat there.  I will walk the extra mile to get to OTMC where I know the food will be good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAGNw4M9aUROpu9OxxK3yMC&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Grushczynska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJTLEWJHdOu2vS3X0qAt_oROur5I8Ai68MC2rKf9jG4AfHlSoigw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casa de Reyes in San Diego offers a well-rounded experience. The food is great and flavorful, the cocktails are tasty, and the service is solid and attentive. The decor stands out—very cool and adds a lot to the overall atmosphere without feeling overdone.

A reliable choice if you’re in the area and want good food, good drinks, and a pleasant setting. Recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCh2FmaCjd2ggCtNcGwvlqn&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Julie Acomb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPUF2wQ-XBaTc39DPYFG2lTundgGHgQ6e2wcSUX5WhzJDZiFRW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has such fun ambiance. We ate on the patio and it was all decorated for Dia de Muertos. We went for my mom’s birthday and this is one of her favorite places. The food was good but not over the top delicious. This place is definitely all about the ambiance. We had the fajitas, enchiladas, and a chicken salad. My sister had a peach margarita and ended up ordering two, it was so good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBV1031s3gk8ZRHqSNzJvym&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Neil Tantay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXKhfe47CwSYKQV7cSGeCCD5frjvX7ihqQAfC2n_u9uFfl7CTCYHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been here a couple of times and tonight we were in Old Town and dropped in.  There was live singing and music because of dia los muertos.  Food was excellent for a Mexican restaurant.  I got the pick 3 and choose chicken tamales, beef enchiladas and tacos.  Everything was delicious. My girl got the Mexican Caesar salad with chicken.  Give it a try if you like Caesar salads.  They have a wide variety of drinks also.  We got the paloma.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDnBvZVg_Iegh_x2tXM4n9&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing every time. Yes it is located in a tourist area, but the food is still fantastic and the ambiance is unbeatable. Tons of great dishes to choose from, and a fantastic place to get a drink. Wonderful for the whole family. They can certainly accommodate large groups. The pozole and molcajetes are top notch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDlN6bQsIFCzEd_CqvWm4B1&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Enrique","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXvSUKrkedx9-Uy4YJdKaKQeVOZm5lIiVZ3mGt1MUMCy7Lfkzr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casa de Reyes is the type of Mexican restaurant with both great atmosphere & service to match. I remember when nearly all Mexican restaurants had this old Mexican/Spanish colonial aesthetic. Located in the courtyard I’m reminded strongly of heritage, & thats something missing from modern Mexican restaurants.

I ordered the Steak and Shrimp burrito with rice (Im not crazy about beans). The flavors were phenomenal & satisfied my Mexican pallet. The coffee was also perfect. Simple & good. I was reminded greatly of a Mexican cafe I grew up eating at as a child that no longer exists. To give me that comfort of memory thru food is a wonderful thing. Highly recommend Casa de Reyes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTcp95z6IZlRtH6ZO8EuP9&fid=0x0:0x9a017ba109327fa5"],"When":"2025-9-11"}]

[{"Name":"Rebecca Green","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3tZGLqFSliXGkmPS4v1FjaoFeZW8TiUvvVMnl_cJ4CrbpfA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best Margaritas we had in San Diego.  Cute little restaurant that offers indoor or outdoor dining and some seats offer a view of the Whaley House. I had the Coyote Fries and they were delicious. The had live music and photos taken at each table that you could purchase. Fun evening!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZx37QMO7uxHA7kTqrV4L5&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Ashwini J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvTgy62tflAb66D7MEtWcW45J27Dnw7MYNl0l0uX26xnMQjg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A lively place with good Mexican food. It seems quite popular in the area as it was fully booked with more people coming in!
Food was good. Service was ok… we had to wait for a while to place the order and get the food as well.
The tables are quite small to fit 4 people and are placed very close to each other making it quite congested.
The margarita flight was quite interesting. It had 5 flavours of margaritas- mango, cucumber, pineapple, pomegranate, spicy watermelon","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8W5zPIn4kpL5hH-qfErGW&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Flacko Farquharson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLgej_IylOYgmIGxq28PKEkS6C1VltxbowqzzCFkHGCxdSedVh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had Jesus V as my waiter, I’d recommend him to every and anybody. He had amazing customer service, he also had great recommendations with this being my first time coming to this restaurant. The drinks at this restaurant was good as well as the tacos overall, this was a good first impression with good food","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4jWjT_9B1uUQuBT7KklhR&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Grace Bian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOykuic3NfTQA3zWaUOovJ8eXKofxg2ICtzttNhFFGp_ucKnCG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The tortilla chips were really delicious! Shortly after we sat down, they brought us a complimentary basket of tortilla chips with salsa dipping sauce, and it was really tasty 😋
We ordered tacos with buttered fish, and a rice plate with beef and one with shrimps. Everything tasted great.
It was our first time trying Mexican food, and we ended up eating way too much—in the best way!
Tip: make a reservation before you go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvM3AOTbKE0piQmK7a6TBw&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"T W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICINgfBnN00_pyMhzAknGfChG_pnMzcejT3dNYFuw5ruzJOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re in the San Diego area, stop what you are doing and go to Café Coyote!  The food is amazing. The atmosphere is fun. The service is top-notch. Trevor, the general manager is a first class operator and engages customers with intention and courtesy. Try the pumpkin flan!  You don’t want to miss this amazing San Diego icon! Our server, Javier,, was the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7E0PeW04H2mb5oJ3kig7y&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Christopher T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXLgJ2BhjMXepwQfKmwAoIoEick_VJvwoti7nnCJols-wRSPlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great weekend hangout place. I took out of town friends here to experience Mexico food. Charming place with indoor, outdoor and even on the sidewalk too. Good service and good foods, drinks are great. They even have live music in the weekend.  Perfect location to walk around afterward and very close by to old town (which) you got to check out while you’re here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZrGIf2OJWmrv7N8EO2emS&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Lloyd C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfWoG6oXwMkztoUGL1WtWFr6KX1JWJksYGnUoLVS2dpbpiof-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As soon as we walked up to the place the atmosphere was amazing! Lots of papel picado draping from the roofs and huge general area to sit, with choice of inside and outside seating. Very busy which did not hinder food preps thankfully. My fish tacos were messy but delicious and the churros made an excellent dessert to end the night off. I also bought this long sleeve shirt as a souvenir (wearing right now) and it’s very cozy. Would love to return again when we’re back in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-s2IOHLnnS0_JPciGS1qZ&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"THE REVIEWER","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5uvHEywh8AIJ1NUyfSK1DXkZoqci0GMcTJEOQy3K0nQUwnz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Mexican food was very good. Service was fast and atmosphere had two men playing the guitar and singing! The food is fresh and homemade. All the tortillas are made there in front of the restaurant. The carne asada tacos are made well and so is the cabo dish. Fast service but slightly expensive but that's how California is 🤷.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALQFRTxE70JyRSm6JNvrk9&fid=0x0:0x9c2f0335b09c4bf7"],"When":"2026-1-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jamal Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9gSGeHCNVZ4HWqGYZwP37YfCq1q70COpNQR2xgZj7G2liZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stopped over at this place on a whim and it turned out to be a very pleasant surprise. We stopped here on a Sunday morning around 9:30 and we got seated immediately. I would recommend getting here around this time on the weekends as there was a good sized line waiting outside once we left, about an hour later. Our waitress was very nice and explained some of the menu items as there were a couple items that I was unfamiliar with. I ordered the Mexican Spice Cocoa, which was $6 for the small and was extremely delicious. Perfect for the.colder mornings. I then ordered the Latin Lover Board which came with Tequeños, 2 mini empanadas, tostones and 2 mini cachapas. My favorite were the  cachapas which were sweet corn pancakes with queso de mano inside. The pancake was sweet and pleasant and the cheese added a nice mild and creamy taste, which complemented well. The empanada and Tequeños were perfectly fried and the meat filling in the was not greasy like some empanadas can be. Overall definitely recommend this place if you're looking for a place for brunch by Old Town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALD3cWDxxx_iCET0Cnx5-s&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Alec Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZRB3ZCKCL1n8tAViYx80RrdM-TxmBIWyzU97gGaUd-r2ppEMVww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great Venezuelan brunch experience.   The arepas were bountiful and huge and delicious.  The salsas served with the same were really good.  The mango jugo was fresh, not fake, and very tasty. Their breakfast special (el criollo) was also tasty, really good shredded beef.  But in my opinion, the arepa bar selections were standout.  Location and staff were great as well. Friendly, accommodating and the location was quaint, clean, very nice, and easy access to old town for the día de los muertos festival. Great job!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVVoeMY4hLl4OlldHy7h0Q&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Haylee Jane Monteiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4F6GmFKEiNWrzo0vPgBuUR_Cl9LqyfsnuPuZFB3oLMLipcJNuMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely vibe and food and probably the best restaurant in Old Towne San Diego!

Mexican spiced mocha - 12/10
Got this iced coz it was hot out. SO good! It disappeared in no time! Husband and I shared but we could totally have gone for more.

El Criollo (Shredded beef, scrambled eggs, rice, black beans, tomato, cheese, arepa) - 10/10
There is a lot of it going on on the plate here but it's all absolutely needed!

Caribbean Salad with chicken - 10/10
Got this for some lean veggies and protein - so good and loaded with pecans too!
We didn't really use the dressing!

Quesillo - 9/10
It's like a venezuelan flan! Lovely texture and flavor; I recommend having the toppings separate and the Quesillon plain!

Mini Cachapas - 12/10
This was our favorite item among everything we got. Proper soft cachapas with the mano cheese inside was absolutely lovely!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBZcgs8EZIy30EolnICbmA&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Liz Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmCymozzbwsz87AN_pxLIvK5sdwvJ8kKPy1h_IzZKbM069xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This food was 10/10 amazing! Everyone was so nice and the service was quick. I got the spiced mocha and the vainero with the fish not beef. Fish is the best. This was a flavor explosion. No notes. Just go!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZZK_sv9ez7A5_5ctaf-am&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Chris Keenan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJBlQmHQ2iF7BeW4fPGytq7JdKhU-_RmKAHP85UalOti-EciJS8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Breakfast on 12/30.  Essentially no wait; prompt and attentive service. Sat outside on an overcast day; chill vibe.  Mexican spiced mocha was lovely.  Enjoyed and satisfied by my criollo con carne.  Recommended without reservation. A bit of constructive feedback for mgmt--don't leave sign on sidewalk saying "wait here for service" when the host is actually waiting on tables. ;)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBx7qgcXz6SoV2XvtpS02ne&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Lij T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9uqDR9DTOTk9RqHe4-kNLFTAwKft2nRclHmDDKAhZUZAi9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited for a late breakfast on a Saturday around noon. Starting with the downside: the hostess service was inefficient. We had to wait outside on the sidewalk in the sun for about 10 minutes before being acknowledged, and then another 10 minutes before we were seated. While waiting, I noticed there were empty tables inside, yet other guests were also left standing outside without being seated promptly.

That said, once we were settled, the experience improved. The food was delicious, the ambiance was warm and inviting, and the menu—though limited—was reasonably priced and thoughtfully put together. Overall, I enjoyed the meal and atmosphere, but the hostess service could definitely be more attentive to make the visit smoother from the start.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOXWE0hE-_xiWQbu8sIC3U&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Kristen Read","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhhSKjOCIR-nZrVjaC1IeRnwqxluWgxD-SGszizqalrWQXqPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After trying Venezuelan food out of town, when I came home to San Diego I was eager to try the local offerings. To the best of my knowledge, this is the only still-open Venezuelan restaurant left in San Diego? I could be wrong, and I hope I am, but if one had to be the last one standing, I'm glad it's Encuentro Cafe! I've been here twice, once for brunch and once for dinner. Both times were excellent. The arepas are fantastic, particularly the reina, which is a delicious chicken salad filling. The tequenos are also good. The sweet corn pancakes with cheese (can't remember the specific name) are not to my taste, but I enjoyed trying them! I think the real stand out to me, though, was the carnitas. As someone who doesn't like carnitas from most Mexican restaurants, I was surprised how much I loved theirs! Our service has always been excellent. I've only ever sat outside--not even sure there is indoor seating? I would love to eat here more often!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clementina Chacon-Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4u9cAdmatEQ6CtoS7R_gm3IvR2Vj-8qd3G30RnU0ALO1kIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Yummy, Venezuelan food! Definitely Recommend.

Come early to avoid the crowd and find seating with a short (5min) wait. We visited with friends and shared several plates (Alma Llanera, El Criollo & El Vainero), drinks (Mexican Spiced Mocha, Guanábana [Sourpot] juice & Ice tea.

The best plate, by consensus, was El Vainero (Mano Cheese, Shredded Beef with fried Plentoins)! The cheese was so yummy and was the same cheese used in the Tequeños (be sure to eat fresh)! The Mexican Spiced Mocha was sweet and the Guanábana (sourpot) was extra tasty.

Cons: Street parking can be challenging.
Pro: Across the street from Old Town San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1LuTl5hQStDtkKJ4bluqx&fid=0x0:0x43d923807b8370a6"],"When":"2025-7-20"}]

[{"Name":"drawonnoodles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf11UYkDy4s7H23IC7lrH2Hpy31x0wm8c7I3GeDEUmwB7PJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you don't want to pay $10 per taco in Old Town then you come here. It's $5 here. I guess I wasn't used to the size of street tacos here so when it came out I was like HUH it's kind of small. But that's my fault. The price makes sense now. I got a red snapper and asada taco. They were good but not shockingly good. A little bit too greasy. I would've liked it a bit warmer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIDNu0wKXezEQ8SP1dVUdn&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Adrian Linares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ9MyIt2tWvtJd5QetBvgUR7Jh34zeuvehj2oPhVrwlteU0XQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My girlfriend and I went to the Whaley house and noticed Flor’s right next to it. Intrigued by the beautiful outdoor seating (it’s a vibe) we decided to check out the menu. The complementary refreshment were spiced tortilla chips with refried beans which hit. Also worth noting that they serve breakfast all day. We ended up ordering chilaquiles and Mexican omelette. Both were delicious. All the staff was super friendly. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXWOeamWEpzX6vIfgi1wBe&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Angelica Cazales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVo7XJj3-LQ4Y-q9uNuPnXThSodapzua2fuXbiXKwL1izn5r0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I came to get a bite after walking around exploring old town SD. I ordered using the kiosk and it was very easy to navigate and see pictures of the food. You can also filter for vegetarian food. I loved the service! After ordering I received my drink and was informed the food would be out soon. The food was quick and sooooo good. The portions were huge and I had enough for dinner time. The sweet lady in front gave me some hot sauce to try and it was so good!! I definitely recommend the snapper burrito, I loved that the inside had a crusted cheese layer. Also look at the size of the burrito!! San Diego burrito did not disappoint.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsZK-5GawGkDlOImNdEAB-&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-7-12"},{"Name":"Josh Baltazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGwLc0426uUtyS_hszBwD6DJIMBgO3FQ0DNqDkJ5w2kX3vUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Not sure where I heard about this place, probably social media. I went to try the Red Snapper Burrito which had Grilled Snapper, cabbage, spicy pickled onions, pico de gallo, our house sauces. It wasn't that good due to the lack of filling in the burrito. Very small amount of fish and cabbage and everything else. Also the flavor was ok as well. Overall the price was quite high for the quality and quantity. Side note there is shared seating for all the restaurants in the food hall too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADVz2d0p0GF6Tb__u0APh-&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Isabella Craghead","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUH-We2OErdAl8xrLipL4wudC5m3Y9tER2eHmSXhTqLVElqz8Ne6A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the best time here! My husband and I were wandering around the area looking for a good place to eat (we are die hard foodies and can be picky...) and we turned this corner to find this beautiful hidden restaurant. We were kind of confused when we walked up at first because we weren't sure where to go, however Flor greeted us with such a warm welcome! Just like if you were to enter someone's house for the first time. We asked what foods they were known for and she gave us a list along with a local customer who confirmed lol! Her husband came out from the kitchen and also showed us how to order from their electronic menu. We decided to try a little bit of everything and we were AMAZED! Also their horchata was AMAZING...literally the BEST I've ever had!!! 100% It wasn't on their online menu but I brought it up once I saw their hard cover menu and Flor immediately told us she could get us one. The people here are so sweet and amazing and the food was a 10/10. Highly recommend their carnita tacos and their red snapper tacos. We want to try their burritos next time because we heard their nacho burrito is to die for! If you're looking for a family owned restaurant with a great place to chill out after a long day and with great food, this is the place to be! Can't wait to be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristi Koplin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0HCFxqGLhIf1FRNZ7aRKcM3Pi5KQLcLGWrIGQwObKcdF-Uw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my guacamole, where do I even start? I just had the most amazing meal at this Mexican food haven! I dove into a plate of nachos that were practically a work of art and a burrito that made my taste buds do a happy dance. And let’s talk about that refresher – it was so unique and delicious that I’m pretty sure it deserves its own fan club! Plus, the rabbit pellet ice? Adorable and refreshing!

The steak in my burrito was seasoned to perfection, but the sauce? Let’s just say it was the magical fairy dust that made everything taste even better! The atmosphere was super chill, with open market seating that radiated good vibes.

And guess what? I got to meet Flor herself! She was so friendly and even showed me around the market. I left with a sticker to remember this delicious adventure, and I’m already plotting my return. If you’re in the area, do yourself a favor and check this place out – your taste buds will thank you!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0wnzp0xF2-IW1zNYr_jWU&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"Laura Foutz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpYmeAjZ0PB18XmpwJS5DJ0ZHFwvT4Q83DWLNhuZ0iWgvR6cc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is excellent! The Sola was amazing and the snapper taco was delicious.  The service was friendly, warm and helpful. The atmosphere is adorable market with clean tables etc.. would highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCiAcxkraxePplcs6g1grNZ&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Luiz Galdino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXOW3OAVUpad3FYb_SEms4uEpJ-cgjief68JRpRbN2bC9IXp4dxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food! My wife and I agree: best burrito we have had so far. Extremely flavorful. We had Surf n' Turf and Steak. Absolutely delicious. Great blend of herbs and very flavorful. The salsa was also great! Right amount of spices. And the portion size...fabulous. I am 6'8", large hands, and put a photo for reference. ABSOLUTELY RECOMMEND!!!

Next time we are in San Diego Old Town, it will certainly be a repeat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIzPSBkwE&fid=0x0:0x6355ad05d5b867a9"],"When":"2025-3-30"}]

[{"Name":"Ankita Aparajita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIe9dtc_m_Pr4PMNR4e2gsnXPACIDKSRxIx3PapjbGvBq44iJKcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ambience,atmosphere and greetings took us to land of Mexico! The rooftop view is cherry on top!
We have tried at this place before but surprisingly this time something was wrong with the Sunday buffet, we all fell sick and felt unwell . My non vegetarian friends told me the meat was very chewy,theres a probability food was stale just that one time.Earlier they used to take pics and they have replaced that with a balloon guy who was super sweet,we definitely got a 🎈","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASMPILMRPn8sW_YAUHNbLq&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-8-3"},{"Name":"Markiesa Bmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXuzTYud9LipK1PfFGd1_SHpmpiMsYZP8IE1fu9GxSMEwb58XRn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This is more a 3.5 . It was a little hard to find the entrance and we ended up going in at the bar area. Was gonna sit outside but the happy hour was only available in the bar. The views outside were amazing though. We got some buffalo wings, nachos and lime margaritas. The wings were good but the nachos were meh, I've had better and the margaritas were ok. For the prices at happy hour can't really beat that. At times it was hard to get the bartender's attention because they were too busy having their own conversation. I can tell this place gets busy and I'm sure their other food is good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJ_Bl43g1ZOeggE&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-5-19"},{"Name":"Edie Gilmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJw5kT_SU7FKVxStILHFQqLlKMPKdnSdYt0uQPS2F3dtnPjSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love coming to Old Town, and one of our all-time favorite spots has always been the Old Town Tequila Factory Restaurant & Cantina. It’s consistently been a go-to for us. One of the best features of the location is the amazing city views and the ease of parking with the underground garage.
However, during this visit the elevator from the parking area was apparently out of service. We waited quite a while before someone in our group went to ask about it, and we eventually had to walk outside and around to reach the restaurant. Normally that wouldn’t be a problem, but a simple sign noting the elevator was down would have helped, especially since two people in our group have difficulty standing for long periods and walking. I’m not sure whether the elevator is the restaurant’s responsibility, but it did affect our arrival experience.
Once we were seated, the waitstaff were friendly, attentive, and welcoming. I was a little disappointed to learn the Paloma is no longer made with grapefruit juice and is now made with soda, so I ordered something else. The food, though, was fantastic. We ordered a couple of grilled fajita skillets, chicken, steak, and shrimp as well as enchiladas and a Crispy Chicken Quesadilla. Everything came out piping hot and full of flavor. The fajitas come with fiesta rice, your choice of black or refried pinto beans, guacamole, sour cream, Pico de Gallo, and fresh homemade corn or flour tortillas.
Even though we were stuffed, we couldn’t leave without having the Flan. It’s incredibly good, our favorite in all of Old Town.
If you’re looking for friendly waitstaff and a great city view, definitely put the Old Town Tequila Factory Restaurant & Cantina on your list.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lance Reno (Spoiled-Saison)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWpdu_fwVJ22OlfPD28f8UAX1lI4dvN2I07tXrMFo6DdQZQYYn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sat on the balcony and the view was immaculate, the taco was amazing, the enchilada was incredible, very spicy and totally balanced. But the Flan was the part that you need to have at least once. It was Fire.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZ57EQNSBAdTEq2h3_M0e-&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Jim Schlachter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIKJauXUbbSJpwJMfwz6azSXpFnHuVwlc4fSoIVmvUFYO6YaqG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thought I was in Mexico. Very clean, everything is spread out. Wheelchair access is great. Parking is limited.  I would go again. View of east , and heritage park is a cross the street.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCU3X-efiL9y1w0qoDgp9Al&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-7-24"},{"Name":"Patricia Martinez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnoreLOXAtHHGuecklXpZOkmTL0XoQWvpyICLgialYqh39HHOa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Champagne Sunday Brunch is good! Begins at 11am, make reservations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUMl77hOawlRtfJCKgmEVm&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-11-17"},{"Name":"Cherilyn Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYUMp6EVsGRfPvf5VGCPnRIqOzzuijEDwOBJEtNNbaDTeBm9A4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Had a nice dinner here last night during our staycation.  The triple fajitas with shrimp, steak, and chicken were plentiful and big enough for two entrees.  Top that off with chips and salsa and a pitcher of margaritas, we were full.  I wouldn't recommend the pitcher of margaritas.  Neither of us tasted or felt any buzz of alcohol so we wouldn't recommend that.  This was a rare event I actually wanted to feel buzzed, so it was a letdown. Service was great, and ambiance was too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwo8CE1AE&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-3-27"},{"Name":"Gordon McCreadie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLVMj6Ap7ZDMvIEruY58VQTTtRzOD8RauPkdhi8_M3Y00vM6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for dinner. We were impressed by the vibe and beauty of the building. The staff, especially our server Sylvia, were fantastic. Beautiful views and great food!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhdoyZJLmfDPjgLwqFVDgt&fid=0x0:0x9cdb1b8bb9fefad0"],"When":"2025-7-3"}]

[{"Name":"amy harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqBfRzZxqB-08WarPdntCiclcotbBqMwQS6hJiKjuLEicgLE1h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fun Mexican restaurant in Old Town serving traditional dishes.   The servings were large.  The rice and beans did lack a bit of flavor.   I enjoyed the chicken chimichanga.  Great chips.   Queso wasn't the best.   The Mariachi music was fun.   Very colorful decor and staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBEbfpm9SE3gEqWhZ9X0qw&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Princess Swan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUD-UfoJXZgEuhcJ65P28yIMIwnO6spnCw0jFP44NcY_bJcAPU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Casa Guadalajara is a must-visit spot; it's really charming with outdoor seating and a vibrantly decorated interior featuring colorful touches. The food and drinks are tasty, and they offer excellent desserts. It's a family-friendly restaurant with space for both large and small groups. While I don't recall live music, there is music playing, creating a pleasant atmosphere, and the service is good. Whether you're visiting San Diego or live here and want a Mexican restaurant, this place is definitely worth checking out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvJX7GyBR7dXFiwevN3EZ-&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"N S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_DQ_jF28fqRgkjA0RPuGwv7WhA0rZevwyDkQtLrAasL-cKOZV2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casa Guadalajara absolutely delivered tonight.
The Queso Fundido con Chorizo came out bubbling hot and packed with flavor — easily one of the best starters I’ve had anywhere. My main dish, the Carne Asada & Shrimp, was outstanding. The steak was tender, the citrus-marinated grilled shrimp were insanely good, and the fresh tortillas and sides made the whole plate perfect.

Beautiful food, great portions, and amazing flavor. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDig5uZr8D4owE6yBKI-jT8&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Kristen Somerville","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCHVgsNqS1xrMfxXC_qy4iCrgzANnBVk45hw5-FDOhxgkr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Casa Guadalajara was recommended by the missionaries at the Mormon Battalion museum and it was a perfect lunch location. Crispy chips, flavorful salsa with a perfect level of heat. The taco salad was fresh, flavorful and delicious. The appetizer platter consisted of taquitos and quesadillas and if you like meaty cheesy goodness it’s a great starter. They had live music and a fun, festive atmosphere.  Prices averaged $20 per dish but they were large enough to easily share.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC-IHy1Jf2ekmmEeksM2pWr&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Seattle Dreamer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcFAU0yrFUr_RVl-opIWeGbaTQ5emXHNuPh3XKDRDlixUYhqkvhA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"My parents love this place! Fidel was a lovely waiter and we enjoyed talking to him, sadly my food wasn't so good, the pollo tamales had this sauce on it that I found to be really spicy even the salsa they give you when you sit down was spicy, I can't tolerate anything spicy/hot, then again I have acid reflux/gastrointestinal issue, I had a guava margarita without alcohol and shared that with my mom we enjoyed it, my parents enjoyed the freshly made tortillas and fajitas trio, I got the meatball soup, and woah, the chef put way too much salt in there, I couldn't eat any of it, and I hate wasting food, I'll be back another time since we live in San Diego, hopefully there's some non spicy options or gluten free and vegan/vegetarian,dairy free options available next time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1DEW2UbsPJSvq6KSjL5yW&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"Sidharth Jhawar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqfvFdclSSlE0wMMqTd7OAs9935GkZqf04JObQ-XgE8pqCZpgI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Decent restaurant with nice ambience. Very nice decor to give you the vibe of dining in Mexico. Food was decent for majority of the part. Service was decent as well and the waiters were very courteous.it can get a little busy during the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCza5j1eRVko_DCHwNe7RFn&fid=0x0:0x3ebb950ce2549e25"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"William and Diane Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVGRkwl07h-GX52Zoyh2u7FKrxipb5jtbEfOGpG2DbamegTZddd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent and authentic Mexican food! Service is outstanding! Priscilla made our visit more special!  Portions so generous and patio dining beautiful. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Luke Qian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlrgnXnV_r4xeXCS2Y265gb22q3fbZJv5fpzsWn-tXq8zVYeES=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This restaurant and bar showcases an impressive collection of tequila, with shelves of colorful bottles lining the walls and even the ceiling—an atmosphere designed to immerse you in the spirit long before the first drink arrives. The cocktail program naturally leans toward tequila and mezcal. While not boundary-pushing enough to compete with award-winning bars, the drinks are well made and offer thoughtful, appealing flavor profiles.

Service was initially discouraging; we waited more than 30 minutes for food. But once the dishes arrived, the kitchen quickly redeemed the experience. Highlights included the aguachile de camarón, the short rib poblano, and the arroz a la tumbada—each vibrant, spicy, and deeply seasoned.

One disappointment lingered: a guacamole listed at $22, a price neither stated on the menu nor easily justified. The server’s attempt to explain it by citing avocado costs of $3–5 apiece felt unconvincing, especially given that even retail prices fall below that range. Still, despite a few missteps, the restaurant delivers strong flavors and a memorable setting for anyone drawn to agave spirits.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_4V1F44_Xwr4MeekLOIPV&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Yu Miao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcNSDEYHYRRHuVU_RlrC6WTzDAakKutd0VKQ1ayQDS85WAOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Atmosphere: great! We sat at a corner, so it was not too noisy. The decorations and lighting were also good. Staff were friendly. Importantly, they are also dog-friendly.
Food: not bad. We enjoyed the fish tacos, octopus was tender. However, we waited for 40min for the dishes. The dessert is delicious. I had the best churros here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRXSjYeHNfLXfpgPDRYk-1&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Jennifer Alexa Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfziVCIAJqS0j_G8OM8dCw0M39gd2N-jN0HUqMKV9ZRtuyEwbhPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was pleasantly surprised by how quiet the restaurant was during my visit—perhaps it was dinner time, or maybe the prices are a bit higher than average. Either way, it worked out perfectly for me. The food and service were truly exceptional, and I can confidently say you won’t be disappointed. The Milo Don Julio was outstanding, and the portions were incredibly generous—I couldn’t even finish my meal! I also tried the quesadilla de flor de calabaza, which had a unique presentation, more like an empanada, but it was absolutely delicious. I would love to come back and try their lunch menu next time. This place is truly a hidden gem worth revisiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDt5nNIJ5yhqy85J6tKYIaO&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Steve Engle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCC9RTm0zccs0AAnzoY20lcLq9PrvOi4EJMsbJu-Rxw8Gil2Y2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Parking is a little tight,  but very worth it.  They had a veranda open for dining when we were there and the view and breeze made for a great atmosphere.  We ordered three entrees and an appetizer. Everything was outstanding. Just go, and maybe stop in downstairs for a rare tequila to go.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAtRCRnJHKMANUiNGJ5xi7_&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-10-4"},{"Name":"Jing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1TVZzw1vdjSFrbglTTLBxiTanhbrjfNPNkd9FoFvqArjA9GPIvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The service was great, and we went around noon when it wasn’t too busy. Still, it took a little while for the food to come out. The flavors were decent overall, though the grilled octopus was a bit overcooked and slightly bitter. Otherwise, a nice spot for lunch with friendly service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCp7O6DHkd_e-f8I8jLddIq&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"Valerie Endicott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPZ8kN3TUeGqejG5OpzG70oBGKsRW8tJldwwdhdTLdaD8n3r0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my. A Chili Relleno that bursted with tender steak, peanuts and seasonings that had me wanting to lick my plate! A perfect Tequila Mojito to wash it down and our attentive and friendly server Alberto made this special girls night out perfect. A very intimate and cool spot. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-1uYTeopsEdUNSPjEgt-T&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Rebecca Franks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVdoXUpOy_6bn6LOGLV-ZsM5s0N1iIrSH7wnGIwMkWM2J_xTz4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the best Mexican food Resturant!  I love the decor(3000+ tequila bottles), service and food!  Everything is the best authentic Mexico City style cuisine.  Everything I’ve ever ordered is the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_URc-R6oimYS8_yjZpMdb&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-10-12"},{"Name":"David Barrozo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3FuxH1AEeVZIg2GhE1Lce6ew1zrhbdXGiBqUW6ESC3ccxeTuB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Agave boasts of thousands of tequila bottles, only issue is, they're the owners private collection. This place competes with the Museum of Tequila in Maxico City! The good news is, they do offer over 500 brands to the public and a very well stocked bar, so chances are you still get to have a shot of your favorite with your meal. So make sure you stop by and enjoy yourself.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBZ88vSrQPYqbW_7XpkkCo-&fid=0x0:0xc538eace5e9367b2"],"When":"2025-9-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Puneeth Veerabhadrappa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVT8tfKwhP-KXX5H1jZdHjUqqOzVTBYHatPvqzdsry1VlXjo2YmPQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Stopped by Rocking Baja Lobster & Grill in Old Town San Diego for a quick lunch. The ambience was great and the food was good too. The tequila lime shrimp were packed with flavor—perfectly cooked with a zesty, well-balanced citrus kick. The lobster and shrimp bites tasted good: crispy, flavorful, and great for sharing.The corn ribs were a fun surprise, similar to the Elotes i have tried in many other mexican restaurants, creamy and rich in flavour.
We also tried a few tacos, all solid with fresh ingredients and generous fillings, however felt these could have been made a little better. The seafood skillet melt stood out as a comfort dish done right—cheesy, hearty, and loaded with seafood, served hot and full of flavor.
Lively atmosphere, good portions, and friendly service make this a great spot in Old Town for Mexican-seafood fusion and drinks. Definitely worth a visit when you’re in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgroH_gB_ssVjXuhcPDZ1h&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-12-20"},{"Name":"Lisandro Moreno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3UrcD518tk3x7F-FDEwJemVz1ATFaw6X8YooBwSQdh2qQizw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The restaurant experience was good, not much wait for a table for 2. We were given chips and had to get ourselves the salsa at the endless salsa bar. The food overall was okay, the portion was fairly small considering the price. The chicken, and meat were salty and the only great meal was the ceviche and it’s an appetizer 😂","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApq72o25BlBQ7a3TjRFxkS&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Ashley Briggs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUd6KydYTXIOx0IVGZ-hNlpLIiu6Cp5kCCqArZNzVVNXcgnYt0dBw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Fun spot with a Louisiana-style kick! We ordered the Big Baja to Alaska bucket with extra shrimp.  Great presentation and really tasty. It comes with the Lobster Chowder, rice and beans, a Cesar Salad, and fried ice cream. The lobster chowder was delicious, and the salsa bar with chips adds a nice touch. Lobster and shrimp were definitely the highlights, though the king crab wasn’t quite as good as expected. Overall, a fun atmosphere with great staff and solid seafood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDTKdab2Pqdq9JR5HZjmTdo&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Le Cretique- Rube in the Hood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2Rs36_cfTe3Hc4goVW4rNaBeKPA6KKRdFtxByKFBFDlzKkZ-B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recently I was with a group of 20 from work.
We were seated in a side room. Excellent seating!! Our server was Manny. He was just an awesome server. With all the requests for drinks special orders Manny kept it all in stride. He got all the orders perfectly correct. Ordered the Surf and Turf but wanted more carne asada than shrimp. I ordered the coffee&Kahlua which when it came was cold
Manny replaced the drink. The service was exceptional!!  Everyone got their food in good time. We had a blast because the entire evening went flawlessly. Food out of this world delicious!!  Parking in Old Town is crazy. Rocking had ample parking spaces for our group. I am disabled and sure enough there was disabled parking. Gotta go... I mean when you gotta go you don't want to be hunting for a bathroom. Rockin got  you covered. Bathrooms,(very clean ), right as you enter the restaurant Too much to drink well as you exit bathrooms are right there!! ZRockin is easy to find  all lit up with torches illuminating the restaurant. Why go anyplace else in Old Town? Rockin has it ALL! Good food, excellent service and  a fun atmosphere. Will I be going back?  You better believe it This place Rocks!! When you get there just tell them Le Critique Rube in the hood recommends this place so... it must be awesome!! MANY MANY.... MANNY 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALvKh9lH0XyhhqwdNTHGCe&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Michelle Hedrick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUK1vugFpaNiQ4NL0i_f4K3zEs7yDRm23F79f5QO4EWGIDMj9qS_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The bucket of food was the hit here! This huge tray/bucket of food was brought to our table and oh my...lobster, crab legs, shrimp, chicken, steak, etc. My margarita was the size of my head too! Don't think there was a lot of tequila in it though...so mostly sugar, sweet and sour and a few shots of tequila. I wouldn't order it again at that price point with such a small amt of tequila. But our server was great and the food was yummy! Happy Hour there before dinner has some great deals as well (and the bartender was super friendly)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCScd3bUzCoo72C80WR1K3C&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"R A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0MJPCcqyu1xIlmxPjSRfC7RlCqSCZEgIGBDWwEV1hHAzR5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Food was delicious everyone was happy. We had reservations and were seated right away. There is $7 valet for parking. Seating at the outdoor terrace was nice, good for large group 5+. Lobster roll was delicious and very filling. The tacos were overpriced; the meat was tender, although the shrimp in the taco is spicy. The fajita was good, and enough for two people to share since it comes with sides too. The most popular item out of the group were the appetizers: calamari was so delicious and crispy, and the oysters with the flavorful sauce it comes with. There is a salsa bar thats self serve, wide variety. They served chips when you are first seated. And they serve mexican cola and fanta for drinks if you ask. Good spot in Old Town, would come again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBndhPn3jNyiNtVARkdz0Ur&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-9-6"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious shellfish at Rockin’ Baja Lobster in Old Town! Great, laid back surf vibe with lots of seating and an outdoor, covered, dog friendly patio. We ordered the original Baja bucket for two with the lobster chowder and fried ice cream. Everything tasted amazing, especially the lobster tail. The mai tais were very tasty. A staff member came and offered free photos and post cards. There is $7 valet parking available. The staff were all very friendly and accommodating, and orders came out quickly. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvyd79HPh-5znEqTGb2w_C&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Sathiyan Kutty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWuBWTjjofEMinGPDCoNTCBGcJCRc5TVWwCUHR8_cYvTUsicuI07w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I haven't rated a restaurant 5 star in a while but this definitely meets the standard. Went during happy at 3 pm on Friday.

House Margarita was amazing, they did not hold back on the tequila. The lobster taco on the happy hour menu was the best I've had.

All the palapa menu items were incredible and the lobster and shrimp were perfectly cooked and were brought out in less than 8 minutes.

They have a killer self service salsa bar and everything was so fresh. Make me want to move to San Diego.

Great place for families, friends and I was told that it is a great place for locals as well. Waiting staff were super friendly and attentive.

Don't miss this place if you are in Old Town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6Di2sNrIDZv0g5MQK4Y_z&fid=0x0:0x3e05f6215d552d43"],"When":"2025-6-27"}]
