user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Vee J [Vi Gì]","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0AFGJL4XuA7TpDOGN927wbEOwepW9YDV0mNVg4FeSO3nH1W8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Right across the street from Old Town and its parking lot, this place looks like it could be a classic tourist trap - and that’s exactly why it deserves credit for not being one.
The interior immediately sets the tone: warm, floral, confident, and respectful of its roots. There’s a sense of order and experience here, the kind that comes from knowing exactly what you’re doing. Yes, it’s in a visitor-heavy zone, but this is a well-oiled, well-run restaurant built on solid Hispanic culinary tradition, not shortcuts.
Even the burger, always the test in a place like this, was done properly. Not oversized, not overdressed, not drenched, no gimmicks. Just crunchy where it should be, naturally juicy where it matters. The fries were spot on. Fresh vegetables, grilled with intention, balanced and clean. Respect.
Service was genuine, helpful, and appropriately attentive without hovering. You get the feeling this place has loyal local fans.
For visitors: your bet is safe here. Comfortable seating, stylish but relaxed atmosphere, good food done right, and excellent smoothies to finish things off. A solid, reliable stop just steps from Old Town - without the usual tourist regret.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2HRpMIHTOTIJHhn5BtX7F&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"IzzythaGuy94","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIbKDQPCEI2tQZGGWEgedurWtST4joo86zkEAuQ3_N-IkhSi0W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Eat Here! , “Comer Aqui!” Fresh ingredients , delicious popping flavors ! Everything you’d hope for and expect from a smaller authentic Hispanic Food spot! You won’t  be disappointed! The Waitress Sabrina was very welcoming and reassured me honestly that this was a good choice. Thank you Sabrina!  Oh and the vibe is cool too, love the fire , wether it’s a date ,, breakfast, business, I’d recommend to all!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAZybpcxuJNktFFbMLaqqKX&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2026-1-7"},{"Name":"Eric Alvarado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPGhDQeQLLWbHO5gsA97TYf__nJM4Lr3fK2dO_WG2Hv17uFDJ5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"9.4/10 both Chilakiles / Divorciados

I got the Chilakiles and wanted to go back another day because it was so good and got the Divorciados the next day and both of these dishes had SOOO MUCH FLAVOR

Everything tasted fresh and you can really taste everything put into the dishes. I was actually super impressed with the quality of the food.

The rice and beans are so-so as they're probably just made in mass for all of the dishes. The portions are smaller compared to another place around the block, BUT if you're looking for great food this place is honestly a must try.

Prices are a lil expensive for what's given but the taste absolutely makes up for it

I would recommend this place over all other restaurants in Old Town, even more than the always busy Cafe Coyote. It opens earlier than other places as well so this makes for a great early breakfast spot","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy3adKXIZPZXVFp32PCsSb&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"AG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPVxhCw5FbEDmcdY5UkzZTUjM9dd9LDP0CNSaCpJeDynrnSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If it hadn’t been for the Halloween parade and the road closures, we probably would never have discovered this hidden gem of a restaurant. For years, every time I led a tour through Old Town, we always dined at one of the Mexican restaurants inside the area. To be honest, compared with this place, that restaurant’s food now seems rather rough and uninspired.

Today I ordered an avocado salad, and it was absolutely stunning — beautifully presented with a mix of vegetables, fruit cubes, fried shrimp, toasted bread, and crushed nuts, far beyond my expectations.

The restaurant is located just west of the Old Town entrance, away from the crowded spots inside. Its garden-style seating offers a refreshing view of the surroundings from a different perspective. The servers were bright, handsome, and incredibly friendly. What delighted me even more was that they could chat with my guests in Spanish — which made everyone so happy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB2V4RXahbYYkvjz6Cb4vAp&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Schuyler Hoppmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbUOVqnqLcoZbkDlta3U5FohEwIN6s1MSNX8w3WcKt1abm0X0T=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had such a great experience here!  Our server was so accommodating and everything we got was amazing.  I ordered an appetizer as my dinner entree and it was more than enough food and super balanced and tasty!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAR-4F-Xu2fO_ezxLqD3ihz&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Debra Vallejo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeF9kGi342ZbW6r8HqRjd2moFkvwqVeNkS4pMHj86mrjZuJAek=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited fromTX and found this spot and we have to say the food was delicious and the coffee was so good . We chatted with the owner and just a nice guy . We were so impressed with this spot and sorry we didn’t get to eat there again but we did grab coffee again on the way out of San Diego. If you get a chance this is definitely a place to try if you’re in town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpDybB3GSlJNe-k4elZhI2&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Conor Fellin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP_JlD7JWk1yBWOiKyagBvskp2O6TZcd4OjgR5gTzNOClBSbmt3Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for dinner, and had an excellent experience. Three tacos: chorizo and potato, baja fish, and shrimp. It is hard to choose a favorite, but the award probably goes to the chorizo and potato taco. Would recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeS1iXoHcqp-v9AQ_oK163&fid=0x0:0x9a6fe3b378ffc1bd"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Cindy Woodruff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWBq3Yh3ReiBeZQmsDJDhFmqVukJduyZHMOHSzHX8kiI2foot4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Some of the best breakfast dishes you'll ever have. Lots of variety and top quality. Service is wonderful, too. The staff remembered us from our first visit a month ago - even remembered my autistic son's special request about his pancakes. We visit from out of town. But we definitely plan to return the next time we come to San Diego. It was very quiet, but I will qualify that by saying that we visited the morning after a holiday.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark LoGiurato","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxBY64_wC7TBCXlH972PcMDIc487I-s0yySpIwZ24S6aKw5K22pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good place to get freshly made-to-order red snapper tacos.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC43h3ODV25K6Pao8AQ9OhY&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2025-8-23"},{"Name":"Sanam Ansari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXtHhOaAJUjiBGzGZe7C0ycl1ptEBCHpwwt3eamQ-_Z-G9Peh_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My new favorite spot!! I literally spent last weekend getting something from each vendor! First, I started off with a horchata cold brew and Payaso donut from Barrio Donas. The coffee was perfectly balanced, not bitter and not too sweet. I saved my donut for after and it was so different from usual. The dark chocolate cover was thick and crunchy and the perfect balance to the dough that wasn't as sweet but super fluffy. The marshmallow center took me back to the ice cream sundaes of my childhood! For lunch we got a Birria taco, quesadilla and a torta from Tuetano. The torta was my favoriteeee but they were all delicious. The birria is tender, juicy and soooo flavorful. The bone marrow is on the heavier side and fattier but that's to be expected. My daughter loved it. I wanted to try Flor so I got their Flor breakfast burrito. It was the perfect balance of everything. No eggs but instead these perfectly seasoned pieces of steak in this rich sauce that again reminded me of this comforting stew my dad used to make. Paired with cabbage and cilantro this dish hit home and is definitely big enough to share! We then tried the elote in a cup and the corn was cooked perfectly. I could have done with more lime and tajin and a little less mayo and salt but still yummy.  Then finished it off with some delicioussssss shortbread cookies from the Wine Shop. The lavender ones were my favorite, subtle lavender and sweetness and the best with a nice cup of tea or coffee. Everything complements each other so nicely and you feel like you get a full culinary experience just by visiting each vendor in this cute well thought out concept. This is perfect for people like me who want to sit and enjoy in one spot, but able to try so many things!! They also have pop up shops and a DJ the weekend we went which made it even more fun! Yayyy for this awesome new gem in Old Town. A must visit!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx46__PQ&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-5-25"},{"Name":"Nilufar Alemozaffar Motlagh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVKAna9_3JNjNMXE98kuA_8ZrfoOv6AtZu1pfqiNmNxwdQNwo=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I took my family to the market for the first time last week because I had heard of the place from my friends.  As we walked in, we noticed the beautiful murals on the outside. It’s such a fun place and so cute inside. The kids really wanted corn and donuts so we grabbed a couple of each and sat down and enjoyed. You definitely need to try the Horchata cold brew from the donut shop(Barrio Donas) . It was the best I had definitely coming back for more.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxmbmGdQ&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-5-21"},{"Name":"Miriam Lopes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUOCwL_vKnILrqM33x0Dsa1J5fK9TWX6rCpm01iIIkN6131pI50vg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect spot to have tasty coffee (Por Vida) with your best friend & puppy. Plenty of seating, outdoor dining, and overall good vibes.
A TON of people when we came the week of Halloween/Dia de Los Muertos.
Free parking a couple of blocks away if you’re willing to walk a bit. Plenty of other shops around if you like to stack different food options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-r57mowE&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2022-11-16"},{"Name":"Mini Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9jmmKEQoZJwvv1N0NTkzKDJQ8rxZbfncDbf52sZCz3o4f7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to visit we had brunch at Flor’s farm to table, but let me tell you about this Urban Market in Old Town it really has everything to offer from wine tasting at their local wine shop to breakfast and brunch they also have delicious tacos at Tuetano taqueria, not to mention Barrio Donuts, which is an exquisite donut shop with the sweet corn lady at elote rite across. They really have tables and chairs everywhere so finding a place to sit is not a problem clean restrooms and very nice staff. Very impressed Plus every business has a nice selection of cold beer delicious Michelada‘s all around the clock. I give it a solid 10 out of 10 this market really has everything. Let me tell you about the food. It was ridiculously delicious. You gotta stop by Flor’s farm to table and ask for the shrimp Flautas or elote pancake🔥","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICR6JCb_gE&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-3-24"},{"Name":"Rem Henshaw","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_NEguekYWFSjXQ4mpsDkvCN5VIKDtdM3wsZaPg1SchrNgjmGT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Clean area, a few interesting places to get food drinks and snacks from. Plenty of tables in the shade and I appreciated the clean restrooms as well. Thanks to Gabriela and her partner for telling me about their little shop, Hola Paris. I enjoyed the spirulina oatmilk with agave cinnamon and fold flakes. Not as sweet as I would have liked but a unique experience. Can't wait to go back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDp9L61AQ&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-8-17"},{"Name":"Candy Lane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKe0XoaoEURJobuGDQlTeSa6w4envesZjLYxfGv002yLMU_vw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped in for an afternoon snack and we
Found this fun lovely place with people hanging out and having an amazing time! We
Tried the corn at Elote and it was perfect! The
Girl there was so friendly and nice. We also bought a box of donuts and some cold brew and wow these were the best donuts I had in my life!!! I was never a donut fan until I came here!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx8aD_FA&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-5-20"},{"Name":"Max","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTMTjtDeTJzK98fy7mjnSEVpmGPwaLtPN2CMUWTM5KJTtRgeDC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was blown away by jus how delicious the food is here, and the atmosphere is so nice and friendly. I would definitely go back to try all the other delicious looking foods!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICx6Y378AE&fid=0x0:0x3a605794927342eb"],"When":"2023-5-20"}]

Owners and staff were amazing and I can’t wait to go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlOpR4SB5Ms2KbngvalIOm\u0026fid=0x0:0x2cb38abe6484012c"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Jonathan Arthur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCNThBEDPAtyuNx53GZ18OXvpG5SzoWU9OuccUDcY4aaaeCMK6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This new spot right in the heart of Old Town is great! The food was really good (highly recommend the Smoke Show burger and the dirty fries) and the cocktails are on point. Really cool decor inside the restaurant and the staff were really friendly. Great spot for some good food and a fun night out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2xjYr_dpj4S1IZv8Uoud_G_366BiwTDv1IYqpY3GIaC0vuMM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just took a quick stop in the morning on my way to LA. They’ve been open two weeks and they are on their game. Had the Wyatt Earp Burger. Solid juicy burger with some nice crispy hash browns on the side. The waiter was incredibly attentive and very fashionable. Their whole restaurant bar vibes fit exactly with the rustic old town atmosphere the street has. Prices are fairly cheap for some pretty good food. Not sure what the lunch and dinner menu looks like but the breakfast was spot on.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"MarvinTheMartian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR60UmGFIKfcnTdwr-BiWl27SHWDj5CNmZrIQtNYrOPlGkhc0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing place! The food here is not like any other Mexican food restaurant. It has a very nice twist with their food ingredients. I promise you, you'll tey something you havent had at another Mexican restaurant. The prices are not super high like you would think. Overall the place has awesome vibes, great service, and amazing food. Highly recommend.
Ordered the birria tamal, chicken and rabbit al pastor taco, strawberry tres leches dessert, watermelon maragarita, horchata Clara maragarita. Payed $60","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtijI7xFrbMcKbt0A3ioK-&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-9-10"},{"Name":"L Juju","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLEvDUXYVbreiG3ULkbEIKusN9fG-lP912LeJv-sMjTX46OfQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Wanted to try something new in Old Town and stumbled upon this place. Save the trip, everything was overly salty. I couldn’t believe even the Ahi in the tostada, very heavy handed in the salt. The Bao buns was salty as well. Empanadas had very little yellowtail but more potato filling. The tacos we got were salty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxCth_KG4xnO54psovB-Ef&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Kathi Burns","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMq3W__trdD9FyinTM4ZS8HhQxA-PPVDZanOSO5n-lEjqt2CeYHQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great atmosphere and really good food made from scratch.
They have a couple's dinner for $95 for two drinks, One appetizer, two entrees and a dessert! Highly recommend

Plus you're happy hour is great and they have a wonderful negro cerveza","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAYlVI-JLB1efkz4hmENdqx&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"DUCKS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUy6LsF9nbnxWHfGK3Sd13IFTn7A77WPQzosHt5NSdFoJrM--w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As an LA native, I have had Mexican food more times than I can count. This time was hands down one of my favorite. Their Birria Tacos are to die for and the atmosphere is very fun and cool. While Old town is a bit of a tourist trap, this restaurant is a diamond in the rough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruby Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-5kd7b--p5OCqzblQLsssDOqvwe3iUfW9mqlVMRD3x3yAFGrE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love Tahona Bar! Their food and cocktails are so unique and they use such high-quality ingredients. I'm obsessed with their corn croquettes. They also do group events--- I had my wedding welcome party/post-rehearsal dinner here and it was amazing! They were willing to customize our menu to our preferences, and it was super easy to plan. We rented out the restaurant for about 50 people, and we just had to meet a food and drink minimum, so we had an open bar and buffet-style full dinner service. The manager Zach and the staff were so friendly and attentive! All of our guests loved the space and the food and drink! It was also the perfect size for our group. Highly recommend doing events here, or just coming for drinks or dinner!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELT2-tWsktCP9wE&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-5-27"},{"Name":"Roberto Rojas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVFPVNG5Q0HiihlUi95MJYUyN8MaIqKxu1m4KisJsMsWYt_A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful experience. Food is beautifully set up and tastes amazing. The tetela mole flight had such a diverse flavor profile. Drinks are tasteful, very balanced and most importantly affordable for their quality. Im from LA and any time im in San Diego this is a must. You get to enjoy all this while enjoying the lovely views of a historic cementery.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDT5zY7OlEfFCmc1kJ8QsUD&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Ailed Rainsberger","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPua9Ij6HGcYKW4b8UDvHWJvyGyC6RhYGy0eVMosliIfWXr77d=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best Mexican restaurant I have been to in SD. The shallots were the highlight, an amazing explosion of flavors. The menu is not your typical Mexican food but it was interesting. Everything I had was delicious, including the drinks. The service was also great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4J_ogjwIR-5slNKD9HMWo&fid=0x0:0x6e20e18662cd99e2"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Dan Doe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHt4vdAtKxpC3bGYEvl-t7LxeGTEkJDJh-HrTK4xl9nMkJn_dH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Discovered this place randomly through the inkind app and must say I was pleasantly surprised. I honestly wasn't expecting such an amazing and creative bar  and food menu. The service was also absolutely stellar with both Zach and Madi being incredibly attentive and great feedback on dining options. Given how dedicated they were to providing amazing service I wouldn't be surprised if they were the owners.

The squash blossoms were really really good. The chick and rabbit and venison tacos were delicious and highly recommend.

The tetela mole flight was also a must order if you enjoy mole.

My only request would be to add another vegetarian option for the tacos.

They also have a reservation only speakeasy in the back which will be a must try for my next visit!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Ken Keil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9GbsL7eKbvtzh2xJYnLdAp6lhyqmPLdhzvc2tuVz1WEnVODLiRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful! I was at the end of a long trip and couldn't have found a better grande finale!
I was eating solo and could tell there were a lot of regulars in the house. I was warmly welcomed and made to feel like a part of the family.
The service was fantastic and the food was spectacular! The bruschetta was so flavorful... the best I've had. I didn't think it could taste any better, until I dipped it in the broth from the cioppino! The seafood in the cioppino was plentiful and extremely fresh. Delicious!
If you're looking for authentic Italian food in a warm and inviting atmosphere, this is the place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA237WuvEWOR2qypE-rBcKc&fid=0x0:0x1d7134c009f37625"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Celeste Abbott","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdJiBMsHYbS-HBbWNiat8Jv_cp3piZXHP2ndYc2Ka_nThYeFk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jack & Giulio’s is the kind of Old Town spot that makes you feel like you stepped into a classic Italian time capsule—in the best way. It’s a long-standing, family-owned restaurant (a San Diego favorite since 1961) with that old-school red-linen vibe and warm lighting.

We started strong with two martinis, then shared shrimp bisque, garlic bread, and a caprese salad. 😋 Every course came out hot, 🍝 paced perfectly, and plated like they actually care. I ordered the cannelloni (comforty, rich, and exactly what I wanted), and he had the linguine with clams—fresh, briny, and generous on the seafood. We finished with a double espresso, ☕️ which was the perfect clean little mic-drop at the end.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Destinee Murzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3MHIRgZ9ETqlYpQhcWtN7GfT8g-gwtr2ebwTRN4cv5RJ5MEO5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chefs Kiss!  Questo ristorante è fantastico!

My husband and I were on the hunt for a top-tier Italian restaurant, and we're so glad we stumbled upon Jack and Giulio's Italian Restaurant--what an absolute gem! From the moment we walked in, everything exceeded our expectations.

The food was authentic, delicious, and packed with rich, vibrant flavors. Every bite felt like a trip to Italy! You can tell the ingredients are high-quality and that the dishes are crafted with real care and passion.

If you're looking for a place that will more than satisfy your palate and set the right ambiance, I highly recommend Jack and Giulio's. We left full, happy, and already planning our next visit. Don't miss out on this incredible dining experience!

Salute","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFtj6pd8xohdNRz7XZ8M77&fid=0x0:0x1d7134c009f37625"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Chad Baker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkfXQE7K7Q0Ws-oAVrcTtbSmvvU33CyFuPL81yX8XdJTMKYyBBwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First time visiting with my brother and the experience was extremely disappointing.

I have a vegetable oil allergy and can only eat food cooked in olive oil. One server initially told me they primarily use olive oil, but once our actual server took over, he repeatedly insisted that everything was cooked in peanut oil. When I calmly explained multiple times that I cannot have peanut oil, he became confrontational and dismissive rather than helpful or reassuring.

I was then told there was only one pasta dish on the entire menu I could eat, and I wasn’t allowed to add shrimp to it. When the dish arrived, the portion was shockingly small — literally a few bites of pasta. Even the server commented on how quickly I finished, which should say everything about the portion size.

I completely understand kitchen limitations and allergy protocols, but the confusion, poor communication, rude attitude, and tiny portion made this a frustrating and uncomfortable first visit. I left hungry and disappointed, which is not acceptable for a paid dining experience.

I’m sharing this in hopes management takes allergy concerns more seriously and improves staff training and portion standards going forward.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Joyce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXZxNTwDDrDORREIcjw7RrYe5ln0fSY9KZxgcT5AmpZKD2EK5X=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jack & Giulio’s Italian restaurant is a fantastic place to eat in Old Town San Diego. My food was delicious and though I was dining by myself, the welcome I felt by everyone I met was warm and gracious. The angel hair pasta with a meatball was delicious, complemented perfectly by a generous side of garlic bread and a relaxing glass of wine. It was one of the best meals I’ve had out in quite some time. The atmosphere was peaceful, the service was excellent, and it was a real pleasure to meet the owner, Jack. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPrRnO2FzL-mNw&fid=0x0:0x1d7134c009f37625"],"When":"2025-6-1"},{"Name":"Amber Wierzba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItYO6S9GzQQZfZifd-ZGnQ1DAX3_c1jCKOvCanFLri2K_Dlw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The mushroom sauce pasta option was amazing. I added chicken to mine. The drinks (lemon drop martini for me) was fantastic. The outdoor patio area was very quaint and peaceful. The waiter we had could not have been better. Just an amazing experience and would absolutely recommend this to anyone who enjoys a smaller portion size but savor every bite.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJMYoTcUgY03vntgHLrYp3&fid=0x0:0x1d7134c009f37625"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Johan Aarnio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0O3-XeSoTw8g6zGRqW3_SrhAH-Sx68ybeeg-iHp9wHtR2tw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Having been to the original Giulios Pacific beach in the 80's we were so looking forward to what turned out to be total disappointment. Reservation for 5 in a not busy weekday and we constantly needed to get waitor attention for bread, wine and order taking. Food was a total disappointment. Linguine with clams only in shells and many closed which should never be served. The linguine was less than an ounce, non existent on this plate. My wife's chicken marsala was tough and others lasagna was dry. We needed to ask for pasta and sauce. We frequent many Italian restaurants and this food was way below other's. Will not go back and very, very disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sophia Wynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlFKaj0YMvsilV3cAe4D6lEXog8bq9aOCErd0aFXWwfHcH-WgA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing service and food! Got the palm heart salad and tortellini with white mushroom sauce. truly was divine! Thank you Jack and Giulio! (my photos don’t capture the beauty of these dishes)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCozdqYwQE&fid=0x0:0x1d7134c009f37625"],"When":"2025-4-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chris O'Rear","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXa3Q56ynh1Ams4aUAyQ0Dqa6W6vTB0RCMMdcEqvhzimYiLWP5Gsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I joined my wife on a work trip for a few days of fun in San Diego.  We decided to stay in the Old Town area and found the Cosmopolitan Hotel & Restaurant.  They are still working on getting the restaurant reopened. Now it has limited offerings during Happy Hours mostly on weekends, but are hoping to build on this.  The manager of the hotel also manages Barra Barra & Casa de Reyes, which are both great places to eat within walking distance from the hotel.  Speaking of the hotel manager, Dee Carey, was wonderful.  Very friendly and accommodating.  He brought some great margaritas to our room before the bar at the restaurant officially opened one night.  He allowed us to store our luggage when we arrived early and needed to check out late.
The rooms have a rustic charm that is like a step back in time.  No T.V.s, phones, or clocks, but internet is available and worked well.  (I led a webinar from our room one day we were in San Diego and used the hotspot on my phone for that because the hotel WIFI speed could be inconsistent.)  The hotel is within walking distance from many attractions, shops, restaurants, and more.  Other key sites in San Diego are a short Uber/Lyft from the hotel or hop on the Old Town Trolly for the day.  We had a great time.  Would recommend the experience of staying in this historic hotel.  Would recommend the experience for others, especially those who are interested in the history of the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBczHSGeCU27xkT7Mdt0FHy&fid=0x0:0xf24da64aec60cc64"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Steven R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeoSXMhfVBP9TMAnDrs5-OyDarBA3V0_YZCzhEryQYy_FSop0K=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A historical site filled with culture and ambiance. The rooms are not modern and do not have TV but there grounds and the surrounding area are more that interesting enough to keep you busy. The rooms all have a balcony view out onto the Old Town park. Great location for exploring the rich history of the Old Town area and even the historical Hotel itself almost like a museum. Dee and the staff was friendly and helpful. The breakfast was just scones and croissant and coffee and juice. There courtyard had adequate seat was was rather quiet and peaceful compared to the outside grounds.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vampire Tofu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpuN7k7UVpkaoO2UrfVshdBvLg-hhYz_LEGQxPqO03KlmY1ZA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a fantastic stay at the Cosmopolitan Hotel in Old Town San Diego. The building is full of history and charm, and it truly feels like stepping back in time. We stayed in Room 11, reportedly the most haunted room, and it definitely added to the experience—unique, atmospheric, and unlike any typical hotel stay.

If you appreciate historic properties with personality and a touch of the paranormal, this place is absolutely worth it. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shira Kamil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-mpUgYgtaenEWWJ9pRgL1isDEVhotKFfy-HqLX5TYITRtgdGZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our one-night stay was excellent. The room was quite large, very comfortable and loved the historic nature of the whole hotel. The continental breakfast was enough to satisfy with delicious scones and croissants. Sorry that the saloon and restaurant were not open during our stay, but the atmosphere of Old Town offered many options for a great evening. Look forward to another stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alyssa Ashmore","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJTIYpJG3CnkxphkjX-p8Fu7IRoZmxfr_ZNvrAGtrgsmelsoT8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Affordable price, clean rooms, and nice location right in the heart of Old Town! We had a great time during our 1-night stay. A few small suggestions: The bed was a little creaky but otherwise comfortable. We had a bit of trouble finding where to check in so I would maybe add a sign outside to make that more apparent.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Connie Hartman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKFL9-_fGCWIo8yio_gw3GfB5kPG2TcFEoChGKON978rMhBwQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a staycation for me and the perfect place!  The hotel was clean, quiet at night, safe, situated  in the center of Old Town near shops and restaurants.  My room was spotless and the bed was very comfortable. I loved sitting out on the balcony and loved the sound of nearby trains in the day/early evening which just added to the charm. The manager and staff went above and beyond to be helpful even walking me to my room and making sure I knew how everything worked with locked gates, etc.  I will definitely be going back for another stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crystal Towne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2RL8evBcVRmGSlGPHuvdqDhAQF1lUKHtmeQmhlUZVGLcDXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent location with free parking and delicious, warm complementary pastries each morning.

Rooms are clean, quaint, and comfortable just missing modern amenities like a television and extra outlets.

The service was exceptional and very friendly.

We were there for a wedding - we highly recommend this place","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Charlie Mathews","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJW9px3XKDqP0W5LuyX-DhNIdUXtushJUIQJTrCuF-npINp1w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyed our first stay here xmas week. Room was charming, bathtub was hilariously large, didn't miss the TV. Wouldn't have minded a small fridge but no biggie.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eric Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJMsVBbIUW5Ry3Y3nKe4H21FZJIpUMcCirLzhyTwmVShBAtTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is always enlightening to find a cozy place that is unique from the rest of the area. I believe this is the only brewery in Old Town and certainly goes on my list of favorite finds in my travels.  Great quiet location where i could sit outside and enjoy a good brew. The staff was very friendly and knowledgeable, and recommended the choice of selection based what we felt like drinking that moment.   The place was very clean and artfully simple. We had their light beer and the Bulbous Flowers that were refreshing and balanced.  The Bulbous Flowers is a hazy and very fruity and amazing color.  Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCw95CkWw&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2025-3-21"},{"Name":"Matthew Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe4WqfikkuUYtKR6ZP_LXxtvdEjAD6MI68sGTU48y2ITxQQn8a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great location and great beer. Had the Czech Pils and a new collab WC IPA. Slightly touristy area but still feels like a secret spot. Prices are reasonable for the location. Hard to beat the patio on a nice evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN3JzsC54rWVsAE&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2025-5-20"},{"Name":"Hans Foto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKrWUglxmq8PM7F2Zh-1NdTZRH9yn3lvLesG2RLYwZ6TX3izc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic small satellite tasting room of a great San Diego Brewery. Their beers never disappoint, and their bar tenders are always friendly. 100% recommend stopping here if you are in Old Town.

If you love clean Belgian beers, this is a great brewery to stop at. "The Widow" Belgian Dark and "The Madam" Belgian Golden are exemplary. You can't go wrong with any of their beer regardless of style preferences.

Parking can be a bit challenging when it's busy, but there is plenty of parking around, just a short walk away on a nearby street. Lots of food in the area if you want to hit up a brewery and go out to dinner afterward.

By far one of the most unique and upscale brewery experiences in the San Diego area.  The staff is exceptionally welcome and insightful as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCon77adA&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"Joseph Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpvQthszk6GFDrvkYdTMvHwL28_nRIk1Hdv6asJDs59OGpix0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would come here a 1000x when I visit San Diego.
They're in Old Town, but away from the hustle and bustle. Their Madam is one of the best  Belgian's I've ever had.
Staff was knowledgeable and nice. Definitely gonna grab some swag before I leave, and log my beers in Untappd. Want to keep this place near the top of my brewery list.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJC5zLCUyZi5JQ&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2025-6-1"},{"Name":"Adrian Montfort","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoGLA__-EZ5gt9bdgni1hIMhZeXZriC0ec0s66Ze2Tlj62ojxj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A small but welcoming satellite taproom of this classic San Diego brewery. The beers are great and they do have some small batch seasonal stuff that is definitely worth trying. A word of caution, it shares an outdoor space with the cigar lounge next-door, so if you are not amicable to cigar smoke, pick a table inside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7mZuGsAE&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2024-8-25"},{"Name":"Ian Ashworth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWk3njdDl_6aTdQvtHbL72yNHLOuAjO9s6OtWRBhCXXSNPKjFEOdw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute brewery in a charming building, nice location, and with a beautiful patio. Good, if not as expensive beer collection as some other places (e.g. Pure Project), but the selection we tried were all great. A very nice way to while away an afternoon playing their games and enjoying the cool breeze. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Perry Harrell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKOOjiz3w4xFukydPjHBum86aq04Q8nF4sTgMAqNKFKhzKxGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the quick stop I made here after visiting Old Town. The bartender was super friendly and the beer was fantastic. I was able to  have the Pupil IPA a couple other places in town but thankful to have had it here to know what not to miss around town!

The Pupil is their flagship IPA and it's super tropical and very clean. No malty mess here!

There's a nice patio outside and indoor seating as well. One note is there's a cigar bar across the patio so that whafted over while I was outside. Not my favorite smell so if it offends plan to sit inside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChvtLiVg&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2023-2-14"},{"Name":"John Abaddon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8fqHt_RXgmRoLZNb91Z54UE8cuzIlNq0fwqIlz2gqtwYF7fH4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This has been the first time I've been here, and it's been slow. It's still a great place, and the staff is always very kind. Beer is above par with the bonus of a kick back environment. You can come just for the beers or explore old town, grab some grub, and come enjoy their great beer with your scavenged food from somewhere else.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDxhpb5Dg&fid=0x0:0x2f808feb5a1687e5"],"When":"2023-6-6"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"chad zerbe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcTz7OwHq_XrOsdrfZSKcGq3uLAZKhS_m-HBwSp2GCgYc3tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great local sports bar. Great vibes at Home and Away. There is indoor and outdoor seating. There is a huge outdoor screen and TV's everywhere. We had a smash burger, chicken strips and carne asada sandwich. There were no complaints with the food. The smash burger was fantastic. The meals come with fries or tater tots and of course we all got tater tots. It was a great place to watch sports and tonight it was the NFL Thursday night game. The service was walk up and order from the bar, not much staff walking around checking on tables. If I lived in the area, it would be a place I would visit to watch sporting events and enjoy some good bar eats.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_Q6mM_MznUAG2J_MHbG83\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Carlos Caro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWc4iYVaLtafIqSWNH6Wke6HPwvh8FqxPEfyZbUulYHIIGN-MA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These are not just your average wings! Phenomenal and in my humble opinion the best in San Diego. Honorable mention to the smash burger, so good. One thing to know about this place though, extremely loud. The TVs speakers are blasting inside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQRdLOP1L5933ms6R7xbta\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Julie Goggins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOHe2WBcGAsMaA4TRqwwzM46ss6U12sE9tjf3I7coM-y3XXS5ypg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great spot for happy hour! Love watching any and all games here with the big screen outside, perfect for San Diego weather. Beer selection is great, cocktails are delicious, with typical bar food. Vegan salad on the menu and some vegetarian options but I pretty much go for the drinks. Vibe and atmosphere are fun, and staff are always friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD36saLVFfvy8BDGGKAcBKn\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Benjamin Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV5-8qnOj4bsOcXGkbY-W1UjYinuTOTE9Cupb7wgGQ6woyijo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for Thursday night football with the boys. I had the Tachos and they went with burgers. Really enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere and going up to the bar to order. Also there’s no shortage of screens, so everyone has a viewing angle to watch the game. Their outside area was great, especially in the fall when the weather is still warm. Food came out quick and was tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCJMt2Ykx_UWzFsK1VTutPQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Colleen Hanes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpQbIuIHpsaIFKZq7cogK69-YCYrgk_8LJBGmirNZEEYcvP4E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent service! Best tots I've ever had. Blackened shrimp taco was my favorite I didn't care for the pork one it was too smoky. The grilled cheese was okay. It was a great way to try it during happy hour!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tino Tolentino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULsGlmylI3vxzseBRqzf3APCo7GPXzrIL28trdd1L2122yXibC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The best wings in town, a cold beer for every taste, and staff that makes you feel like a regular. A perfect sports bar experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD74TkBzjJEz1Sp5BAhLpKv\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Mark A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOccFpyEsZlySAssa53lycj1tnYIqEYwCThHYFqyOIGQXV4CNK=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great beer selection, awesome food and sitting outside under the starts watching a large screen video screen made it so fun. Even taking music with the bartender/server was great!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBH8vb_3GlM2q_dBRLLYCsO\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Mandy Lynn Decker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnCoedL_JDa6a1Pn92-u7BdnUOey8VFfHsQ9qS1UQNRhAuD8c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went on a Wednesday night so it wasn't crowded. Had a great atmosphere. Loved the outdoor seating and being able to watch the game on that big screen. Staff was great! Order drinks and food at the bar and self seating. Ordering was easy and fast. We tried a few of their drinks and were all good but the gold rush was fantastic. I had the Spicy surf and turf burrito and it was hands down the best burrito to ever cross my lips!! I definitely recommend a visit!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDLlve4WA\u0026fid=0x0:0x48fe6397280186ff"],"When":"2024-6-27"}]

[{"Name":"Gerald Barksdale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQLxhjcPTCp3Lsdx4DfutjqwqIMPuzifEZ2a__0ntNgLn6azDs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cleanest dive bar I've ever seen!  Fifteen years in San Diego and never made it over here.  That will change when I'm in town going forward.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacklyn Ramires","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO2VniydowId2f8fNZoqh5he55mVOWU_kqrfRKAigCAHr87Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Would rate a 0 if I could.
Never EVER coming back to this bar.
I have no idea what is going on with this location. One person in our group walked in with coffee and maybe we missed a sign saying no outside drinks which I could understand but the reaction was unbelievable.
One of the employees totally flipped out, chased us out and told us to never come back. We tried to explain that it was cold brew but the person stood at the door while mumbling something and told us not to come back. INSANE.
Honestly seemed like he was under some kind of mental distress or on drugs. It was the weirdest thing I have ever experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kyle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJivHQA1Sb98lCgR39FoY6_YsysJgB2Dd3qhXRdipQCKNWzbQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Female bartender kicked our friend out after he gave his military ID for his initial ID check. She claimed “the commander of California” required civilian ID, when she was questioned what she was referring to she got pissed. Next our friend gave his civilian ID as additional confirmation of age and was kicked out for “arguing”","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mar Due","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHsHJEoMCiTkIFufyF7aQj8DSNxprwiWTU57v4gulakYh9ESdH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I really wanted to like this place and with baseball playoffs happening wanted to watch the brewers vs cubs game. I walked in & all eight TVs only showed the toronto game. When I asked the bartender to change at least one TV to this game, she refused. WOW..
Lost my business. Too bad, because I really wanted to make this one of my go to dive bars and now that wont be happening.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Devine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQZS2w-NRYtEukXbtfg48BT5GLieWH411pMeKekN27f-kUEw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Incredibly bizarre experience with an extremely passive aggressive staff member in his late 40s with a beard and glasses. That man has mental health problems and shouldn't be serving the public. Avoid this place if you're visiting the area","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"FLASTI tv","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6SOXWtfPZ4PwbXvffggUrkLCSnN56Zenyhy9s1x2UM5kYxrI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Located at 2850 S Casino Drive, just south of Harrah’s Laughlin, Old Town Saloon offers a nostalgic dive bar experience with a touch of the Old West. The saloon's entrance features horse-drawn wagons and a replica mining derrick, setting the tone for its rustic charm .

Inside, patrons can enjoy a variety of activities, including pool tables, darts, and video poker machines. The saloon also boasts a 700-square-foot dance floor, offering free line dancing lessons on Tuesdays and Wednesdays, and live country music on weekends .

The menu features classic bar fare, with favorites like the BBQ Pork Sandwich, Cowboy Burger, and Jalapeno Poppers. Portions are generous, and prices are reasonable, making it a great spot for casual dining while enjoying the entertainment .

For sports enthusiasts, the saloon provides multiple LCD TVs to catch the latest games. Additionally, they offer free drinks to players on the gaming machines, adding to the value .

Whether you're a local or just passing through, Old Town Saloon offers a welcoming atmosphere, friendly service, and a taste of the Wild West.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Martin Mortensen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfQ99JsWITw45cqQClobPLYtIHBEHd7O8ugZ13KAlO9o6INw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Bartender was really rude and would only accept a passport as ID, despite me having my drivers license ready to show. I don’t carry my passport around outside the airport","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samantha Cahn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyrvLtVsBLBlx60BuK3gNo8K05JQMMuDu6GSuL_2--MW60CymT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Owner (Vince? sorry, horrible with names) was our bartender, and he was extremely engaging. He chatted with my husband and I about SD and mutual interests. The drinks and service were fantastic! We will definitely go back on our next trip! 💯 Thanks for helping make our anniversary special!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Yesenia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6EUiJjkxDod6Tt3MVht6dZecFxZm65xxi_NNeCrqscdXYoybWYw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My boyfriend and I really enjoyed our dinner. The staff was very friendly! Outside seating was nice! They even sang happy birthday to a guest which was very sweet!!

The food was great! We got the following:
Irish Coffee - very strong
Surf and Turf as a Wet Burrito - 10/10
Tampiquena - 8/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBy2Uk7ymw00N4WA7zxhYmi&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Louise Sattler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXO1gknpVj-u0bbdV_4LEtOoQSKEqzMUS68xpEYSN4p72bhbqm5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A very lovely outdoor/indoor restaurant with easy access for people who have strollers or wheelchairs.  I enjoyed a lovely trio of chicken tacos.  The chips were standard fare. The location was excellent- in the heart of San Diego's Old Town.  The server was cordial, helpful, and very efficient!

I will be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBD0Msrnzo_gHcnNTY-4Y1Y&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Emma Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIco8ysfLkrPJhiXNFmNXB9OtSkBPqMMF9t_7et2wXVVblixNBDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I don’t recommend it, pricy and the food was lacking. It’s in the bustling part of Old Town, but did little to maintain my wonderment of the traditional food celebrated there.

It took 30 minutes for my food to arrive which I got the 3 different tacos to try from . The chicken was dry, the beef was dry and salty, the pork was okay but seems to have the only flavor in the entire dish. No toppings, I was hoping for lime or something to add to it, but maybe that’s just my expectation. The churro ice cream was good though, that did have a lot there and I enjoyed it while waiting for the rest of my meal

It seemed understaffed and so we were sure not to rush our servers but tables were left unattended and we watched as servers run around. They were kind and deserve patience as they deal with all the tourist.

But for the price we were paying I would expect more presentation and more quality to the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIC8i-fBg7Oi3QE&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2025-6-16"},{"Name":"Josh’s Lats","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9kouPQ3dXBT_LUDWyKSGvUM70mIEf4Mqbn9h9rT3ghVDO_C0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Joel was amazing, and the food was outstanding especially the chips, salsa, and carne asada. What truly made the evening special was Joel’s exceptional service. Even though it was close to closing time, he kindly lit the fire for us and patiently took care of all our needs. Thank you, Joel, for such a great experience. We’ll definitely be back the next time we’re in Old Town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDk-KL7X3XUDrBVkimHXD8p&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"elham parsaei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCSF57U8HHPgMwfHsteAtwdFXFTG2mvGscg7Px916v87nESa0u=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The band was absolutely fantastic!! 🎷🎤🎶
Casa de Maria’s margarita 🍸was the cherry on top, refreshing and perfectly balanced.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpJgiKaft4opFP_XbmUmhD&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Paweł Piwosz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtavOGczUqGHdGjRN4_wzqO7rFUsl6SdFMndbAfQ4P1Rb8eA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really enjoyed the time spent there. Tacos were awesome, margarita.... yes, I checked other comments and I have to say, that it was one of the best margarita I ever had. Live music, or semi-live, I should say, was really nice. Everyone around very helpful and nice. Personally, I recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTpOvJbQ&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2024-5-22"},{"Name":"jennifer berge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFRCGKlThF_twcmziQyBI88hD4ETBGKjL1NTOzvgVygGRo2Gdx=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped by yesterday to eat here, it was our very first time visiting San Diego it was a great experience! Our server was Olivia she was amazing , very quick and very helpful she was so friendly and gave amazing customer service! I would definitely recommend this place the food was delicious :) we will be back again !","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_kPKlZQ&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2025-1-20"},{"Name":"Ivette Duran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL09hZnR6JPr2Tcu0SdTbo20DZw3GvWsYh9nr3GDuAeRzqGvpTl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First time coming here and I don’t think I will come here to dine again. Unfortunately, was not a good time and evening to visit… at least that’s what I’d like to think.

Customer service:
There appeared to be one server (he was the only one we saw that was attending the customers). It took a while for him to get to everyone. There was a 4% surcharge to which we asked what was that charge for and our server couldn’t explain exactly why.
The unattended tables had used dishes and as we and other customers came in we couldn’t find a clean table where to seat. I want to think that there were not enough employees, but it does not make it appealing or welcoming.

Food:
There was no more chips and salsa.
Tampiqueña: Overall good, except the meat’s seasoning was not of my liking.
Combination 3 (Chile relleno, red enchilada, rice and beans. It was okay.
But what can you expect from a watered down “mexican” restaurant.
Flavor and spicy we’re definitely missing.

Drinks:
We asked for a Pina colada and margarita, and well, there was not a minimum taste of the rum or tequila.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICf7PuUFQ&fid=0x0:0x659625b544389d02"],"When":"2024-12-26"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tran Tr (antigonewii)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwAomOVKEd8DRmYzyltPwwehvxnmy-v5Fvc53L_pN47z-xpaE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect Quick Snack Stop – Street-Style Mexican!

This tiny spot (less than 10 seats!) is perfect when you’re craving something quick, flavorful, and satisfying. I stopped by for a snack and ended up blown away by how good everything tasted. It’s exactly what you’d hope for in street-style Mexican — fresh, bold flavors, no fuss.

Just like the other reviews say, the food here is consistently great. You can grab a quick bite, enjoy it on the spot, and keep going with your day. I only had room to try a couple of things this time, but I already want to come back and work my way through the whole menu. If my stomach wasn’t full, I’d still be eating!

Definitely a must-try if you’re nearby. Don’t expect fancy — just seriously good food in a small, no-frills setup.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPORqe2rmOfrYQ&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2025-5-16"},{"Name":"jackie ramos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJx9ynFjgA9GmG2OSu6xhX3hpjoPAkNQzWdrmNc4ugyJDVp9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you haven't been to this place you are missing out. I had the chicken Chipotle torta, it was bomb! My husband had the vegetarian torta, he said the best part was that it didn't feel like it was an after thought. Him and my daughter both shared that meal. My son had a quesadilla, he of course loved it because who doesn't love quesadillas. And the drinks were delicious. Great food and great service definitely makes me want to go back and try other food.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Arnaud Desies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVLZDJRt69rX-lmxkM5A8k2ggLqZa7fIWWpzBkaj4UHq7pb6vb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located in an area where they could easily charge outrageous prices for basic food, this oasis is the perfect spot for a quick and affordable lunch while still providing tasty and original recipes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLrG05Gvs1S7mzqJiv5B4A&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2025-8-28"},{"Name":"Roger Sofar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-tpWDRKb9u3wEnWIbSurYgGspzR-hPn2H1Kmu7EzTLZ8fq48=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away from the big crowds, this cosy and friendly spot was a great find. I had the chicken torta: tasty meat, fresh veggies, and just the right kick of spiciness. Really satisfying overall!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWK5L-Ex2oI7v1wY_z6kvH&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2025-7-21"},{"Name":"angelica baez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL896ok9b9pbPX8oIfMgz1yAnHlQZ29j-BAtuz3a7LEhixDdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cute little spot in old San Diego, great presentation, good music and fast service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuDHt3ZDrA95s1SKhYw43c&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Shiva Daryani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvzTThrBuqP0jBGMV_blNltYAki1uFZgA60RRi00rdQqfn5qo_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got one chicken and one lomo(pork) tortas. They were yummy and very filling. Size was gigantic. One could be enough for two of us. Also they were cut in half already. I recommend you to order one for two ppl unless you are really starving.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID3ss2z_AE&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2024-11-13"},{"Name":"Art McConneha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVuBgMQV2gzi0cWbV_zphftukpEQx63lmcv9ja6_RI0zdzYaOT38w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small hole in the wall making amazing food!! The Fresca was amazing. Tried the pineapple and Jamaican… both so fresh tasting. Jamaican was made from fresh hibiscus flowers.

Ordered a Mexican Hotdog and Torta.. both were amazing. The staff are so nice and the prices are fair. Don’t miss out, try this place today if you want a hotdog, torts, quesadilla tostado or nachos!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICToJ72yQE&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2024-5-9"},{"Name":"Rick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLe8iViNnpr2-DhZufej0JvrJv9OFCluxcAF7wXNSoSY_4tj07f=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great family run place for a quick lunch. Staff was very friendly and the food was awesome for the price. I got the large watermelon water and the shrimp/mango ceviche torta for $12. Has a small shaded place to sit in front (limited to ~5 seats), with mobile orders possible.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICukMqHYQ&fid=0x0:0xd8e00a054c2719a6"],"When":"2022-7-19"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Tom Keller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXs0X1_rW71dthSNPwxubcNSAHPG-KYiYwqIareftxASSg6UK_R=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chips, salsa and white sauce. End of the review 🤣

But seriously everything on the menu is fantastic.  Over the years I've had pretty much every single item on the menu and haven't ever been disappointed.

So here's what I suggest you do: eat as many chips and white sauce as you can, have a margarita or similar, order what you'll want to eat for your next meal, have a bit because it's sooooooooooooo good, then boom leftovers as a fantastic next meal.

If you're at the Old Town location it's perfect to walk off the full belly.

Margaritas are great.  Service is phenomenal and the atmosphere is one of a kind.

Oh and pro tip, the appetizers are enough to share.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCX7sA8To7y31zIHFuFR4D0&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Richard Wilborn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUuX5FtAGPbLpb-wN43_QgTUBSGYd5UJ2tML5x9rgTGgjhyY0G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were in SD for two days and ate here twice. We cant say enough good things about Miguel's. The staff were friendly, helpful and attentive! The atmosphere, inside or outside was just perfect. The food and drinks...well, simply great!!! If you dont visit Miguel's when you come to SD, then you have missed out.  A big plus, its located in the middle of Old Town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIdh3GAU0vyrr5MRnDoASx&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Devin Holmes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTa_aTgcONrMjEf20Nu9XVzl8anTefH5kBIM0yoPQYmFks9-bE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been coming here for years  and will keep coming back.  I had the tres tacos this time, the wife had the grande tostada.  When our server brought it out my wife exclaimed, oh my!  Yes it was big.  More importantly it was so good, all of it.  I always get the lemon press.  For dessert we topped it off wife the deep fried ice cream, the wife approved.  I've been here all different times, midweek, weekends, day and night.  Always good food.  Thank you for making our anniversary a great time to remember.  We'll be back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAWJe-Bd5NEVqL0z8sraOR&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Rox S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMaWIBRkSXnJsTgaTXH2LyhqmFwi09LWJDVJTEY9GehIbMahn1mw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been going to Miguel's for the last 4-5 years and I've never had any issues with the food or service. Recently I went to have early dinner and ordered the chicken fajitas and the season or marinade was spicy for my liking. Our waiter Chris went above and beyond and offered to bring me a new plate with no spicy marinade. He ensured everything was okay and came by often to check how we were doing. Thank you Chris for taking care of us!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDqUSM6FV1th-3pVeAeWQry&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Tiera DPhoto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXo5LcgG8bQV7H1fSm_nxUe78uW1uW0lfvBE4nENDDptQJf4RU1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great happy hour specials. Drinks were so tasty and made with fresh ingredients. The steak fajitas were the best I've ever had. The steak and veggies were seasoned and grilled to perfection. Dip and guacamole was also delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABnxY7jK9MFHF0JYJZ743Q&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Randy Hilarski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEoePu6TaxATte62zmE5GU6rOzn80ckgM6ZJlPokxNG5Vf2N4r8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is located in Old San Diego. The area was very touristy. We took a nice long walk around the are after eating. The staff were very nice and prompt. The food came out super fast. The chicken nachos were everything I expected. I ordered the swordfish tacos. I really liked the spices that were added.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANXVoglyfRWH7WerPazWRy&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"I'm Yore Huckleberry!","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5AuG7TINaKUTTPUPz12jVz0DrxMHcq6YjFQo2M_9m4TgUvgDb=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We have eaten here twice, a year apart. The chips and salsa come free with a queso cheese dip that is really special! My wife adores it. Serving sizes are large. As with most Mexican restaurants, it is easy to find something gluten-free.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSWeU_AWlrmkMtTjvTZ7NQ&fid=0x0:0xbacadb28e1d9114e"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Renee Strain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXs61_GaQ7O6xnNl3tE3LDXqHHQNJLlKe3gg2ZM8ab5NUcr4R_e=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was recommended by my hotel and by a shopkeeper. It was late, I was exhausted and starving. The friendly host seated me immediately and made sure I had an outdoor table that was under a heater since I said I was cold. The waiter came promptly and took my order. I ordered a skinny margarita and the sopa de albondigas. Fresh chips, queso and salsa were promptly delivered with my margarita. There was great ambiance and every staff member was professional and friendly. My soup came within minutes and it was the perfect temperature, comforting and delicious. Next time I'm in San Diego I hope to try other items on their menu.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"AG","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPVxhCw5FbEDmcdY5UkzZTUjM9dd9LDP0CNSaCpJeDynrnSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been to Old Town San Diego countless times, but this time I happened to find street parking right in front of this restaurant and decided to give it a try. What a pleasant surprise.

The Mexican vibe here is spot on—lively atmosphere, authentic décor, and even a live band performing while we dined. We ordered several of their signature dishes, and every one of them was excellent, full of flavor and clearly made with care.

Honestly, it’s far better than that well-known “internet-famous” restaurant in Old Town. Less hype, more substance. Definitely a place I’d come back to and happily recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBRLd4RlKNkvv4PpxvedWns&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Marcus Lopez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxd9W4XxmmzLXfIqOJZkxwQzr7x3EpxtQA8Oj5SyqmdkrTsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place has excellent food. Im not sure I would believe the 3.2 review rating. The service and food was outstanding.
Food was as good as any Mexican food in old town, San Diego. Plus A band was playing on the Sunday. We were here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBewP3dY1HUijLrpxoFVmIs&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Komomo Meow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUBac6g9TPjgUPmjHznyhDhWZJHzPLFd8KEewdlKI9ZejN6MZaX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Totally Agree with the other reviews….
This is the heart of old town SD, but the food probably is worst than street taco places….

We ordered the hornades, the potato way too salty, the meat…gosh, too dry to bite…and I don’t want to complaint about the tortilla anymore, taste like the same factory supplies for taco bell …

I mean the services are really nice, I’d like to give full 5 stars for the services, but 1 or 0 star for the food, unfortunately.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBmHCq9uW_oAPimGypbEZRO&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"E M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2JOFOrA8Q_Nb3TCZmHWC5DNT_1DyMj2V1WRS5NEMTUNVhlg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a disappointing experience at this bar. There were several bartenders standing around, but when we asked one of them for a refill, he just stared at us blankly and walked away. Confused, we politely asked another bartender if there was an issue, because we didn’t want to come off as confrontational, we were just trying to understand what was happening. She ended up making our drinks, but when we closed our tab, the original bartender went over and whispered to her, which felt really suspicious. It gave the impression that something shady might happen with our tab. Overall, the vibe was uncomfortable, and it felt like we were being set up for a possible scam.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCArSbW-pyNl_lnPj_t9fCc&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Jennifer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrNDMqXHuH_OxWHEO3fvq0_t9Ug1vEMm7jA55d9dOB7PJDqvZ1Ug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went before 9pm and was seated quickly. Our waitress was wonderful. She was friendly and attentive. I ordered the carnitas plate. It was tender and seasoned well. The beans was alright, it was a little on the thick side. The candy shot flight was 6 for $50, which was really good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEIaZvIy6_KnlHQ&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2025-5-7"},{"Name":"Carlos Ramirez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI96fIwJEQWno7Wj1_l4TcG_afqOLjkAWzzj90TY5JEEw4-hA5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This is an eatery in the heart of San Diego’s historic old town. Any food establishment here has the difficulty of managing massive swings of customers throughout the tourist season and the regular season for locals. I don’t know the history of this eatery, but I can tell you from my experience yesterday, it does not serve the market with distinction. The food is on par with what one can find at a street taco shop. The only distinguishing factors is they serve it on a nice plate.
We ordered two relatively simple dishes, and they came out very slowly due to an obvious shortness of staff. The servers were very kind, wonderful young ladies who are doing their absolute best to take care of customers. In Old Town, the Mexican food available should be reflective of the hundreds of years of culture and should stand out from other local eateries. Unfortunately, tourist may not know the difference between really good Mexican food and what was served here last night. The food was flavorless and in very small quantities. The guacamole was not freshly made it tasted store bought with more lemon/lime juice than a margarita. The chips were not impressive and were mostly broken pieces. The vegetarian burrito was thrown together with a previously cooked tortilla, stuffed with bell peppers and covered in sauce. The image and the description in the menu mentioned vegetables, not simply peppers. This eatery seems to be far more focused on a place to drink rather than a Spanish culinary experience. For the money $80 I could have fed a family of six buying at a taco shop and received far better food. I do not recommend this eatery.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnp62EjAE&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2024-9-30"},{"Name":"Bill Serna-Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnX5w2BY4-rriQt31r1FGffEQetu4l64I5J5ZtYyQbXuEAclY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’m sitting here so frustrated and then I look at all these reviews and wish I had read them before. Bad…real bad. No service at all as I am waiting here still to pay my bill and it’s been 20 minutes. The food came fast but was not good at all. Huevos Rancheros and enchiladas all had no flavor. Never saw the server and had to waive him down just to get a refill. For the location, this should be packed and hopping but it sure is a disappointment for Old Town San Diego. There are other restaurants right around to try before.

I type slow and  am still waiting.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jacqueline Burnett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtk4XDr4f-P_4D97iGwzpX38LWyIX0dYtqsWUHfZVWZlrTUma5cg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I got food poisoned, don't order shrimp at all!!!

I recently dined at Mama Antonio's in Old Town San Diego and, unfortunately, had a disappointing experience. Although the service staff was kind, they were not very efficient. I had to repeatedly ask for basic items like napkins, sauces, salt, and pepper.

The food itself raised several concerns. The shrimp tasted off, leading me to worry about its freshness. The overall taste of the dishes seemed old, and the quality was definitely not worth the cost. Even my cocktail had a strange flavor.

Given the abundance of quality eateries in the area, I wouldn't recommend Mama Antonio's. It's a shame because the staff is nice, but the service and food quality need significant improvements.

This is a picture of the food we couldn't eat as it was just nasty!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLtfn9Ow&fid=0x0:0x54b062e163f49ba1"],"When":"2024-6-22"}]
