[{"Name":"Bill Lin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0XyH-q_JwBgACLqRhDjud-pbC93ISu15YKfhNAzPNY2iLbnTvXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Old Town San Diego does a good job preserving all the historical Mexican sites all in one location, such a enjoyable and meaningful 1 hour walk type of place.

Love La Casa De Machado Y Silvas, Racine & Laramie Cigars, and La Casa De Estusillo these 3 sites the most.

La Casa De Machado Y Silvas is the very first commercial restaurant in San Diego; Racine & Laramie sold all the antique pipes (you can still smoke cigars here); and La Casa De Estusillo is the most luxury architecture in this area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSkRJoIDbff3pm6-89q_Ls&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Warfel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOzJooC_lctzoJnqTz4I44Zd1E4QeLBtKk1WCkzuJHIMBDwi08lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"CLASSIC STATE PARK w/ LOVELY ARCHITECTURE! I visit Old Town very often, it's a comfort destination that is close to my heart. From the authentic eateries to shopping centers to the park, every inch of Old Town has a special treat. It's a mellow zone with activities for people of all ages.

I can tell you, Old Town is a not just a tourist destination, locals hold it dear! The food, architecture, shops, and community-based culture are prevalent features. There's always something going on at the park.

My recommendation? Visit Fiesta De Reyes, Casa De Maria, and El Coyote if you’re looking for a bite! Also check out the Mexican Hot Chocolate inside Fiesta De Reyes. Next, I’d take a stroll the park area and take in the sights. Finally, hit up the stores and visitor center. The staff are AWESOME.

Old Town has several restrooms scattered across the general radius. Some require a token, others do not. If you're eating at a specific restaurant they can assist you with the tokens!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAO3SInjb_-11TK5jB2NCkJ&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Soumyaroop Nandi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAueO6s9dvkPKfUy7AJlA4TxCikink7VWTyD_8U_RwdqsoWnsEBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Vibrant, Historic, and Full of Character!

Old Town San Diego is such a lively and charming place to explore! The area is filled with beautifully preserved historic buildings that give a real sense of San Diego’s past. There are several free museums scattered throughout, each offering a glimpse into the city’s early days—perfect for history lovers or anyone curious to learn more.

The streets are always buzzing with energy, with tons of authentic Mexican restaurants, colorful roadside shops, and vendors selling handmade crafts and souvenirs. It’s a great spot to stroll around, grab delicious food, and soak in the festive atmosphere. A must-visit destination for both tourists and locals! 🌮🎶🌵","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBLmwkmM-dtmqMEPHBxMRgz&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Gina Hodge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6iqFkZirsLF6IeIENlYhYDU6_XBm4dLzgFqCBCSfaizDWX9Ni=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Depending on the time of day it mind be tricky to find parking. It was our first time to Old town. We did a lot of exploring. The historic park was open and free. Lovely to walk around and take a journey back in time.

Each season brings different festivities!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgO0l24-NIfegzhSf3A7sT&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"77paulino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3Rlp0r30u5chkivl9eaSS3_QXToktj4gfS-c1ljtFpvwEKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a must-see if you are visiting San Diego (if you live in San Diego, then this has got to be at the top of your list to come see and enjoy whenever you get a chance). This historic site feels like stepping back in time; it is full of shops, restaurants a beautiful park and live music. Free parking can be a bit difficult to find; however, there are paid parking lots nearby","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0_OtJK0Yr9UYKa1isnr2y&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-11-28"},{"Name":"Yinzú Nairouz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-zGISgc1E3akNR56FwW0ntxEpBHMfhl1IWDYHX1zoPM--3Fg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town San Diego State Historic Park is a MUST-VISIT! 😍 Saturday vibes were perfect, loved the live music, strolling through history, vist and learn in all buildings, enjoy the traditional stores, and soaking up the old-town charm. Perfect spot for history buffs, foodies, and anyone wanting a taste of California's roots. We went by public transportation and it was just 2 blocks away. It is a big area and everything is accessible for wheelchairs for example.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA4F6ti9As6j3Aq5cuMgY2G&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Josh Moyes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEC2cq3fJP99F-GWIvOiTky5SuenbFJQQSoIaLFTZKWYSUVq889A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town is a great place to visit. It’s like a living museum with fantastic Mexican food all around. I’m not sure what could be better?! It’s walkable and family friendly. There’s a trolley stop next to it along with decent parking. Some of the buildings are open with static displays showing the history of San Diego. There are Park Rangers and an information office in case you have any questions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAB27tl0ofnXc_6AkM6PN_F&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Craig Bellavance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxzwfsT0lh2U44xoaGIuQDB8tgzVNv7q0uunZITdQhjCiVIxjesA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This State Historic Park is one of the few in the California State Park system with free admission—and free parking, too.  Visitors can explore historic buildings filled with period furnishings, enjoy authentic Mexican restaurants, and browse dozens of colorful souvenir shops.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBeaG5iy9XUkdP75X_891wz&fid=0x0:0x5e830c04f3dd75b9"],"When":"2025-10-30"}]

[{"Name":"Autumn Hagen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpbtkj_37gGy6MFL1oCIroVGdUqGZfPg2nDUyVyufy56PEVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went down to get supper around 8pm. There was only 1 waiter working but he did great. Super friendly and attentive. Food was custom designed by the in house chef and it was delicious. We got the pan seared tajin salmon ($29) and the grilled marinated flat iron steak ($34). Both came with veggies and potatoes. We also ordered desserts to go to take up to our room and they provided silverware and napkins.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj3vT4FA&fid=0x0:0xd6044429ba1b163"],"When":"2024-4-22"},{"Name":"Brian Morgan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmBpGB3ScaE4AZ9tInTXW-ygTketYyI2I4rwvCVnc71UmT4H1H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Verde Kitchen and Bar is located inside the Hilton Garden Inn. They offer a variety of breakfast options in the morning and a good    menu for small meals in the evening. The bar is full service but has limited options for mixed drinks or beer varieties after 5:00pm. It's a good place to grab something to eat or pick up a drink to take to the room before 10:00pm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC-qpCejQE&fid=0x0:0xd6044429ba1b163"],"When":"2022-11-1"},{"Name":"Will","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZgQ-F7km035BzryuQum26YfXKmSuoZP3t4RghKuxCipov=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food for a hotel. Been too this hotel a few times. Friendly service usually too","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBucxMk0l1XvF_YLS7rf2da&fid=0x0:0xd6044429ba1b163"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Eight Point Six","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUF0zRfu9Dn7M67jU1bsQd1Yol-WX6vSF_9SfpocnE9tGJ3aQo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Do not order coffee with your breakfast here!!!

The servers filled our cups from the complementary coffee made for hotel guests in the lobby then charged us $4 for the coffee.

Not only is this coffee free to hotel guests, the hotel bars/restaurant staff drained the coffee station, making it useless for guests not eating.

Was reported to hotel desk staff who said they don’t all the time and because the restaurant is separate from the hotel, they can’t do anything about it. Ridiculous.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marian Co","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLp8bxh_KLo-YgreQZ18EPmX2-DZ1olgZ1-ArYqVktdk_YFZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I never thought I’d give a hotel restaurant 5 stars for a meal but omg was this omelet incredible. Highly recommended, they home make their salsa, and my server was right when she said it was delicious. I liked that the serving was large but not so massive. A bit pricey but the convenience and the taste were worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICRyZOBIQ&fid=0x0:0xd6044429ba1b163"],"When":"2023-4-5"},{"Name":"Jeremy B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVCUfAXnod7x5XpVuyrVv3wdcqUE9OqHlHY64BWf0UAI2h83JzbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I get the flat iron steak every time I'm here and it never disappoints. The service is always excellent.  The quesadillas are also very good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEP-zk82X-9O1Qw&fid=0x0:0xd6044429ba1b163"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Lei Bee-Em","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9AH7xidkLpLxmiEMpA7pvvyLywyMophKsXdPr4xwgpv6jbHY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Nancy  during breakfast was just rude. We were already asked to be seated by another staff but she suddenly came out of nowhere to stop us from going to our table and told us to wait to be seated. She just got to my nerves. Not much breakfast choices. Hotel is old and not well maintained","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5n3SukOMLtJs4102h3qreE1dlFw5BZo9G399oYVua34ICFWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered dinner at 9 pm as we got into town late. We got the steak and the fish tacos. Both were nicely boxed up for us as we wanted to eat in our room. Both meals were very good. The fish tacos were huge! We also got the chocolate lava cake and the apple pie, both delicious. The bartender who took our order was very friendly.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Jose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3txEEKQ6R4-JKWY2SAhe8wKp6IumAt_N7XzRHPeKe2ngvAg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Regardless of how you feel about the theme, the drinks alone are amazing. Reservations are a must!!! It's not a big place so it's not necessarily a place for massive groups. Sit at the bar and go for dealers choice and the bartender is great at making drinks. Several people around me ordered mocktails and even as she explained them, I was amazed at the complexity and presentation. The menu itself makes me want to order so many. There are some light snacks (only 3 options) so this is more of a drinks and chatting type of place. Be prepared to confess a sin to enter, based off of the seven deadly sins. Take a stroll through the cemetery next door too when you're done, for an extra creepy vibe","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfeGPRMI1CTpZR4NuszaTe&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Jacqueline Saville","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWYLnPjPuhyM_f0IQohnZn_WLiBFKlvE75bP0D_hk-2CHEkg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All of the seasonal drinks and new cocktail menu were delicious especially the Sloth, Pride, and Lust. Bartenders were friendly and great service. Great experience, my fiancé and I always enjoy coming here and will be back soon! Highly recommend, it’s one of our favorite speakeasies in San Diego and it’s always fun coming to Old Town!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_iyG1aQGf3GkTCLKY0JZR&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Stephanie Skeffington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHp2nfCCMoxFb8kNXF1sSgDMDHN75gWuJEqcK-MKsz_Vo14TYa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tahona Bar and Oculto 477 have been a go-to spot for us since we moved to San Diego 5 years ago.  Anytime we’re there, the food is superb, the service is attentive and kind, and it’s always an excellent experience, however the last time we went, we had an immaculate experience that was the epitome of customer service at its finest!   My parents were visiting from out of town so I had made dinner and cocktail reservations, but botched the cocktail reservations (my own fault) and entered the wrong date.  Fast forward to checking in, despite it being totally my bad, they were SO accommodating, and so kind about everything, swapping our dinner and drink reservations around so we could still get the creatively crafted cocktails (which is an awesome vibe in and of itself at the speakeasy), and afterwards do our planned dinner, which was amazing.  We were even treated to a special, limited edition mezcal (they’re known for their extensive list of Agave drinks), the food was, as always, delicious (my favorite is the tuna empanadas which are drool worthy and birria taco).  My parents raved about the whole experience all weekend.  They locally and caringly source their ingredients and clearly put their customers first.  We’ve always loved coming here, make sure we bring any out of town guest here to experience the best the SD food scene has to offer and after this last experience, they will always be our #1.  Thanks for making our day better and our tummies happy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnX3MDj3bXlVplYE7NOTKw&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Christopher Gorrie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvB6Mm4QddVkwZiLVQiMCdaMm8YOBQt0ZNeUWTxTrGs8Pqv0JWdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A fun little speakeasy located within Tahona Bar in Old Town. They play up the whole next-to-graveyard thing by having you confess a sin to a “priest” through a grate at the door.

The bar is small and slightly cramped, but they do make a lot of pretty awesome drinks here. The bartenders also keep it low key and fun. I really enjoyed the Garden of Death. But one of the best things I had here was the drink I received based on a dice roll.

I rolled “rum,” “spicy,” and “tart.” The bartender made me a very interesting, creamy, spicy, and sour rum cocktail, somewhere in the world of an old-fashioned and whiskey sour mash-up.

It’s a bit pricey with each drink being $20, but it’s a whole little experience. A cool place for a date or a hangout. Definitely worth trying out at the very least.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDTs-nRwwE&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2024-5-27"},{"Name":"Brie Manzano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXI0IZAGXMejNGO-aouk-1RSzlcyALIj4eC7pfZy5_fByXNfYy0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oculto was such a unique experience. I would recommend everyone to get "dealers choice " .  The bartender will ask you what notes and spirit you prefer. The ambiance is so cozy and inviting. I do see myself coming back again. Greed and Humility(NA) were very good cocktails.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPlhVgC7V3PM4uy1kprRr2&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2025-6-15"},{"Name":"A. L. Connor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpVDaXd_VPHDSIaHOalvgg0K6OagvpoErLbloF2kaZG4B_XURJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Celebrated my 49th birthday in 2023 with friends and beverages at Oculto 477.
I'd been interested in visiting the venue for a while and took the opportunity for my birthday to do so. I made a reservation because I always make reservations. If I can't I won't go to a place.
When we arrived we were stopped at a confessional style door where we had to confess a sin to enter. If the host didn't approve of your sin you had to come up sign another one. I had to try three apparently I'm not sinful enough. HAHAHAHA
We entered and were sat at a half booth with a small cocktail table and a chair.  The intimate venue was extremely authentic and made me feel as if I was in Mexico or South America. It was lovely!
Our server came over and greeted us. Explained the menu and the seating time. We checked out the menu and were pleasantly surprised to find so many mocktails available and crafted. My mom doesn't drink.
We got our first round of cocktails and we were pretty happy. The presentation for all were great and the flavours were good. Funny enough we all preferred Mom's mocktail the best. I know! It was crisp and refreshing and perfectly crafted.
Round two was also good but yet again the mocktail was mocking us booze drinkers. LOL
Round three, I didn't like my birthday cocktail that the venue bought me but they did change it for my first cocktail which I did enjoy.
I will say if I do go back I will definitely stick with the mocktails just to switch it up. They were just perfect with fresh fruit and juice in every one.
While we did like the venue a lot and the presentation of all of our drinks, I will say the service was lacking. We had two people waiting on us but watched them off to the side and inattentive to our table and others they were handling. Please note the venue is small and was not full on the random Monday we ventured in.
Of all of the speakeasies I've been to this is not high on my list of places. If you go do so for the ambiance and then you won't be disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_54yVXg&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2025-1-19"},{"Name":"Alice M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk5lZ9Pj_N5Aee7vu4jp_HD2luLzQzjDWaDFzodht0udN1r_M9WA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ohhhh you simply MUST stop here!!! Reservations are required in advance and I won't spoil anything, but let's just say the entire experience was an EXPERIENCE. We went here to celebrate our anniversary and were extremely well-taken care of. The bartender was so knowledgeable that there is a drink option that you roll 3 dice and they come up with a cocktail based on those results... on... the... spot!!! I also am a sucker for glassware and they spared NO expense on the presentations of these spirits.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbksWwzQE&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2024-8-3"},{"Name":"My Le","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-o38aNqhmbPRZUZYMfBXJ4xFkgUX4l-cE6T9emtIIZJWEKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Out of all the speakeasy I’ve been to, this would be my least favorite. They have rules you must read and agree to before entering.

Took us two months to get a reservation for 6. We got seated at the booth. It’s really dark inside and one of the rules says you can’t use your camera flash. Instead, there’s a battery operated fake candle light.

Two drink minimum per person. We each got something different and we passed the drinks clockwise for everyone to sample. Therefore, we each sampled 12 drinks. Out of the 12, we agreed on a few favorites and we all have different palate yet we agreed on the same. Two of them were dealers choice where you customize your own.

Envy and Pride were refreshing. Sloth tasted like an espresso martini. Tsumi tasted like the Asian coconut gelatin dessert. Vod sod was the worst out of all.

I’m a light weight and usually drinks at these places hit me quick with a buzz and I’m done on my second. When it doesn’t, it makes me think the quality is not there. I’m not a fan of their drinks, didn’t find their concept unique except for the rules.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELfs8Lrq4ev_ew&fid=0x0:0x8dd4e6ec9c87215b"],"When":"2025-5-16"}]

[{"Name":"Lisa Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNF57RUc6jo8hJhmPJ42AHZywYivh63Xp7AWOuC723JZIIH39s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"After watch Guy Fiats Diners drive in band Dives I was so excited to come here. I drove 2.5 hours and didn’t eat all day. They have a free parking lot and outside seating. There was no wait and the people working were very friendly and helpful. The food was pricey and cold when we got served. The smell of the enchiladas sauce was so bad. The food was totally inedible. The salsa was ok but even the chips were not good. We got a refund and I woke up the next day with the worst case of food poisoning. The bathroom was dirty and smelled and they had flies in the windows flying around see pictures. Ten out of ten 100% do not recommend. Very sad I was so excited to come here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDeOQlVl5pLJvflcurucAw&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Steve Morales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJQfiCFdN2h87KuXawDg-I_hYrG2_PNs7OUrJxv1cILsvRmZm52w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was taco Tuesday , had carne asada , adobada, chicken . The adobada had the most flavor. The asada and the chicken were also good. The Beef Chimichanga plate was very good also , just the right spice and excellent crispy tortilla wrap. 3 different salsa selections . You can pick up crispy chile flavored chips to go . Great spot to enjoy a tasty Mexican Meal .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDGuI4yNUoTKIyN1I2Gj93G&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Zane Manzione","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZtY-SDsPxlMuLe-DBTtQHj17njQb-y4m9Dv3akl_XzYiCjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pretty good food, fresh tortillas and super friendly service. Lots of paid metered parking on the street but it’s possible to find free street parking too. Chips and salsa are delicious. Very affordable too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBN0h1BYy8aaSfRncax3o9y&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Rick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBEVv_62PNKvYbhYZ8fj52fiTdNBF3VKvL8TEoU-7siov7XX9j=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We moved out of the SoCal and came to San Diego for a visit.  We were dying for some quality Mexican food. A friend told us El Indio was the best in San Diego. The food was incredible!  You also need to buy a bag of their homemade chips!! Divine. The staff is friendly, ingredients are fresh, and the food came out of the kitchen at the perfect temperature.  Hot stuff was hot,  cold stuff was cold. We couldn't eat everything as the portions were huge.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBcasF2JNfg0hZgqBQbrtau&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Kirk Degler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyEXgHbnOI0QjKjd7eH8b4hD9GCqvalKY2iWPvdp5pJTCeRyI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was cool! Nice atmosphere with some good outdoor seating. I enjoyed my pork tamales and the soft drink selection available at this place. Staff were understanding of our being new to the restaurant and helped us all place orders that suited our tastes. Thanks!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCN-JNUaDq-9ycOxVFZL8-W&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Barbie Acevez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJfEPWjy51ieqNA9UHXOgopLQTZ0oJWWViJuJr5QQYfqJ-jT-A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Decided to give this place a second chance and that was a mistake. I was the only one next in line and the cashier decided to go on lunch while the other was chatting it up with a customer who paid awhile ago.

I was being lazy this day and decided not cook but after seeing what I was served, I could make better chilaquiles. In fact, if you google what chilaquiles is suppose to look like - you’ll see the difference.

For $18 (including tax) I expect a somewhat decent meal. Instead, it was just all beans, tortilla chips with sauce. Worse part, it wasn’t even that good.

Save yourself the trouble and just go up the street to another Mexican restaurant, this one is just an Over-glorified tourist spot.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBi7M5AAekmw2Zqf20tdEz&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"Cynthia Law","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUywR_eBU3sFlz8hdXPKqZFvQD-j9V-TdZ3wN2G6GFZhJlMboZdtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The El Indio Mexican Restaurant always seems busy whenever we go by it. I had eaten there once before several years ago. I wasn't impressed then. And I'm not very impressed now. Overall, the food was good. I enjoyed the beef machaca plate. I like eggs, the low level of beef in meal was disguised. I dont eat rice so I skipped that part. The beans were tastie. The meal came with steamed tortillas and I selected the corn. They were okay. We ordered a bag of fresh plain chips. All of the precooked chips were seasoned. I'm not a fan of preseason chips. They cooked a small order of the plain chips. And here was the item that I didn't like from our previous visit. Only different. Last time, the chips were heavy, under done, and chewy. This time they were hard. Not crispy. Tough. Hard. Like, becareful you don't crack your crown, hard. We took the leftover chips home, but no one wants to eat them. When we eat at other Mexican restaurants and bring home the chips, they don't last two days. It's been two weeks.  The service was adequate. You order at the register and you pick up your order at the register. It's all self serve. The atmosphere! Since the pandemic,  El Indio created more tables outside, across India Street. And the restaurant installed loud speakers to call out the name attached to the order that can be heard from across the street. And it can rattle your ears from inside the restaurant's dining room. 2 stars for the interior dining. Will we go back? Skip the chips. The other food was good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyNBC_BFKD7GhNPwH1CBvj&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-7-26"},{"Name":"Margarita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWR9l0hGU9uyGxdqCv--_CCroCQgddUESC8vf_FHT9sd_w9c8sVkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Is not what expected, I thought because the restaurant name will be authentic Mexican food , machado with eggs is like tinga with egg, and chorizo with huevos not flavor at all","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_lBhLPkPnnpsuzOjzWhgP&fid=0x0:0xc0385bce5b61a3b"],"When":"2025-12-1"}]

[{"Name":"Chris Aguilar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV--5r9Sgbrme3xhKkTOss9JYwYG1RslmstCzQQzVuNMYlbkJ6wQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"There are so many locations to eat in Old Town. Mexican food is probably the most recurring and there are several locations of note. For this review my description will only be for El Sueño. We arrived after spending time at the Giving Machine in the center of Old Town,  just down the street from the Mormon battalion. The taco place we had predetermined  to visit had closed (who knew 🤷‍♂️) and so we decided on El Sueño. We walked (almost all the restaurants in the area are within  walking distance.
Upon arriving there was a 15 minute wait while our table was set up. We had a party of 10,  so a wait is understandable. We were seated in a nice courtyard near the back and the area was warmed with patio heaters. We decided to stick with just getting tacos for all and ordered 24 if their best, carne asada, Pollo asada, and birria tacos.  There were chips salsa and guacamole for everyone as well. The waitress and her assistant were all friendly and helpful with all we asked for. The food was very good with the corn tortillas made fresh and all the tacos had fresh toppings  and salsa. I would definitely go again if and when I am in the area. While we did not make use of the bar they appeared to have a well stocked one inside along with some inside meal tables.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxySWVKbReGnMvXEK0lgNE&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2025-12-25"},{"Name":"David McClanahan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGUu_9bd63_LjqjuKlrxlQrZw-_MArNzIDiwXIy4RwWoFyhLOr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Sueño is absolutely fantastic. The food was outstanding from start to finish—fresh, flavorful, and clearly prepared with care.

A special thank-you to Olivia, who truly elevated the experience. Her recommendations were spot-on, and her service was warm, attentive, and knowledgeable without being overbearing (a rare and beautiful balance).

If you’re dining in Old Town, this place is a must. Great food, great atmosphere, and exceptional service—thank you again, Olivia!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_c-4H2CkIqWzrB9MnYwG1&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"je55icaLee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWoK3h_anSoShH2bwN2vAYxY32ORC1ZkRPUbAoPRnJdUnIENLbO4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We were excited to try this placing after seeing some posts about it and unfortunately left with the agreement we would never come back.
To start, the table for two was kind of small. The outdoor patio was cute, but the music sounded like you were at a day club (not the vibe you want for a weekday dinner date).
The waitress was attentive and kind. The food was terrible. The chips were stale although the salsas, especially the spicy ones, were good. We started with the calamari which was very underwhelming; something didn't feel right about the seasoning & batter.
My boyfriend got the wagu chorizo burger. There was too much going on (which was ironic next to the basic fries they served with it). I got the Del Mar Enchiladas, and I ended up sending them back. There was no flavor; it was like eating textured oil (because they were so greasy). We decided not to order anything else and picked up something else on the way home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtiE2yTkZkcdkNhb2L4t2x&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Kristen Contreras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVEpZ780NMuXGyJmzJ9iNexi3fuCOexiygCh-LWyC0bhOx9mo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give El Sueño more than 5 stars, I absolutely would! 🌮✨ This is hands-down one of the BEST Mexican restaurants in San Diego. From the moment we walked in, the energy was vibrant, welcoming, and fun. 🤩

Food: Everything we ordered was out of this world. We started with the elotes as an appetizer—they were absolutely bomb: creamy, perfectly seasoned, and full of flavor. I had the tacos, which were cooked to perfection, packed with flavor in every bite. My son’s burrito was huge and absolutely delicious, and my daughter’s chicken quesadillas were incredible—the chicken was tender, flavorful, and she loved them so much she didn’t even want to share! We finished our meal with churros and ice cream, which were warm, crispy, and the perfect sweet ending. Every single bite was amazing. 😋

Service & Atmosphere: The team at El Sueño truly makes this place special. Amberly, the hostess, was unforgettable—her energy was contagious! She welcomed us with the biggest smile, friendly conversation, and such an upbeat, bubbly personality that set the tone for our whole experience. Mailie, our server, was just as amazing—super sweet, thoughtful, and knowledgeable about the menu. She gave us great recommendations and made sure our dining experience was absolutely perfect!!!

Between the incredible food, top-tier service, and the lively atmosphere, El Sueño is a must-visit. I’ll definitely be back every time I’m in San Diego! 🌟","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnxLscVFHTwijUHe2k2ELC&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Sean Collins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWN77Ipr-BUyL9j-YplF8wIsUZqfpo96XBysN5cer6y4LLWoOwG-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We took a chance and wanted something a little bit off the normal path for Old Town. We were very happily surprised and had a great experience. It was not very busy, so I think we got lucky, but everything was great. The drinks were fantastic, probably some of the best margaritas I've had. The food was fresh and tasty, the service was quick and easy, and it was all reasonably priced. I'd say to go for lunch and maybe off hours to get a quieter experience like we had. It's definitely worth stopping in!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQhPXrkAE&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2025-3-8"},{"Name":"Rebekah Cathey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU403S2oz9mva6hSqffMxvvOPbOAdTJqRPJKXzJ1-KPWw7kNmpe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food and drinks. The Cadillac Margarita was a great start to the meal with some chips & salsa. Next we indulged in a delicious grilled octopus with chorizo. My boyfriend and I both got tacos and shared - the shells were excellent and the filling was flavorful. The beans and rice were also good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOWHlN-8q6XaxwE&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2025-6-13"},{"Name":"Matheus Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_ohjSKDtmparVCKmbF8sU6N038WmA43U22rQqRyiBjuGGpw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment I stepped in, Maile completely made my night. I came in after a rough day, but her energy was contagious, warm, upbeat, and genuinely caring. She was incredibly accommodating and immediately started giving me her favorite recommendations from the menu, which all turned out to be spot on.
I started with the chips and salsa (amazing, especially with the variety they bring out), and Maile brought them over with the same bright personality she carried the whole night. For drinks, she recommended a couple margaritas, and the standout was definitely the pineapple coconut margarita, hands down one of the best margaritas I’ve had. It came in a cute little bowl.
For my main dish, I went with the birria tacos, another one of her suggestions, and they were absolutely incredible. Flavorful, tender, and perfectly seasoned — easily a must-try.
What really sets Maile apart is how she balances professionalism with a friendly, genuine vibe. She made me feel welcomed and taken care of, like I was alongtime guest. Her knowledge of the menu and cocktails really elevated the whole experience. The vibe at El Sueño, cozy yet modern, lively yet relaxed. felt even better with her taking care of me.

Overall, thanks to Maile, our night at El Sueño turned into one of those rare experiences where everything just clicks: amazing food, great ambiance, and exceptional service. I HIGHLY recommend asking for Maile when you visit, she’s the kind of server who reminds you why dining out is such a joy.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rene Nuñez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdFjT5ieLCQWJeAqGodHQf4zpICx2pUt_Zr6K5un5eb4SAKVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went around 12 on a Sunday. The food and drinks came out very quick and the customer service was amazing. Authentic flavors at a fair price.  Fernando was our server and did a great job with recommendations and making the experience memorable. Will definitely come back.
Also dog friendly!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzzZSN6wE&fid=0x0:0x21473423b498c293"],"When":"2024-6-11"}]

[{"Name":"siri gowtham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpSfR4CAcufM3lZdva_V07T4Xs9ctg1XIklspkiZMc9oSqWmbm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a beautifully designed space! I absolutely loved the vibe and overall atmosphere,it feels cozy and is a great spot to study, work, or meet up with friends. There’s plenty of seating available. I ordered a latte, which was good. I also tried a bagel with cilantro cream cheese, which just wasn’t for me, probably not the right choice on my part. The staff is incredibly friendly and chatty, and I felt very welcome. I’d definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDgvmoh6KDfAZ7c1zVcK7T0&fid=0x0:0xf0f102b4925243ac"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV13RfsU86IovOZCEM6XA1wQHPZ3Q5-hE34KLkJrVrv_4rYSQH8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite little hidden coffee shop in San Diego.

I love this place! They have all my favorite things: coffee, plants, books, art, character, a homey feel, a tiny thrift shop next door. Tucked away in Old Town this coffee shop is worth a visit. Follow them on social media to find out about the cool events and live music they host.

Their is plenty of seating, the shop is all outdoors and has a very backpary patio cozy feel to it. The coffee is great and love to try their seasonal collection of drinks. The have a little library which I appreciate and plants and cute merch for sale. In addition to coffee they serve tea and pastries.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Savannah Gipson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJtBdvA3DEDmq-v9sqbuPGlyhYJG5gZdyJNF3JD3iBHTuIXIjR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The most beautiful and aesthetic coffee shop I’ve ever had the pleasure of going to! Lauren was an absolute sweetheart after I made a silly mistake of spilling my whole coffee. Staff was very friendly and the coffee was excellent. I had the la Tarraza done hot and my husband had a cold brew, both were really yummy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzPfWk45xP0REHTQGAQ2jl&fid=0x0:0xf0f102b4925243ac"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"Dulce Romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlqru5fv24MMgurhpRCSTnZLTLFLCjo7tjTAhtPTASiFLDPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Worst matcha I have tried in my life, sweet and artificial flavoring. Also, the green tea was the cheapest they could find. I thought it would be a good quality loose tea not the ones they sold at the 99 cents store. Very disappointing. And they’re pricey on top of everything. Such a nice and full of nature place that you would think they would care more about what they put in their drinks. Sad they don’t.  Never again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFCdp5z4MC5XVNIKA9HnVe&fid=0x0:0xf0f102b4925243ac"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Nishad Aherrao","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRdspSyckywt5BqXHIIbv4oQe4LXWDfPRuqcx61fQ0UwZ9gtTM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Love the unique charm and greenery here! The coffee was good and the choice of mugs is a nice personal touch. It gets pretty busy, though, so it’s better for a quick caffeine fix than a long hangout.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ruthie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKutRM6mIrhqRmd-9aQ6BMCPgLQgAUS4f-Wbja7M-PmfEpVn9Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I LOVE Garden Coffee, I've been here 3xs and thee aesthetics are eye pleasing! Unfortunately, the customer service from Baristas have been negative. I have nothing nice to say about the young gals up front. They very quietly take your order and if you ask about their ingredients, they give short answers and don't make any suggestions. It almost feels like you're bothering them. Not good for business. The coffee looks appealing on IG, but not in person. Espresso is great, but they need help with the add-ins. Taste & smell reminds me of essential oils. Took my son in for Matcha & he was disappointed. Sorry I couldn't rate this a 5⭐️","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anissa McDuffy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3d3ZMXfM4OMy7ctsP8Mlb4QhRakcnMvc91es8OPR_m8v9C6W3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little spot to enjoy alone or with friends!! Pick yourself up a plant too! I skipped on the plant because I can’t keep anything alive!sugar free vanilla latte for me!☕️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAnAewFhrCPho4wQHfKocz&fid=0x0:0xf0f102b4925243ac"],"When":"2025-10-24"},{"Name":"K B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEdaKW2FF1zsetc35dwY3SZ6xjOLrVRV-F8cDwL5KJ3O2Eiw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Great atmosphere with all the plants and greenery. Jalapeno cheese galette was meh, but the cappuccino and almond croissant were nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA70PRQKrjQUVoHniNA8v1b&fid=0x0:0xf0f102b4925243ac"],"When":"2025-7-27"}]

[{"Name":"Jeff Buchanan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpQWmjQIRQz2FqKkZpzy7xSZa-wMtPAtpCUzP2rh-ZB5JBmB0mKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The variety of pizza here is unparalleled.  After all of my travels in and out of the United States, I have never come across a variety of toppings, crust styles, and fantastic combination pizzas.

The outside atmosphere is wonderful, no bugs, plenty of shade, almost grotto like. The music really seals the deal completing an easy Italian experience while maintaining a genuine relaxing nature.

Kid friendly, my children are over ten so I am sure my experience would differ from under ten kid families.  However, if you come during a time the wait staff can focus on you they genuinely care about your experience and are very kind.

Recommend the kitchen sink, seafood pizza, or the sweet and spicy pizza for a first try.  The appetizer we chose was the cheesy garlic bread, they make the bread here so it's fantastic and fresh.

Dessert, wow, the chocolate pizza really doesn't do justice for what you get.  It's perfect balance of sweet and savory satisfies that chocolate craving without killing you with over rich flavor and sweetness.

This will go in my top ten ever!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDglgKR9VHhCfDvm0lh58ek&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-6-18"},{"Name":"Shira Jordan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPKR0UM08fyl2zg085ASJdpGFqD1fKQ0L5FOq9XOTvkB21Eg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our waitress was great! We left full and satisfied. It was within walking distance from our hotel.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxdo6RcQ0ye49lWtANJQBo&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Dean G. Propst","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVySQslMqqQ9DkAZtljHyQjtrVjF-0ukZRSFl_8iiq7t3M6NyEkmw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you "Yelp", check out my detailed review. Simply stated, this is one of the best little gems you will find in San Diego. The food is outstanding, the atmosphere welcoming and the owner and staff - charming and welcoming. In my top 5 places to eat in San Diego!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELSH1IPe_uWvcg&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-6-2"},{"Name":"Alex R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlwG3eIsiet7qOongD9URermqVSSpK8V8_gErItps6b6h7XcI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We visited last week during a rainy day, and the open doors made the restaurant feel a bit wet and messy and smell funky. The service was good, which we appreciated! The pizza wasn’t quite what we expected—the Margherita pizza had an olive oil base that gave it a flavor we didn’t love more fishy and drenched in olive oil, and the crust was thicker than our preference. The restaurant looks cute in photos, but our experience didn’t quite match the hype. Others seem to really enjoy it though, a little more expensive than other pizza places we had went to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sparkles333","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXpJ9JMMEL1b6MYdtyTDUUPZJ3PHc15tdfO36Gr73zf3cYEsa4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Charming old Italian restaurant with amazing service. We enjoyed a quiet dinner in the patio.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTfS-2efOCcM01Gytep3ma&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-9-14"},{"Name":"Valerie Canizales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh-SjKRAlknF7MDz2DnSGSxKUdETwJjyfOL16hqGmk8u2vgLGOvw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We enjoyed a lovely lunch at this restaurant as we celebrated my daughters birthday and we would come back. The quality of the pizza was perfect.  The portions were perfect for our family of 4 (adults). We ordered a large pizza, cheese bread, and a fettuccine Alfredo.  The fettuccine was definitely a different taste than what we've ever had, but perhaps it's their own recipe. We saw another customer order a deep dish pizza that we r willing to try on our next visit. We were happy for our 1st visit.  A+ on service as well. Very attentive, which always makes a difference if we will return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7gYq6bg&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2024-8-24"},{"Name":"vanesa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9A-BtVzcVeoEcdbxiHG_MkZ4wKvfI_TcG7WIy3Sgm8EcmmBIO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Got the fettuccine Alfredo pasta and customized Alfredo pizza. Everything was super delicious. Our waitress was so kind and attentive. I’m surprised this place wasn’t busy and received our food so fast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9OjxWPKC6VUgV00jYXWAY&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-8-7"},{"Name":"Luiz Galdino","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXOW3OAVUpad3FYb_SEms4uEpJ-cgjief68JRpRbN2bC9IXp4dxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Stopped there because we needed restroom and decided to stay for lunch. Ambience was great and service amazing. We ordered meatball, large size one, garlic bread and pizza (all meat). Meatball did not have good flavor but edible. Garlic cheese bread was pretty good. Pizza: I  have had better. I truly believe the food can taste better, maybe an off day, but it simply was not to my taste bud. I will likely try again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCIzKSi_QE&fid=0x0:0xf24123e5a87b0f3f"],"When":"2025-3-30"}]

[{"Name":"Rachel Erotika","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSvMd-FjvcWhSTXcDybmeHeKg37YG_J99dr6NKPXd4b-kd4koY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had to stop by ‘Fiesta de Reyes’, a shopping mall that turns into a beautiful ‘Day of the Dead’ themed plaza covered with Cempasúchil (Mexican marigold), also called the “flower of the dead”, “catrinas”, ofrendas also called “Day of the Dead altars”, and vendors with Day of the Dead related merchandise and decorations for altars. They had a huge altar with the ‘Book of the Dead’ for people to leave messages to their loved ones who are no longer here. What a beautiful place and experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAs_woLtHFEEY34-xwjIeBM&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"SunnyCityBites","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxRA7sFpIY7_Kugzo0cw2j385qGq-gxS4M7sKryqIGrt3b-S4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fiesta de Reyes is a charming little spot to shop, eat, and soak in the atmosphere of Old Town San Diego. There are several small shops to browse and a variety of places to grab a bite, making it a fun place to wander and explore.

It’s a great stop if you’re already visiting Old Town and want to enjoy some local food, souvenirs, and a bit of history all in one place","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANO9bgGvLeS4YIpQ9M615Q&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2025-12-19"},{"Name":"Karla Orozco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJrdnlK3V4sonzzKRfX-2cV97w67F9cKmb5YNY7n6Zc1cCcZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While walking through the plaza came across Casa de Reyes enjoying a Mar у Tierra plate and Shrimp Fajitas both were packed with bold, delicious flavor.
Finish it off with their must-have churros—you won't regret it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kytka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFbLxCr0yvAqfHQCyTsjXfQy9R17dE_EQqu_BX8i1OgxMFORH4zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fiesta de Reyes in Old Town San Diego is a vibrant destination that perfectly blends history, culture, and entertainment. Located in the heart of Old Town State Historic Park, this colorful plaza is named after the "party of kings," a nod to its festive atmosphere and ties to San Diego's Spanish and Mexican heritage. Old Town was established in 1821, and Fiesta de Reyes captures the spirit of that era with its traditional architecture, lively mariachi performances, and authentic Mexican dining options.

The plaza is home to charming shops offering handcrafted goods, souvenirs, and artisanal products, making it a fantastic place to explore. Whether you're indulging in delicious Mexican cuisine at one of the restaurants, shopping for unique treasures, or simply soaking up the festive atmosphere, Fiesta de Reyes offers a delightful experience for visitors of all ages.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_ibKpVA&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2025-1-17"},{"Name":"Norm “Stoynorm”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtEXVOpMFm9ZoDtUBKGlwM9XY3bVvGzsFzJCv-u7337rCyN00Y8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fiesta de Reyes in Old Town San Diego is an absolute must-visit! From the moment we stepped in, we were captivated by the vibrant and festive atmosphere. The colorful decor, live music, and lively energy perfectly captured the spirit of Mexican culture. We started with a meal at one of the restaurants, where the food was absolutely delicious—authentic flavors and generous portions. The staff was incredibly friendly and made us feel right at home, enhancing our overall experience.

After our meal, we spent time exploring the charming shops around the plaza. Each store is unique, offering a variety of handcrafted items, souvenirs, and local goods. We found some beautiful keepsakes that made for perfect gifts and reminders of our trip. The whole area is beautifully maintained, with lush gardens and quaint architecture that adds to the charm.

Whether you’re looking for a great meal, a fun shopping experience, or just a place to soak in the local culture, Fiesta de Reyes has it all. It’s a perfect spot to enjoy a day out in San Diego, and I highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC73tDPjAE&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2024-8-16"},{"Name":"Lorenzo Warfel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOzJooC_lctzoJnqTz4I44Zd1E4QeLBtKk1WCkzuJHIMBDwi08lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LET'S FIESTA! The action-packed shopping center/cultural hub of Old Town is home to a variety of shops, the Casa De Reyes restaurant, and specialty food spots.  Fiesta De Reyes is a in-spot for both tourists and residents. You can find live music on-stage at the center of the plaza. I've seen Selena tributes, Mariachi music and more! Entertainment is constantly rotated and fresh. What's perfect is that all performances are free and there's a dance floor to join in on the festivities!

There's plenty of local businesses to support here such as a tile shop, souvenir stores, and hand-crafted items. My personal favorite shop is Nibble Chocolate, home to some EXCELLENT vegan hot chocolate and champurrado! Throughout the plaza, you'll also find street taco and tamal booths. The food is a bit pricey, so if you'd like to try a little bit of everything for a more affordable price I'd recommend eating at Casa De Reyes since they own the taco/tamal booths. Just order a combo plate where you can pick and choose what you want to try.

I always have a great time visiting this iconic San Diego plaza! Some of the patrons are a bit entitled and there's some grumpy old people, but all the staff are very professional with them! Please be kind when visiting ya'll!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL4czbrAE&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2024-6-20"},{"Name":"Maria Severance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL33agEqSl8bG3DwHeXzDPlcJ1qqmMaxSK-S3V4R4IcYpQ-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved everything about today! The Día De Los Muertos decorations, the churros at El Mercadito. The coffee at the Nibble Chocolate kiosk. All the stores we stepped into had a warm hello. Very welcoming. Thanks for a wonderful day!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAzfQFrHK7_c45o3iwIMJOOjM2FiA1NscinZI2dfAVWqUET67H=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a big shopping area featuring Mexican gifts, clothes, home items, and decorations. It also has multiple restaurants, open late! It is beautiful to come during Día de los Muertos; highly recommend. Everything is expensive, but everyone is pretty nice. They also sell roasted nuts and churros, if you only want a small snack. There is a free parking lot right next to this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDX66WfWQ&fid=0x0:0xe4e13199bf7ac98d"],"When":"2024-10-31"}]

[{"Name":"Maryam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwOYuCGsr1wknGLHstSgIRWztMHFNcPPT092Xri6Xiz90ujw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"La Puerta was a huge disappointment. The ceviche was average at best and while the chips were fine, the atmosphere completely ruined the experience. The music was absurdly loud and obnoxious, with heavy bass that gave me a headache and made the entire seating area vibrate.

The experience started off poorly with the hostess, who seemed completely unimpressed and sat us down without even speaking to us. The food didn’t get any better. The rice tasted old, the tacos were overly oily, and nothing felt fresh or well executed. I was genuinely upset that on a short two day trip to California, this is what I ended up eating.

The surf and turf tacos and the mix and match tacos were supposed to be the highlight, but they still didn’t redeem the meal. The only thing that was actually good were the refried beans.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA11ZooUkFfAaQAgXagaGgK&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Emma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK2ej39GtBaQOEGU5BbCFRAQkQ31qaFjuxL4OsdosTd8EgYpXo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If i can say one thing, this place has a personality. Yhe atmosphere is great and just gives a vibe I haven't found elsewhere. Its and warm and homey despite the open air, youd think itd be cold but they keep the place well regulated with the fireplace and patio heaters.
Each of the servers I interacted with where friendly and provided exceptional service.
I tried a few things on their menu and they where absolutely delicious, these items include
Carna Asada- witch made my taste buds sing. Its a safe and delicious option.
Pollo Asado- witch was delicious though the meat wasn't as falvorfull the garnish balanced it well.
Carnitas- was good and one of their top picks on the menu. I would say if your sensitive to grease then this one might not be for you. Otherwise dig in!
Each of their taco plates comes with rice, rajas con crema (an onion and green pepper mixed with sause), and refried beans. I suggest mixing the rice and rajas con crema together. The rice on its own isn't anything to brag about and the rajas con crema is kinda off putting on their own; but together they make a nice flaver balence.
Over all this place is definitely worth; and deserves, its ranking for top 10 tacos in the us!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCnYZHJH60FtTdb4eQ2hGi&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Mariana Vega","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHLzZgB0X4WTfxdMdMP2q90whN8RVeSSaBevKC5jzMK_rEKyET=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The picture makes no justice to the food. I love it here!! Been here a couple of times and loved everything I’ve tried. The drinks are pretty good and the chips/totopos are freshly made. The sides are so good!! Is rare to see rajas as a side (besides beans and red rice).
They were super nice to my service dogs and brought him treats.
5/5 stars
5/5 paws","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC2mKrcqC0E2De20S19JrgA&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"Jay Nepal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMuz9nFH3O_84JJDo3hMPxurRu5xpw9INPflQ8hYruwhNnWwA5IA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Good food, Awful “digital” Drinks menu.
Well, What could have been a good experience was ruined by the beverages menu. First, they only have drinks menu where you have to scan a QR code, once you scan, you are greeted with messy adds (mostly about fish or drinks available elsewhere but even explocit ones if you’re lucky—mot recommended for a family), then once you navigate it successfully, drink menu is not very clear or intiutive at all (certainly not for regulars, they don’t have Margarittas written in the menu)—bad!! When the food came, it was good.
Wouldnt recommend it to a family or friends. May be if you are regular and know what you like, it may work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDcxehvAen5sb_WeEuFvl5&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Christine Fish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4i_2hCIG35wiL0QGaDH5p8p7uS1jY0HNx13NNEmDKkVkBtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place! They're rocking and rolling like a band that has it all. Salsas are flavorful and kicky and the taco/burrito fillings are hits. The agave selections are chart toppers as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBbuIynRi4YxgzElly-Pnqx&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Kwelis Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfUyTZMSGpztkwb2qycXcPaH5ghrA9zL3vUeFsvZz47-IuwZeB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was really nice. Bar was well put and ample amounts of whiskey and bourbon. Quality was on point as food was crazy good. You must go there. The male bartender didn't get his name, but he made amazing drinks! You should go and get the 1lb socal burrito.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAu-O2sgGRrwhexJEghhxQO&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"Kelli Dougal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdQnmL2aST4r787LBl5I4LQNIG3K-nEn9EtG7puutkXWpkTeJX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad we picked this for our first night in San Diego! La Puerta had a cool ambiance and reminded me of restaurants I’ve been to in Miami. We ate outside by a little fire and even though slightly chilly outside, the fire kept it warm enough. We loved the food! We started with some of the cochinita flautitas, my husband got one of the quesadillas and loved it all so much he said he wanted to eat here every night. I got the surf & turf tacos and they were also really tasty! The sauce was so good! The churros & ice cream was a great finish. There seemed to be a slight mix-up when our server took a break and the other server didn’t visit us to bring out dessert, but a manager was super helpful and even comped the dessert, which was kind of him. Would definitely recommend stopping in! Reservations are probably recommended although we were able to be seated very quickly without one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBaw7ppNVbeTXUO0YDImM-d&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Deborah Waters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU82XpCrSfPV52ujmfUDLrdEHdPitPgZKo85c7FZ-T-bWfblWGj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great Mexican restaurant when the waiter took a picture of us he also took a selfie of himself so we included it what a great idea. I am not kidding the food was out of this world their burritos are huge and absolutely delicious along with their tacos and guacamole and drinks","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA727x4pS8f6DozTH9VWvyS&fid=0x0:0xe63bf9a09701c0b1"],"When":"2025-12-4"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Alex","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlpyazBR9lEB4mkujr3XmLIJKzV5S4Kh39FSvnf4X_iExZeXgX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Usually I’m not one of those people who say “if I could give this place 10 stars - I would” but this place deserves 11! The friendliest, kindest, most amazing staff ever! What a great diner experience! I went there twice during my stay in San Diego and second time was right before airport! I stoped by with a suitcase before heading to the airport for my flight because I couldn’t leave San Diego without another bite from this great place! I got a veggie burger with mushrooms and onions rings! One of the best burgers I had and the best onion rings for sure! 11/10 would recommend! Popular place with locals too! Around 25$ for burger with added mushrooms, drink and onion rings! Not bad at all for their amazing service!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKwuzMmrTXqBv9oJ7Ajoqp&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Janice Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXK2zAgwW1ZLE8ZdAE6np0eMECs6zY2w_JOr_vqiYo5LNsEfKPm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was great! My husband and I shared the slap up burger with grilled onions and zucchini sticks. It was more than enough food for the both of us! The root-beer float was great and they even topped it off before I left.  They use Barqs Rootbeer here! The service was amazing, they made me feel like family! I definitely recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBGkahczd6KTNwb09Z5otmX&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Anthony Estrada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICN2w2g39RY9xJ4n-VuBN4W3RYstrZ92qbTdJx9ONPIOhnUQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great, classic food spot! Some of these diners have a huge menu where they end up doing everything mediocre. The Malt Shop had the classic hits and knew EXACTLY how to make it.

Make sure to try their sweet potato fries, and their home made ranch is amazing!

We will definitely be back when we go to visit Sea World in a few months.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwebS3WtWZjL1Dvc5hS4WR&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"Key Roberts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrObDca76dfkF7W04TE7PA9FEuGTuKyJ-uA7F7YV5KgTJ2VIMCjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First of all, the customer service is top-tier amazing I’m not sure if it was the owner but his customer service was A1. The food was amazing. I got the Caliente burger nice heat juiciness burger will season also have to half-and-half onion rings and fries whale season hand cut onion rings, lettuce on a burger fresh the peppers and the man made me my own blue cheese not even on the menu, he made it !!the chili dog and the chili and the fresh onions perfect.the ice cream also a 10 , crispy, buffalo wings. We’re also good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCdQPMrzZlpc_SIBDzg9dR3&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-8-21"},{"Name":"Jerry Javier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7PGIJDGBb-KMa7YwJcDGjnb48PH0HSir0nflT96yVsSTddw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've tried MANY burger joints throughout the greater san diego area and all I can say about this place is OMFG!
The burgers (Slap Up Burger & True Bleu Burger), were made with fresh made patties and just as soft, juicy and flavorful as Hodads!

First impressions of the outside of this place were "ehh", then you walk inside and you are greeted with some of THE BEST customer service I've ever recieved! You will not be disappointed with this place
Is give it more stars but you are only allowed 5... EAT HERE!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQMiHNRTqDHyeesUa9wtAS&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Aaron Mau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVo9MekZj-9WFWNY9Dx6KRY4oeQDtr1LsiS73y0fKm8ebwA7YqduA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh gosh they put the Corvette Diner to shame. Such an amazing chocolate malt, and the fresh french fries are excellent (with their homemade sauces or dipped in something cold). Quick and super friendly bilingual staff. Busy but not a long wait.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4hJY_nuBShyZzblRYE27s&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Ashley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJNvS-VHIvQYcq5cQ_92W7tvmRrJqJRbpb3L18GEFzhhzvVgw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was absolutely amazing—classic comfort dishes done right, and everything tasted fresh and flavorful. Jeff went out of his way to make us feel welcome and at home. It’s rare to find a place where the food and the hospitality are both top-notch. You can tell they truly care about their customers and take pride in what they do.

Highly recommend stopping by if you’re in the area. We’ll definitely be back! P.S the chili cheese fries were to die for!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDB1UfyXfxSdE4-UBAOQ4U-&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-6-21"},{"Name":"JoJo Jamison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCvz5wp_jK7J31tgD2pywsb7a9H0TAW4jswlAjIKP9gtvPICXa4w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"MUST TRY! Been looking for a good diner style burger joint & this is just that with an insanely friendly and attentive staff and you feel like youre going back in time when you walk in. Jeff welcomed me with smiles as soon as I opened the door and learned my name like I was already a regular. I tried the Caliente Burger it was the perfect amount of spicy and that burger patty is insanely big and juicy. Paired it with their zuchinni fries and homemade ranch (to die for). Jeff hooked my sauce addiction up too hes the man you can just tell. Thanks again for a great first time (not the last time) experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1hhey8wAYHF8E6dtjODUl&fid=0x0:0x4adba6ae33eca131"],"When":"2025-11-12"}]

This was definitely an experience I'd go for again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9yV9wRRXpfZPT_e83pigp\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Alda Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrGY5pST-XISL_-PK_XOvZdchiodrzq5Ui1FGRiqCs6qzGJs4b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family and I loved the Old Town Trolley Tour! The two-hour ride was fun, informative, and a great way to explore San Diego. Our guide, Jack, was amazing - funny, knowledgeable, and made the tour unforgettable. After the trolley, we explored Old Town, which has so many cute spots for souvenirs. And don’t forget to grab a coffee and churro next to the trolley station - so delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhANA300E1AGyT5uZFwTX4mr\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Splash Mountain Dorrier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNWVh2uIYWTB9qb5j2nN6klAS-W8_VjnlyGGVJcOkKFaAhHgUF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bought a cute little Winnie the Pooh music box during my high school trip to San Diego back in May of 2025. It came from one of the many gift shops I had the chance to visit in Old Town. But I am 99% sure it was Old Town Market. Anyways, I LOVE this thing so much! Getting this souvenir was one of the highlights of my trip! It was so special that it even found a way to help me connect with Matt, one of my friends from school during the trip. Thank you guys for selling me the best San Diego souvenir I could ask for","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Cruz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXotipHRpnggUpRzt3A3q3UqrynDAUcoR3OnUUOaMpBXKg0r7rMuw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love it, it's old school. Very great restaurants and shops.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjw1EWc0Tvik2xN_z9shxu\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2025-8-13"},{"Name":"ItzMillertime Studios","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9YiWqqFVhjFpuD4ue3_PLw1ggMo8gIVsDT0m0fT3WDWH_h6M-sA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great way to spend a sunny afternoon visiting the local shops and crafts whilst taking in the feel of the 1800s . Well worth a visit","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVLsFizNh2-Qun1AwDEigh\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Clément Muth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAAc7WVfzGmRJUpqJNppm4kJryLxaGLrNh0RfdO573i6KUrB2Utw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town Market in San Diego is a wonderful destination. The atmosphere is rich with history and culture, making it a fascinating place to explore. There are plenty of great souvenir shops with unique items. It's a must-visit spot for anyone wanting to experience a vibrant and historic part of San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICzrpfcvgE\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2024-6-2"},{"Name":"Jeenali Kothari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_TFfV8WtFf5yNC8ek8TWrzEZicEQBI4F3w8M0fHNCKXgs0AYx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was a very very lively place. On maps it shows it closes at 5 but it’s just for museums. The market, restaurants and stores are open. It gives the feel of as if you are in Mexico and can smell tacos in the air. There was also live performances. Just love the vibe.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKHo3OaZwcfmQQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Anupam Patil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqgPJiu79S0N9SHKRi6L5i7u9tyYHewdxuK3SBq11v5zMtE72h6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"History never lies about its origin it's the people, but here you have a practical experience of everything that had taken place in the past. It's just there you can see by yourself but not here about the stories. This place gives you that authentic Mexican vibe that's bound to stay with you forever.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrtpf3FA\u0026fid=0x0:0x8c8e4366f79c1cff"],"When":"2024-7-7"}]
