[{"Name":"Kristen Somerville","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCHVgsNqS1xrMfxXC_qy4iCrgzANnBVk45hw5-FDOhxgkr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"JV’s Mexican Food was a local restaurant with a very personable  friendly vibe. They had a lot of unique and interesting options and I wish I lived in the area so I could try more of them. Their refried beans and rice were excellent as were their enchiladas (chicken and beef). I liked their green sauce it was very flavorful and not too spicy. Oh - great prices for the amount of food. One entree easily fed two of us.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzq40OYn_Sssy_JC-Pz6f9&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"Paul Runge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmji57T7jr2M1TiqdG8ZvEhOt770PgHUepEoLJQpdIScr6OA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I love JV’s, but… they really did us wrong this time. The chips with guac had less guac than two of the ten rolled tacos we ordered. The torta was pretty burnt and half was split lengthwise and cut in half, making it really hard to pick up without losing the contents.
I love the huge menu, and the workers are great, but I’ll never order a torta or chips and guac here again. I basically have to make my own dinner at home while my family eats their Mex order.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA3qwQIAEfW5qaYaUm_Eh9_&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Justin Ochoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuYS9huvGyGWuR_vrEgcVKTQ1s10w5INGgHsXMoW5LG65AFw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"So glad that my wife and I gave this spot a try! I was blown away by the quality and the value of the menu, not to mention the nicest young lady took our order and gave us recommendations.

We got the Hawaiian Burrito, which is what caught my eye when I looked up their menu online. Marinated pork, ham, pineapple, sautéed onions and green peppers with Monterey jack cheese. 10/10, and a solid portion size seeing as it was only $12.

What really topped it off as well was the fact that they make their own salsa in house. The salsa verde paired super well with the sweet and savory profile.

Highly recommend, and they actually have the cheapest Taco Tuesday prices I've seen in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXzKHfC59DwZj65cHSpe28&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"Nicholas Spencer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJV0k1UdMhfKGnOiVCfJ9u1v-Fo3oUr2e_zpOGLG3Tl1Ft7zw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JV’s Mexican Food is one of those spots you keep coming back to. The food is consistently delicious, full of flavor, and made fresh every time. Portions are generous, prices are reasonable, and the menu has something for everyone. Whether it’s tacos, burritos, or late-night cravings, they always deliver. The service is fast and friendly, and the laid-back vibe makes it even better. Definitely one of the best go-to Mexican food spots around.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Josh Baltazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGwLc0426uUtyS_hszBwD6DJIMBgO3FQ0DNqDkJ5w2kX3vUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Being a San Diego native, this is a very popular and well known Mexican spot. I been here sometime in the past around 2015 and then came back again 10 years later. This time I ordered a Surf and Turf Burrito which has shrimp & carne asada with rice and guacamole warped in 2 four tortillas, salted peppers onions and tomatoes. The burrito was absolutely massive but super good. There are so many different burritos, quesadillas and you see all the variety with signs throughout the store. I am plotting which burritos to try next when I go back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzV3pk0Z9SnFstRUdgyaXc&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Mary “Mom's Travel Team” Loeza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq-QGN8xsM5B1ydXSZeQD-sY5t8U3193uigAqgqNaY8lGqTDBq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Never disappoints. I tried something different- the Acapulco Shrimp cocktail with clamato. It was served with crackers and the portion was pretty big. It was fresh with avocado, onions, cilantro, lime and tomatoes covered with clamato. The clamato was mild, not spicy.

The shop has salsa available so you can spice it up if you like. It was served in a container ith a lid - good thing because I had to take half of it home. There were large shrimp as well as some shrimp pieces. Delicious and I would order it again.

The restaurant was clean and has nice decor, plenty of seating and the staff were friendly and service was quick.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDo8LzakAE&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-4-21"},{"Name":"Bananakin Starman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7CvpdHGNP0ZObOnYhDihKp__ux4Ms88_soF8aTKR68-vQ9KmW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great experience. Delicious mole, generous serving sizes, reasonable prices, kind and passionate employees. Great place. No notes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCEMEnY1fpmjcm6KwICcUt&fid=0x0:0x1f4434303f022101"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Lexie Nickens","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtnRVIUpxTGtrqyZsAu01YfnaznDOX4_Jbs31uQO5AzDqSWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This place used to be really good. Fresh and well done.
I dont know what happened over the last few months but this place dis a complete 180 on their food. The people are still very nice but I dont even recognize the food anymore.
I ordered a shrimp burrito and got cooked tomoatoes, rice and one shrimp....never seen a burrito like that and I've lived in san diego for 32 years....
The fish taco was litterally fish sticks and iceburge lettuce....
Really big bummer after loving this place for so long. The prices went up and the food went way way down.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Nazanin Nikraftar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWmt-Op4ZmlRlXhzTuxOkHnRpN-T95mAy2D7yE4QbKalxiDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town San Diego is a fantastic place to explore! It feels like stepping back in time — full of historic buildings, charming shops, and lively street performances. You can learn about the past, do some unique shopping, and take amazing photos. A must-visit if you’re in San Diego!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOrC3eSahZj47gE&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2025-6-12"},{"Name":"josh banks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXhuO6-dAtNlG2REr3GoaD2C4TyDNLI-CTg13zi4p1FsVKJ38Z4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Now this place was awesome.  We loved going there and checking out the locale.  Businesses were all over and very dynamic. We ate Mexican, shopped local and culturally is was really a fun experience.  I recommend going if in town for an evening.  Felt very safe walking around with my family and the boys loved going into various shops.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChpvCLlAE&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2023-2-11"},{"Name":"Sue Duong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXTU-8Riyfeaa46Yl_IZyAW2P3po_F4-fknk8W6SDtLmUXKoPBsgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"05-06-23

My husband and I arrived at noon to celebrate Cinco de Mayo on Saturday, May 6th. There was no courtyard entertainment as 3 or 4 years ago. It was still festive though.

Highly recommend to get a table as soon as you arrive on site if you plan to dine before walking around. It gets really crowded later during the day and the wait is long. Our wait time was only 15 minutes.

After lunch, we stayed for half an hour to see Mexican folklorico at Casa de Reyes, toured the shops and headed home. It was a fun afternoon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR786nEg&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2023-5-7"},{"Name":"Hanna Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhYWMoSrXKYRmg61h4jR52Qtz7I-AgLeOzQdBSQmqVcSEApWChtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came die a family dinner and we loved the food.  We did feel a little rushed towards the end which was unfortunate and I don't think the pictures cost was worth it. But the food was wonderful","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUDBmPIROdNZawiTWDtreSunHMpTbfHuDuXP9G6dZ8OaFbT31MK_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"BEST tacos ever! They were huge! 2 carnitas full of chunks of tasty pork & 1 carne asada delicious flavor. Took them to go w margaritas to Mission Bay Park. Found a table & enjoyed the taste of San Diego","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKl4z_UQ&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2021-4-22"},{"Name":"Nathaniel Jerome","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-hU_gYt4pxrZaOYOfx7UawoRCncERAjbl3MAzufyG-6lO59-3BQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The ambiance, service, and restaurant's aesthetic were exceptional. The food quality was outstanding.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgrY_gswE&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2025-2-19"},{"Name":"Perkins Brothers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHtDipxeyzh9198qbmObpgF-RVaXg58fdWt9NC_xk9pO84RQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food is great, Ambiance is better, live music is best! Just do not depend on the free Wi-Fi because it doesn't work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2h4-QoQE&fid=0x0:0x179d8fd4a66c29bb"],"When":"2022-5-26"},{"Name":"Jamie Heimforth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCfzaE59mx__s-ysDejUYcMK332DcOIpXPLd0o3ikZPPRS8S5aag=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great vibe. Active, colorful. Great for families and couples. Multiple testing options up and the street.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Paul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXObxsrZ-x-vEofSWJmZ1iESCcazC_qmgo_0rpVN53aslYQMa-o2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cute small business Italian restaurant. My wife and I pass Volare nearly daily but never stopped by. Yesterday, we finally decided to give it a shot and we were impressed.

The ambiance very much felt like home. It has a comfortable vibe, is not too big, and generally the people there are chatty and enjoying each other's company.

The food was good! My wife and I thought prices were fair, portions were generous, and service was okay. I'd say the only downside is that the staff seemed to be in a rush. I'm not sure if they were short staffed but it felt like they were rushing away and that they were trying to get us out as quickly as possible.

Overall, we very much enjoyed our meal and thought the prices were great for the portion sizes. We will be coming back for sure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDv2Xkyz96seX4eJ5z8YuHk&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Victoria Swan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCkNIPnHkXw80UIxzCve8-51_l69xAuhZIgg-xOnLRjXEKdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We got the veal entree and the salmon Mediterraneaneo and it came with a side salad or soup. We tried one of each and both were very good. The salmon and veggies were so good especially the veggies, and the salmon wasn't over cooked. The veal was great as well as the sauce but the spaghetti was store bought tasting which isn't the end of the world but worth noting that they weren't special tasting. The bread basket brought to our table was a disappointment as it was sesame bread with a little butter melted and that was it and the bread wasn't my favorite. If not complimentary I would have been disappointed to pay for it. The cheesecake and canolis were really good. I asked if the canoli was house made and they said only the filling and the filling was really good. Both were a good portion for desserts and were not disappointed in getting. The place was clean, with friendly staff that were very attentive, the bathrooms were also clean and felt very homey. Our bill for the 2 entrees dine in and 3 desserts to go was $69 before tip","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAVLx_1Td4Lv2D4Zc_F_2Ca&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2026-1-9"},{"Name":"John Kruszyna","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlrRJ__0NIhwuIi2K3s-yiZGe3ED8o2BwO-cSppRYSrG1zxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A great llittle Italian restaurant! I found the food to be equal to the excellent Italian restaurants in Boston and NYC. Four of us all had great meals and the service was also very good. We has gnocchi,  eggplant parm,  chicken cacciatore and chicken picatta. All were fabulous and the prices are very reasonable! Try the delicious desserts! We highly recommend Volare!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDguXbq9iRaJ8R0Jiw1y22N&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Shaun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW529fTq4-5OTIQsU_mj0S1ZmwFOTHHR4Vr0HbWmvdCCHLLwHl0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"HIDDEN (FORGOTTEN) GEM!
It is rare to see a true hidden gem.  This Italian restaurant has been here since 1978. When the streets were busy with the foot traffic of customers from the Marine base across the street.  New recruits and seasoned veterans, as well as their families.
Now many years later. The streets widened, barricades in place around the base, many businesses have come and gone. The neighbors are no longer trendy or appealing. Many in disrepair.  Nearby parking is not easy to find, what little parking there is is cramped.
Inside, a narrow restaurant with the smells of Italian culinary mastery (not an exaggeration).
Service was always on time. No drink went empty. Order was delivered correct. And the food was absolutely fantastic (the photos are the best I can do to paint the flavor).
This restaurant is an absolute need-to-try place.  To top it off, desert was great as well.
You should not allow the street view to sway your choice.  I know... it is surrounded by repair shops and... other stuff.  Those that know the place, know to ignore that for the reward.  I saw many regulars come and go.  I'm sure they won't appreciate me sharing their secret.
Take a taxi or Uber, the blinds are shut, ignore the traffic, enjoy life!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCaJtPG1s-FwIO6ezzsw96r&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Paul Kenney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-r6AmzlvPPc9CCpgoMKGez_SaZKykhNR_0pHN7o90PEadOiVxsA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place kinda flies under the radar, but it's a real gem. We've driven by for years and kept telling ourselves we should try it, and we finally did. All of the staff were friendly and welcoming. The decor is simple and old, but clean, with a grandma's kitchen feel to it. Most importantly, the food was all delicious, with generous portions. From appetizer to dessert, we loved everything and we were planning to return before we even left.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDUEDnspObXAPoC8j41yatl&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-8-11"},{"Name":"Brittany Catton Kirk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8Yl6ldUd3F-FOB6Gcamc_NymRZzs-5kNZ1cQI-9MSbJhA_5WDUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Feels old school like a restaurant you grew up going to with your grandparents. Huge portions, delicious white pizza, haven’t had it like this since Connecticut. All homemade. Chicken piccata hammered so thin and tender. It’s a gem of San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFznXIlBwrI3j2A1aWMoJ3&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Patrick Woodall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxHUX1rdt4VL4-T0cqBTm-Mu_nhZxQNGA9SC-8qXYpuvXtRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is the very definition of a Mom & Pop type of restaurant. It is very small with a sign that says max of 49 people! You sign in on a steno pad hanging on the wall when you enter. Me and my Marine son split the pizza. The pie was huge and packed with freshness and flavor. My wife got the chicken parm and our other son had the Fettuccini Alfredo. Don't forget to grab a cannoli for later. The food was absolutely outstanding. I wish I could rate more stars. The locals know this place very well as it has been there 1978. Do yourself a favor and put this place on your list whenever visiting San Diego. You wont regret it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCchOuTS8W1zInAkoNKGixp&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-7-6"},{"Name":"Esmeralda Mosqueda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9nlk3zKPCNe0mdY5P55-SZMOUCOfUrM5-l6-wGCNighWTCeLB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arrived and there was a waitlist. Once we were seated, we noticed the place was small and quite crowded.
We placed our order and were quickly served bread and drinks, which was a nice touch.
When the food arrived, everything was absolutely delicious — really worth the wait!
The only downside was the service: the waitress who took care of our table didn’t seem to be in the best mood. However, the host who welcomed us was very friendly and made us feel at home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOSnw4n3vZiaCg&fid=0x0:0x86a65bb3f9bdbf8b"],"When":"2025-6-7"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Marv","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRlcka_OPJmn_AebrjtrPjdZbcK1KLC-YD9tAOBYq0SQWscrY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sushi Tadakoro offers the freshest sushi in town — truly deserving of its Michelin recognition. The service is top-notch, attentive, and warm from start to finish.
We started with perfectly seasoned edamame and a crisp, light tempura set — both beautifully prepared and a great way to begin the meal.
For the main course, we ordered the T, K, S sashimi set (Tuna, Kampachi, and Salmon), and every piece was absolutely delicious — fresh, flavorful, and expertly sliced. The fatty tuna sushi melted in our mouths, while the Kampachi, Tuna, and Salmon sashimi showcased incredible texture and balance.
The hot green tea paired perfectly with the meal, and the hot sake was outstanding — smooth and aromatic. We finished with their homemade Shiratama-Zenzai dessert, the perfect sweet ending to an exceptional dining experience.
Overall, Sushi Tadakoro delivers a perfect combination of quality, craftsmanship, and hospitality. Definitely worth a visit — and well deserving of its Michelin award. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCeY3YxE20hiMsq9KVFilXd&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"prezelonline","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnM-3lo3excMeB8djqCpOM_bxAd9fmxs0hSePMl9fEMJHllIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Environment 🌟🌟🌟🌟1/2
Tiny and easy to miss spot. Parking isn’t great — street parking only. Sat at the bar for my birthday, which turned out to be fun. The chef was very chatty, shared his experiences, and even showed us photos of different fish while explaining them.

Food 🌟🌟🌟🌟1/2
Overall a 4.5. The most surprising dishes were the tofu appetizer with roe— simple but really well done. Sashimi was pretty average, but the sushi itself was solid across the board.

The standout was the grilled fish collar, prepared almost like chicken karaage — crispy, well-seasoned.

Conclusion 🌟🌟🌟🌟1/2
Good food, some real highlights, and a warm birthday touch — they brough out a cake at the end. Not flashy, but thoughtful and memorable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqcrpMdw1q9b51Hf-rPmZN&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Miche","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7iq9kYZ5LYwosGbLZ6H_XNSZ8KbQ8weh82V0yZ7vWwmbd2g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful omakase experience. Explanations for each piece were thorough and the sushi chef who did our omakase was very nice! Sushi pieces (Mackerel, amberjack, toro, striped jack, etc) were very fresh! Favorite was the sushi hand roll with amazing uni (from Hokkaido) and ikura!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDR0sc02IX4PjU10M5wSrSr&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-10-27"},{"Name":"C Neon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn6PkjLRNy-1NrvtpBbWRApqTrvWhHm83hzO-XGcdQ1OfTurn2Sw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This is a one Michelin star sushi bar.   The owner chef offered a nice kaisaki style pre fix meal.   The cooked dishes are good and the sashimi and sushi are fresh and good.   We had a good experience here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1eMfUiIb34tYX3ihDNbe7&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"Winnie Xu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhXoArw687w9TnJnEd-G8t1jmgeDS8FtJwkY8Qv6c4lm6t0p_49A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"cute spot, quiet neighborhood. relatively empty on a week night, the omakase takes around 2 hours and each course is made hot. the fish selection was pretty standard, the rice was not the best i’ve had in the nigiri. overall was good but not amazing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDIiXJ3RBXZHqQy7WmdOgqT&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Jason C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7w9eSHTzKfCkM-XwOiXLQATiU0D78Y9j0ZI42ZbV1iO2p5Fnj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been to this spot multiple times and when I have the time (and the reservation!) I will make the trip. One of my favorite sushi spots that has the quality and some of the feel of an omakase place but without the pressure of needing to eat everything they give you. You order from a menu and can ask for additional things, really really great. Can't wait for my next trip to San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB4OhKUlI49IKs2m0Q6SvtD&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Rich Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbeMhxrp9SWc5pLSWAKjxQtDfslyYnSB0s7FtXqD5Szr7mIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Upon entering, it was immediately apparent that this establishment would be a delightful experience. We were warmly welcomed by the friendly hostess and promptly seated. The owner and chef were exceptionally personable and well-informed. The cuisine was simply outstanding, featuring incredibly fresh ingredients. I highly recommend the Umi and the Eel, though everything on the menu is certainly worth exploring. I fully intend to return to this hidden treasure.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6Ax9KDI2K4gbZjVtaNNJW&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-7-2"},{"Name":"Amy Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLDGQEFhayhsBssqijOv6IWKLHmkByXotICXRJXEj2e5tZ7VQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Course 1 appetizers - monkfish liver subbed for tofu because I asked to avoid tofu, I was surprised that it was so decadent. oyster was also really good

Course 2 sashimi - all great, toro was best

Course 3 Chilean sea bass with sweet miso and pickled ginger - perfect

Course 4 shrimp shell - crunchy, was like a nice snack. We were wondering where the rest of the shrimp went, until course 5 :)

Course 5 nigiri - perfect

Course 6 salmon roe and San Diego Uni - incredible

Course 7 tuna yakitori with teriyaki glaze - was good but probably my least favorite course

Course 8 more nigiri - perfect

Soup Fish bone soup - Clear broth with a lot of pure fish flavor.

Dessert Panna Cotta - somehow tasted like a smooth chocolate. Best panna cotta I’ve ever tasted, and it was homemade","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC59dPQrzTGespDGsCaOWZm&fid=0x0:0xa18e59aa5dbbcac8"],"When":"2025-8-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Huyen Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4L-o4yTiSaxrDByz-mlmZ_jb9XMvCdYzaQCNcUTb9stzakzlQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Thin, smashed burgers with generous side portions. It's as basic as it can get. Friendly service. TVs available for sport game days and draft beers, too. We came on a random weekday night, and they were pretty slow/empty. I would think it'd be a nice hangout spot during the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDe3Z1iV4W7uzwEs9dopYEo&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"nancy sutuc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkfG2WxZgnPsfTwJ3MYFy-Dd5dkpqZ72ni4MC7h-uFD1HhMHqTuA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lots of tables and a really good burger. The sweetness of the maple makes this unique. Their tots are delicious seasoned. The have beer and soft drinks and Mexican coke and Jarritos. They even had a sour (beer) on the menu yeah! If you don’t want to stand in a long lines for other restaurants, come here. You won’t be disappointed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChDIYB6_H-b-H_CSVFl6Qi&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Andy Ibarra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdID1-Xp3YrW-oo3Rim-xIet9ms4GbqS8QDZXaavl9kvaGG9y9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was a Memorial Day Lunch for us. Got there a little early to avoid the crowds. Very nice open deck seating to view the streets and open scenery.
Liked that it wasn't an overwhelming menu. Just stick to several items, but do them very well.
Several of us ordered the Bonehead Burger, which was cooked very well.
We also got a surprising huge order of their fries and tater tots, which were really tasty.
Took a while for our food to come out, but  good food takes time. And they might have been short-handed being a 3 day weekend and all.
Will most likely comeback especially if I want a cheat meal .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKbkqIvw4v6hZg&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-5-27"},{"Name":"Joe Stabley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4m6TJ4zY73Gy9QW6F11fdogXqEnKm6dF6ymwmVMiDF3tjThUk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came to Old Town craving tacos but ran into this place. The Smashbuger tacos just got smashed! Well done guys and great service Bree. Will definitely come back with La familia…
I heard the owner is a pretty cool guy too ✌️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpi-g-aqv-KBg5IgOZTAny&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Francis Kravitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLXrabU2-y8eJwxhx-5ei8h5G7DgrJo5Bf0HxEZ0ON20sunQQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family and I visited San Diego yesterday and stopped in Old Town for a bite to eat. Burgers were something we could all agree on and landed at Bonehead Burgers.

We loved that it had open-air seating, not too crowded, and a simple menu. Menus with dozens of options can be overwhelming, and the offerings here were just right! Additionally, we had a picky 7-year-old in tow, so 🙏 they had chicken nuggets.

Our group ordered chicken wings, french fries, a Kenny B burger, a kids' meal chicken nuggets with fries, and a Bonehead burger. It's always a gamble when trying a new place, so fingers crossed we waited.

To our surprise, relief, and delight, the food was amazing! Plates came out quickly, the food looked fresh and well-cooked, and the portions were huge! My husband and I are always searching for tasty french fries. These were off the chart. The combination of size, shape, seasoning, crispy outer, and tender inside was a chef's kiss 🤤 They were that good.

The Bonehead burger was a hand-crafted beauty. Fresh seasoned, smash-style burger, loaded with lettuce, tomato, pickle, cheddar cheese, maple bacon, onion, and something called Bonehead sauce. I couldn't shovel it in my mouth fast enough, lol.

We discovered mid-way through our visit that the gentleman working there was a one-man show that day. Ernie was handling the orders, cash register,  drinks, cooking the food, and serving solo! How he was able to pull that off is amazing. A few more parties showed up, and he handled it all like a pro without ever breaking a sweat. He remained attentive, professional, and friendly. 😊

Suffice to say, Bonehead Burgers will be added to our list of favorite burger joints, and Ernie is our go-to guy for great food!

What a great experience. Thank you for feeding our family 🥰","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwQnuhmRgDUSensiVA85DR&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-6-26"},{"Name":"Jennifer Hart","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUhVqWwheN83nMOz9VjbjhTgy4dEpGY7cUq0cPR5zzKbO-M04o=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! 🤯 🤩 We got a Groupon to try this place out & it blew our minds! One of the best burgers we’ve had in our lifetime- here’s why: 🍔

Crispy, deliciously cooked burger
Fresh lettuce, tomatoes, pickles, onions
Secret sauce
Um- bacon!! 🥓

So so so yummy 😋

Tots & fries crispy, flavorful & amazing

Atmosphere is top notch & has a dog friendly patio space that is open, airy & adorned with plants 🪴

Only thing we can think of to improve is they could offer paper cups & bulk ketchup/condiments to reduce waste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEPaV2ZWx--Lb0QE&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-6-15"},{"Name":"Mike R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLUyuotlv7LMVxeuxCxljlmokneCW9fSOSy04ZkCTPetsO3lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bonehead Burger is a laid-back burger joint with both indoor and outdoor seating. They are dog-friendly if you’re dining outside! They are tucked away on an upper deck in Old Town San Diego. I discovered this place through a Groupon deal that included two Bonehead Burgers, two beers or wines, and two sides of fries or tater tots, all for around $30. Talk about value!

The Bonehead Burger itself completely exceeded my expectations — juicy, flavorful, and perfectly cooked. It’s clear they take pride in what they’re serving. But what really shocked me were the massive portions of sides. These weren’t your average handful of fries. I’m talking full baskets, enough to satisfy even the hungriest eaters.

If you’re craving a hearty burger, cold beer, and a chill spot to hang out I highly recommend checking out Bonehead Burger. I’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHOlBYm-SweTyOuSi9a9ty&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-6-17"},{"Name":"Leonard Mendoza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpumIB81xsxQpkUL4t8qjVUBYsc_x3EoLc8zT-ramTgo0qxbwO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife was craving a burger and so we looked up and found Bonehead burger and decided to give it a try. We ordered a bonehead burger and tater tots to share. This is easily one of the bet burgers I have had in a while. Everything was cooked perfectly and on top of that fresh. The burger had a unique flavor to it that stands out from other burger places. The tots were actually potato rounds and were cooked perfectly. They gave us so many, we couldn't finish them. Great food, great staff and good vibes. We will be back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJuejbaPlszHNQ&fid=0x0:0xeca1aee50bfb1ca7"],"When":"2025-5-21"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Francisco Diaz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7vLxiP8QrQbVvoHVKHsWblfZoRx0fVPlQmysyHs2OJpN815KN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here and have traveled all over Mexico drinking some amazing coffee I was very curious to try this place out. I ordered the Aztec Mocha and it was very good 😊, I’ll have to come back and try some of the other coffees but it was good. Also the staff was very nice and friendly giving us some recommendations. A try if you are ever in old town.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9POV3xp29QzFxdt1CricJ\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Jonell Schmeltz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrYHS1urYx4hUymoBlYgHNgfPSs72H4r6ba8nMPqlrIEjKQJZDTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wonderful little cafe with Mexican inspired flavors and atmosphere influences. The drinks were made with care and were delicious. Definitely give them some local small business love.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIWG3nSFvwwFEK0VpQWYF8\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2026-1-20"},{"Name":"Omar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCInOcJVVa92o7ciiHF52PMCRKGQ_cx7tLVYjS8O_NjWP8TT3rDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This spot became my go-to every morning during my trip to San Diego. The coffee is excellent—smooth, rich, and made from high-quality Mexican-origin beans. I had a vanilla latte every day, and not only did it taste great, but the latte art was a beautiful touch. The owner is incredibly pleasant and welcoming, and the customer service overall was top-notch. The space itself is cozy and perfect for relaxing while you enjoy your drink. Highly recommend if you’re in the area—definitely a hidden gem!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo0vnr8wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Maria Cabildo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUncRl0BrB92slNKBjLkJ5z118AKgTJEKkQmoH41KxbMeNz3pUh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An oasis in Old Town. We are visiting San Diego and feeling overwhelmed by all the souvenirs and huge restaurants in Old Town. This is a classic cafe with good baked goods and delicious coffee. If you need a break from the tourist scene, come here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBGh5GA_fxyMd-vS3A-g_Y\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Katie Foxwood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVAWEJSKJJDTItWBs_PsWyCfOsD8Lm5doHWpZZ8HrA-yhTglCs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is such a great spot! We had a lovely time. The coffee was delicious, great pastries too! And we got to sit and enjoy a couple games while we had our coffee. Would be a fun place to meet up with friends. The service was wonderful. Just super great across the board. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jen L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1iWgfOiLOnI656a0RFUrlCE2Ej5IU0_Wnqxx1MERGpNG1Aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stop by after lunch after grabbing some sushi from a nearby resturant. Coffee shop is very cute and is very inviting. Service was a bit slow since there was only one person taking orders and making the drinks, however the wait was worth it. I ended up grabbing a latte  with oat milk as they only offer whole, almond or oat milk. I added some nutmeg on top and it was delicious. Everything was nicely balanced. Sat outside to enjoy some air and watched the people enjoy the craft fair happening outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBG4Bb6t1y0RpWw2z8qNBQ1\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"Kamis M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUXxgUH4IGEihxZ6_vN-Pp5O1hCHcN9huQb5v5AOiep3BsN2DiB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great little coffee shop in the heart of the Old Town in San Diego. We ordered flat whites and the coffee was perfectly brewed.  The baristas working there were very friendly too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnxvfzowE\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2024-10-5"},{"Name":"Nikki A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPSXGT_eUiG82kA-rM1Xxlgh6EgwQ6R2mF6bl07WXtNpffGjmRqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Be aware that you’re going to wait for a while for your coffee . We waited almost 20\nMinutes . There is only one barista making the coffee. Sure little spot with specialty lattes . We got the Cubanito and the salted honey . I wish the salted honey had some salt on top - would have taken it up a notch but the cubanito was excellent ! Overall they know how to make good coffee ☕️!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXyaqEYg\u0026fid=0x0:0x39ea50e7b2c19082"],"When":"2024-10-18"}]

[{"Name":"S7160CPgabrielap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeFH6dzZjd_ZFLhXHZKibEzXEy8hWzFB4Qa7PutLe3CnO2G7yVfjd4VSabiCQwQYo5W-g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The location was fantastic, super close to all the restaurants and mainly the Train staion( Old town). I was able to have breakfast early in the morning and walk to the train to take the coaster to San Clemente. |Hotel room was clean, no trafic noise wich was great for my toddler during nap time. They have great suggestions on what to do, they hold my luggage because I arrive earlier. I was able to ealk to the State Park and walk back for check in time! |Thank you for being so accommodating. Definitely staying here next time!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ryanjJ2134BH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QdtJFuKDyH12JEJN3_BlfWxVlXxwNlE01-8U9TzOZwmldhu0M3dlYNopslW5aXmuAyzhQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We've stayed at this hotel several times over the years.  It has a great location walking distance to Old Town.  It's right by the airport and downtown, very close to the freeway, but without any noise.  The rooms are spacious, clean, beds are comfortable, and the staff are very friendly and accomodating.||The main reason we stay though is the price.  I've never paid more than $150 a night, even on the weekend.  And they even include a free breakfast for that amount.  They also don't require a credit card if you prefer cash like I do, even cash deposit is accepted.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Moctezuma Cadenas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbfoRJgAGNxlwPyY_w5psXJKLfYjv8Uip6_qlZT9dFlEkTzLsoqw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really enjoyed my 2 night stay here.  I was in town for a work event.  Location is great, walking distance to shops and restaurants in Old Town.  Also a quick 10 min drive to Hillcrest, Little Italy or Balboa Park...VERY WELL LOCATED!

The room was very spacious, clean and very simple.  AC worked great.  The room I stayed in was at the end of the hall on 2nd floor next to the utility room and had windows facing the street.  Other rooms have windows facing the hallways where you need to keep window shutters closed for privacy.

The waffle at breakfast was super fluffy and staff in all areas were very courteous, helpful and friendly.

I would stay here again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Provenzola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTbNR3L1_3NvI6EYhfe4zwa4oTKs34OnAsazyHdKV0yz7towaFpw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Extremely dirty rooms - the sheets had holes in them and were stained, and the bathroom had not been cleaned. There was such a mess in the sink we ended up switching rooms. Good location, but extremely overpriced for the quality. Would recommend staying somewhere else.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"johannaaO4259GI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qc_m0BOt0e288CC5xVhlFJeGbeLoq1HoB7h5IAKHAwOrWyFaFWxIwsJ8EDSK3zkB1-qng=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Great place to stay. From the time i checked in to time  I checked out. There’s always a friendly face at the lobby ready to greet you. The rooms are great. Renovated bathrooms are awesome.  I had stayed at the Western Inn before, and now I can see all the improvements that have been done. Totally worth the stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mariadelaluz Rodgz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEHO-YuvIE5TVxn9Dysqmk22lcUsJOmGCdGCfFXRbH_XyNxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Walking distance to Old Town San Diego historic park. Room was very clean which I truly appreciate 🥰 price excellent for last minute. And then we got a coupon for breakfast at old town🥰👍🏼","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Stevee G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-Ojv9PXRLaT1pbSabTgcn1U_SCqfNsVJNlTerxL3-DKN_tu0TIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For an old remodeled hotel i couldn't have been happier. Room was clean, location was so close to amazing thijgs to do, the apricot, sea world, easy access to Uber and Lyft, it wws quiet, the bed was comfy. What i didnt like was that my hotels.com app screwed up the year and I had no reservation. While they had a room I was able to take it was almost double than what would have been on the app. I wish they'd had been more accommodating on price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rita Road","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULiw1f9whQ5czmF5jtrPM24QNk5RVAxtTNJUzNsvvVBZtvYkk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I booked a room through Expedia here. It’s a little further away from all of the restaurants and shops, but if you don’t mind a short walk or getting an Uber, it can work out fine.

I was given my room with Wi-Fi access . I tried to connect on both my phone and Chromebook that night and it was not finding it. As I was tired, I dropped it and try again in the morning. Although it found it this time, it would not connect and gave a message that I’ve never seen before saying it was due to other networks in the area. I then went down to the front desk to discuss with the hotel desk Clark. He was not the least bit interested and said it had to be my device because no one else was having that issue. I tried to read him the message and he shut it down and said it’s my devices. I know it’s not because I had just used it the same day at a different place of business. I like people that solve problems, not rude desk clerks that don’t have any interest in solving a problem with the guest. I will be asking for a partial refund because I would not have chosen this hotel. If I knew there was no Wi-Fi access.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Adriana Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6NZF3DCt836SobQhe3cJy4wC9r8TMlJJqzs7AGL-0CUcGyA_Daw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"🌮 Great location! This is my second time coming here for a chile relleno, and while I’m used to a different kind of sauce, it still hit the spot 😋. The rice and beans were flavorful — which says a lot, since that’s usually what I judge the hardest on! 👏
Unfortunately, my agua de tamarindo was a bit of a letdown 😕 it tasted watered down and generic. I’d definitely recommend tweaking the recipe for that one or stop serving it because it was not good

🚗 Parking is limited, but it’s a quick in-and-out spot, and they were very busy, which is always a good sign! 🙌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8fjBlPJ-MMMV7HvaIUaEU&fid=0x0:0xdb57803e248cc725"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"MeatMan951","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-gOL-65hI4fqaQ-GPAPxYt6YkAfBWnyVInikWteHtjODWPhE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Authentic!! [{"Name":"Brian J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJAOyWL_qDOmx0pGvVILuNnwwYI15tnOBoosstUDCif6YOhYo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town San Diego is a fun spot to wander around. Tons of history, colorful shops, and great Mexican food everywhere you turn. It’s touristy, but in a good way. Easy place to spend a few relaxed hours eating, shopping, and soaking it all in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDERuY67AGhGPQ7kjarwgSg&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2026-1-6"},{"Name":"Adnan Karim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHFezR3WDIg-3x_cdQQ-USCU7bFTJJ57EPyLMDPHn3fMrs9NhulA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town San Diego is a tourist attraction in San Diego and one of my all-time favorite go-to places for vacation. This tourist attraction is 230 acres and bordered by Interstate 8 to the north, Interstate 5 to the west, and Mission Hills to the east and south. It is the oldest settled area in San Diego and is the site of the first European settlement in present-day California. It contains Old Town San Diego State Historic Park and Presidio Park, both of which are listed on the National Register of Historic Places. This place has over 35 historic sites and museums with unique merchandise. Fiesta de Reyes, Bazaar del Mundo, Cafe Coyote, the State Park, the Old Town Market and many other stores throughout Old Town are amazing places to find unique items. There are also over 30 amazing restaurants in Old Town serving most types of cuisine.

Old Town San Diego is one of San Diego’s most popular destinations. It is conveniently located within walking distance of a major transit center that is close to most restaurants, hotels and shops in Old Town. Old Town San Diego has  a quaint atmosphere; streets filled with the historic culture of the many traditions left behind. San Diego's Cinco de Mayo celebration is held in Old Town every year. The Old Town Art Festival takes place in October of each year. San Diego's Dia de los Muertos is annual community-wide celebration held every November 1 and 2. Fiesta Navidad is a two-day Christmas festival in December, highlighted by the Mexican tradition of Las Posadas, which re-enacts the story of Mary and Joseph's journey to Bethlehem for the first Christmas.

Old Town San Diego is definitely worth a visit. It is a good place to learn more about California history and enjoy a vibrant Mexican atmosphere without having to cross the border. It is also a great place to buy some souvenirs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALrA_t-qgaygW61L1KFAuJ&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Juan Huerta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocImaAnf4FpyhxEg0UDdTPnES13h8N_B362uhiXouBTjVuFhjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Old Town San Diego is a wonderful place for a fun-filled family day! You’ll find everything from authentic Mexican-made souvenirs to delicious traditional Mexican food. During the month of October, the area comes alive with vibrant Día de los Muertos celebrations — from beautifully decorated ofrendas to marigolds displayed throughout the streets. It’s a great place to visit if you want to experience the rich Mexican tradition of Día de los Muertos or simply enjoy a day surrounded by culture, history, and great food.

You have to try the elotes and churros from Plaza Reyes they are great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBch4z1THY3TMASdbDUwUR8&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Pankaj Jaiswal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFCtx0CIKDGo9xZ6lQivIs7Rj3zmFfYUJAq6rWoy3QoolKozpS6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent place to learn about San Diego's early establishment and history. Start at the information center. Lot of good shops and museum style in isit to old houses displaying the establishment from 1800s.

It's next to the Old Town trolley station. Easy walk.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDijIla3cm8S8utFjVRvBSt&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2026-1-13"},{"Name":"Gina Hodge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6iqFkZirsLF6IeIENlYhYDU6_XBm4dLzgFqCBCSfaizDWX9Ni=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A lovely walk back in time. Old Town is full of charming shops and great places to eat. The hidden gem is the little alleyway shops—you’ll find more affordable, unique, and interesting items tucked away there. Definitely worth exploring beyond the main streets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgBORqpDm4B-utLTDEsbBN&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Rodney Regala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgVD_G8EcxXYBPvwiLapm5cbRJAmFHZcHu3ts1j7jeIfCgqLqy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just what the name implies…
Old Town brings you back to the birth of San Diego. Shops and restaurants are housed in the historic buildings. You’ll find unique trinkets and souvenirs throughout the park. If youre interested in history there’s a museum and periodic businesses (staff wears the appropriate attire too) that show & tells you about the early years of San Diego. Bring comfy shoes for the good amount of strolling you can do.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgalS5A4OLfuc_wRp-Rodr&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Paul Economon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSU-f1Vu59UgDyqPmMwFWdncJDlWDwORV4zQ27q5QHebwJii20fA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a must visit for anyone visiting the San Diego area. You will love all the old structures. It has a complete Latin America feel. It's like visiting Tijuana without the crime and garbage. There are a ton of freaking fantastic restaurants. Live music. Shops. And everything is affordable. It's safe, historic and magical.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRKDjLrljDy548M9I1tjfl&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2025-9-7"},{"Name":"Mike Seitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0wHpAsyJ3y8piZN25JQnMyuCvpLHjmlOQ4MUGykGtmaGNYA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited the week of Christmas and lucked out by finding a parking spot in the lot behind Immaculate Conception. If you can't find a spot, you can go across the street at park on the road between Caltrans and the Hilton Garden Inn. After 5pm and on weekends, you can park in the Caltrans lot. Little bit more walking, but if you hate looking for parking, this is your option.

Old Town is always fun to visit. All the shops and laid back atmosphere make for a very enjoyable experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDT0Odmzf3ALRkr6QUo1liG&fid=0x0:0x30cec24df5e87fa6"],"When":"2026-1-2"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Stephanie Chacon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJc2Z6VhSj97XniwinEmG66kItMOIAyviMwjE4OciYuVAc6WA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bara Bara never disappoints! The food is absolutely delicious, and every time we visit the place is spotless and well taken care of. The atmosphere is fantastic and welcoming, which makes the experience even better.

The service is a solid 10 out of 10. Our server today, Pedro, was incredibly attentive, respectful, and engaging — he kept great conversation and made us feel right at home. I ordered a margarita and it was fantastic.

The food always comes out on time; we’ve never been left waiting around. Honestly, I’d come back just for the chips, salsa, and beans alone — they’re that good.

Highly recommend Bara Bara!

Pedro is a phenomenal bartender and truly a master of his craft. Great customer service is hard to find these days, but if you come here, you’ll definitely experience it with Pedro. He makes you feel like family — like you’re coming home for a drink and a great time.

GO BILLS!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB5nkasW5ToDW4WgK8gpPP2&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-12-14"},{"Name":"Melia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXja4ydA2CmRwCvm4rrxH1gbtk9NWpC1qYcsV-ZaeSjfUt1SSN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You had me at complimentary *seasoned* chips and salsa. We sat outside and really enjoyed the colorful atmosphere and stunning decorations. We ordered the nachos and the fajitas and both did not disappoint. Even though Old Town was packed (we were lucky to find a parking spot near the restaurant), we were seated immediately which was nice. Really enjoyed our time here and spent some time walking around Old Town after our meal to try and burn off some of those chips and salsa.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCeY2e6jbt47NX_4bB2Xaf&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"Chip","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX57EEloGJKUanDBDhNcgh6nRAtqxDG6bglNZAeyXxB1KfEP7-WIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been to Barra Barra many times and their highlight has always been their overall food quality. I've enjoyed everything I've eaten there. However, my absolute favorite thing they serve is their chips, salsa, and black bean dip.  Especially the chips!

I had a combo fajita order with chicken and beef. The taste was amazing. The portion was perfect. My nephew got the mole which had amazing flavor as well. The price was reasonable for the service and quality of food we got.

The staff was very friendly. It wasn't very busy at the time but for some reason never got our water refilled until we asked for it. Otherwise, no complaints.

I do highly recommend Barra Barra as the best place to eat if you're in Old Town!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCmJykL51-rFsVOEkJ1Wa9M&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-9-18"},{"Name":"Marian Grant","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtSOrtTA5OF8o96VUhm6LX-O4ykHYZfoKPv-t84YPRIocG0VfcIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s been years since I last visited this restaurant. We came to celebrate my birthday and this restaurant did not disappoint. I can say this restaurant has not lost its favor! Victoria was our server and she was wonderful. She the most upbeat and bubbly personality. She brought out our drinks and the margaritas were just as delicious as I remember. Service is fast here. I enjoy all of the Hispanic decor. You several areas of dining to choose from.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCP0bK3-9LetaTwWaiKW8Mh&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"Pete D.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViNvghbketPeRMRvP6op1D3czZclZbZawYdMrf0F3nRa9l_Cry=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super good, and our server was so nice. Also, they allow dogs on the patio. And she gave us a little bowl of water for them. Additionally, they've got some very nice vegetarian options. And can substitute things around to make them vegan or whatever.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA5koLjDFceNKEm72IuutTZ&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2026-1-22"},{"Name":"Jeremy Guzman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhVFv2S-1wQHtVzyFqI9ndzyJ2ieS8PLq6Bxwt1ITRqOAc3_Jgow=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We saw this place as we were in Old Town area. What are two nieces.. they had the kids eat free with the purchase of an entry. The chips and salsa were great..Ice tea was good as well. Had the steak burrito and chicken tacos. It was very good. Service is good. Both flour and corn tortillas are made fresh. Service was good as well. This is in a tourist area, so it's good still. But since the prices are bit high we won't be back soon. Other than that it's recommended. 👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7VDK4JczH6pvFjb4Eh_02&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Alejandro Estrada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXY33_rMZlN30gb3gNg-2li0NE6HIwOlxwIl8K0ty7ILtoE_fjRKw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was amazing. I will come back again for next time I want to add two over medium eggs on top of my enchiladas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQwjpkjjNHevZQAK06E5fP&fid=0x0:0xbea262b8f2943f67"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"Jimmy James","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmXx74DBiW21UvIg3W2pj2piXHy4kQAhzXdbhX38dzyMOnriiitA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Manuel was fantastic.

Great destination for San Diego locals, we will be back often.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Qian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLinEKwLgJakWaK77Z_iP4GxQ_LKgBxvmZEWCW1nq-P_kisVg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff were extremely, extremely rude. They warned us “No photos” and we followed the rules. First, when we entered, they closed the doors on all studios — that was just preposterous and infuriating. I was checking out an item on the outside while holding my camera in my hand, and they insisted that I had taken photos and threw us out. I tried to show them my camera screen that I hadn’t taken any photos, but they refused to look at it. “Get out, just get out. I’m asking in a good way.” No, that’s not a good way in any measure; that’s textbook disrespectful. Worst shopping experience ever.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rossana O'Donnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPaosdhwMkewDHtow2w2TBa2Zx-9jNlrrHL4J8cWmw8Mrgxg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A unique and colorful complex of stores, a coffee shop, and a cigar shop. Wheelchair accessible.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tonique Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUM2xnwj25iseWyqF9P3xdt23nEFSGSYTaCg6EMbYD2eyARyVJ_-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the Old Town San Diego shops. The vendors were dressed for the scene in old fashion attire. There is plenty to do for young and old. Reasonable shopping prices. I will return next year and take advantage of the bus tour of the entire city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICczc_3ywE\u0026fid=0x0:0x9971ca01db1001da"],"When":"2020-3-20"},{"Name":"Matt Brady","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXB-H_pctFXe2cY7V3ct-7cGldHXp-a33Q3_5rit9Dn92SydDzhMw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went out for a date night with my wife in old town and we stumbled upon this place. We will be back to enjoy some music and coffee for sure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adriana Mendel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz09ScNW4bFPcEZ5CBwe10erfiv0MylguRTFOqvVUVe_vgKAiDng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went for a show at Java Joe's. The performances were great and the vibe of the whole place was wonderful. Definitely a great spot for locals or non-locals to go enjoy live music and more in Old Town.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The selections were great. There was plenty of food and choices. Had a nice breakfast 😋.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louis M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLe_ouVaPIu_tXb7sCI5c_hUL_HxDlYdI1IeHO-Hg66EfZ32w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very nice and pleasant. A very beautiful and inviting place. Very well kept rooms and beautiful landscaping Very well maintained. My favorite place to stay while visiting San Diego. Very friendly and attentive service customer service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEN7FnLHapcKJNA&fid=0x0:0xf2261d3b28c9a9ec"],"When":"2025-5-17"},{"Name":"Erika Kaheaku-Enhada","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHu1KR9Oj94uJLzDS1aT_BfXIwxppB-zqgAls8SDxudMv9lQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We stayed here twice. Our first time was for just one night as we had an early flight out the next day. We enjoyed our stay. The pool was a hit and the restaurant on site served decent enough food with really great margaritas.

Our second time around was for three nights and this was our takeaway:

-The price per night is excellent considering the location and the cost of other comparable hotels in the area. We paid $175 per night for a two queen bed room with a sofa bed. BW really could charge more and people would likely pay, but I cant say if they’d have the volume they have. The beds were really comfortable. We slept great!

-The location cannot be beat. 10 min from the airport and in the middle of historic Old Town. There’s a main street with lots of shops, restaurants, a Cold Stone for ice cream, and the historic Whaley House and other fun things to do.

-The pool and hot tub are a big hit, making it great for families. We can spend a whole day there.

-The restaurant on site opens at 6am for a decently priced breakfast buffet. 12.95 for adults, 9.95 for kids. They had bacon, french toast, eggs, fresh fruit, oatmeal, muffins, chilaquiles and beans. The card machine was down when we were there, so it was cash or room charge only but wasnt a big deal. We has dinner there too and the tortillas were the best I’ve had.

-There is plenty of street parking, but this was during the week, so I cant be sure about the weekend. Make sure you turn your wheels toward the curb accordingly per Driver’s ED 101. We forgot and received a $91 ticket.

The downfalls:

-SO MANY STAIRS! There are several buildings that make up the grounds and some of them do not have elevators. Building 500 above the pool was offered but with 5 of us, three kids, and several bags, having to bag drag up 3 flights wasnt gonna happen. We stayed in building 600, but going back and forth to the pool required going up and down 60+ steps each time. This is not the place to be if you aren’t able to manage stairs well.

-The rooms are really outdated and in desperate need of renovations. Everything is old.

- No adjoining rooms are available. We had two rooms and our eldest kids were next door, safely with 24 hour access to us, but having adjoining rooms would have been best. Having 5 of us in a room is doable, but not ideal.

-The one parking garage is always full so if you prefer to pay $25 a night for the garage because street parking is full too, you are unlikely to have many options.

-Their key card machine is wonky. The keys didnt work for one of our rooms and several times during our stay, the keys that did work just stopped doing so even though we followed instructions so as not to demagnetize them. We went to the front desk 4 times our first day alone just to get the keys re-programmed. See the so many stairs comnent. After all the up and down, our legs were killing us.

- There arent many options for food beyond Tex Mex, so if you do not like that, you’ll be out of luck. There is one local Italian place. Everything else is all about the Tex Mex cuisine. On day two, I was already not interested in tacos, fajitas, etc.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Devin Landis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcEQgau77g0Uo0yliZ_siDsTf92u-Qzq7-0znO2kWL96jdMihpsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visited for work under the "la presidente" program however! The staff was polite and super helpful!

The attached restaurant tequila factory! Omg food was amazing margaritas were delicious and the breakfast was super! And the wait staff was just amazing

I hope my company always sends me here","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"justin steinmetz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocILh0GvomQxWZ-NczagEgOH3IQKSbFCxXx7ggXNOHjZnmnQyw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The service was good and the food was good quality. They have 3 stray kittens out side of the bar. If you go to this place and you like cat they were super friendly and very hungry and thirsty, so if you can help them out that be awesome.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristin “Kris” Turner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVu_leGuyK_aYWRT4Vtr9_--xTeo0slVXO7qqVAz-dDYunxMhnuUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It was alright. All I can say is that the hotel was accommodating, a hair dryer, shampoo, body wash, and conditioner in the bathroom. The views to the ocean from balconies were stunning. I enjoyed walking around in the evening with my boyfriend. It was a very peaceful end to a wonderful day in Old Town.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Maryj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYcajcez-LlmfFkzWAfIZ6Un3YxcODGBmSLW26HnQU7Gg2DmWy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The room is quaint, comfortable; the food outstanding, Staff are so hospitable, eager to assist, friendly. The grounds well maintained and beautiful.  The location proximity, in Old Town, and to the trains, makes this place ideal. I will be staying here whenever I travel to San Diego. I’m coming back.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Robin Gauvin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNDZkmWHUJYliNCWOAsizQrX1C8B-uzlaLpi_543eiHtgFwi9I5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited in a Saturday later afternoon/early evening. We were able to walk right in and be seated immediately. We had calamari and a few sushi rolls. All was so fresh and tasty. Service was friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDhEFAu4rNV0crpE5q6QlNE&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Michael Christopher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKXvhLHML7o6fRxlzj1qZLKZWQoEyYQPaKE3diq00yH-aTVdA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can’t say enough about Harney Sushi, in old town, San Diego. I’ve been going there for years, cause I’ve always liked the atmosphere and the professionalism of the staff. But now that the new owner has taken over he’s even raised a bar higher. I was there last night with a friend he was raving about it. I told him I told you so. I would recommend it seven days a week Matter fact I may go back tonight.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAvkAtXA_yzAEzIiiP5uaoS&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-12-10"},{"Name":"Jen L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ1iWgfOiLOnI656a0RFUrlCE2Ej5IU0_Wnqxx1MERGpNG1Aw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Decided to stop into Old Town after dropping off some relatives nearby. We noticed a craft fair was happening but luckly found some street parking nearby since the lots were full. As we were exploring the fair my daughter was getting hungry and we were taking a look at the various menus for the resturants arpund the area. Harney Sushi opened while we were taking a look at their menu, so we were the firat ones seated. Also noticed too they took the SD synergy cards (purchased from Costco). We had them onhand so lunch was discounted since those gift cards are a warehouse deal this month. My husband and I shared an appitizer (shimp tempura), tuna takaki, and two sushi rolls. The fish was fresh was the combos for their specialty rolls was delicious. We ordered the I Dare You and the Sea Spider. They were yummy. My daughter ate most of the tempura, but she also had the kids bento. They subsituted the chicken teriyaki for the pork tonkaksu for her. She enjoyed the bento as well and because she ate most of the tempura, the rice, edamame, and strawberries (with chocolate) we boxed her pork tonkaksu. So now she will have that for lunch tomorrow with the leftover rice. Service was fantastic and by the time we left there the place was half full with folks enjoying a Saturday lunch. Great place for a family lunch.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZ6JeHEb3V4mnBuc65gaS9&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-6-8"},{"Name":"K A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvYeVsdcSJ107n6l5bJwohwYa3aDUWP_FvADZlAh0uPBieikZF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Overpriced. The nigiri was meh. Quality of the fish is not worth the price. Rolls are packed with cream cheese, mayo and other ingredients that mask the medium tier quality fish.

Their California roll is the best one. That says a lot.

Paid 150 for two adults and a child. No alcohol. That's including happy hour items.

Used to come here regularly back in the day when they had the harney club. They got rid of that and the quality seemed to go down with it. But they're busy so good for them.

They put restrictions on the synergy gift cards so beware.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhADj_kub-Ge9zM4MvnEw4gq&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Mika Beckley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUHD1lJiHA6oETB4XMyrm6dp459Y0xJaHrB5EZMltFZYgqHeZM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our private dining experience with Manny and Josue from Harney Sushi was absolutely outstanding. They transformed the space into an intimate, beautifully set-up dining experience that felt so special. The sushi was fresh and delicious, and their service was warm, attentive, and seamless from start to finish. Manny and Josue truly went above and beyond to make the evening unforgettable. Highly recommend them for anyone looking to create an elevated, personalized dining experience at home.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDFYq_nHfmKHl3Tf0rqwhKU&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"John J Ryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIsPWYhv4bze71hxeB02q5eYzbGdcwCdU9Hq6wMEPu-NYXLYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Totally unexpected to find such a great sushi place in Old Town San Diego. Very good quality fish, top notch presentation, friendly staff. It’s not a “cheap” place, but well worth the money! Will eat there again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lowell Tonjes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcyX86pxiVSeOKMxrfHmz7U7D6BBLWk305aS4_jCYRz80GVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good music. Better food. The best service. Sat up at the sushi bar had great service from Jahir. Sushi chefs were very kind attentive even not answering their phones. I’m from KC and this place made me feel like I wasn’t from out of town. Food is fantastic as well prices look high but the food is worth it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jhaysie Castorena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW87oP8pLNPWtKo1DUnwsmFk-T6vRDtZMPy7YeYTHdlFLccP_7r=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marcela was a wonderful bartender! She listened to all of my needs and answered all of my questions in regard to taste, texture and ingredients I was unaware of! I ended up with two bottle of hot sake, miso soup, pork gyoza, a crispy salmon hand roll and the Kama Salmon entree! Every thing was fantastic and was surprisingly not as much money as originally thought. Overall 10/10 restaurant and service was phenomenal!! Put it on your recommended list if you already have not!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3eEp14msFmBGOTLPg3hiB&fid=0x0:0x3b1dc7bff80753b9"],"When":"2025-12-3"}]
