user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Emelia Katysovas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVopApStlb9flDYUa29WXutjEO5Y46tF0a2UbJB3FoeFQb94b_HTw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I took my daughter (4) and my mom to tea for their birthday and it was such a wonderful and cozy authentic afternoon tea. We were given several amazing teas and the food was delightful and delicious. A lot of time and thoughtful preparation was put into every aspect of tea.

The house adds charm to the experience. My daughter was given a special, fun plate of kid friendly treats and sandwiches. She also was given her own tea pot of apple juice when she had her fill of hot tea.

I would highly recommend visiting the Coral Tree Tea House for a fun, authentic, relaxing and sweet experience. The staff was also so kind and caring and even sang their own rendition of "happy birthday". The experience was exceptional from start to finish. We will be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBr7FqV_pedT4fIkzvk3mfA&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Teena Malicsi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3Q3HQjDXp1HBRsGgXGkf7dTZyTeuugMuKmnJwIRZJ4GwH5DI-3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently took my girlfriends, who were visiting from out of town, for a delightful Afternoon Tea experience. We truly savored our time together in this charming establishment, an ideal setting for a ladies' day out. As we settled into our cozy table, we were enveloped by a warm ambiance that encouraged conversation and laughter. The selection of teas was impressive, offering a delightful array of flavors, each served alongside an exquisite assortment of pastries and finger sandwiches, beautifully presented on tiered stands. Nestled within the picturesque historic district of Old Town, the venue's quaint surroundings added to the overall charm, making our afternoon enjoyable and memorable as we indulged in conversation and culinary treats.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKzIzebgofbmNw&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2025-5-13"},{"Name":"Natalie Viernes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWhO3m06tsXVyQgg-SLGJkJvDlczDV_712zFB8pt1b9yHHQXGAMXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away in a serene park near Old Town, Coral Tree Tea House is a picturesque gem that exudes charm from the moment you step in. Parking spots are ample, making it a breeze to access.

We had the Queens HighTea, a 1-hour-30-minute experience that was nothing short of exquisite. From the apple salad to the diverse assortment of Tea and Savory Sandwiches, along with the homemade pastries and petite desserts— we enjoyed every bite.

They are committed to accommodating dietary restrictions without compromising on taste or quality. They take their tea, food, and service seriously, evident in the experience we had.

We enjoyed insightful conversations with the ladies about the history, business, and inspirations behind their concept and products.

Do note, reservations are a must via phone call only.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICliuG8iQE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2023-11-15"},{"Name":"T Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYCJgNRR6Nkc1yPbQkZuNtcF5eFSVHEZ5FFQxNddbJcn9CnnfI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Located in beautiful Heritage Park, a charming historic area in Old Town, you will find this gem of a tea house. I’ve been to pretty impressive afternoon teas while living in Japan, so I was a little reluctant but I’m glad I was proved wrong. The ladies who manage this establishment take pride in serving you and make everything homemade in their vintage kitchen- from the fresh cream to the scones, to the warm spanakopita and tea sandwiches. Savory and sweet tea pastries, with your choice of two different teas, makes for a wonderful time with friends. It was fun to dress up and really absorb the experience. I highly recommend! A few things to note and be aware of: They change their menu monthly (I believe), they have ample parking, you must make a reservation and leave a deposit, the space inside of the tea house is extremely small and tight. You will be very close to the guests next to you. There was a large party when we visited and the room was filled with laughter and conversation throughout our dining experience. Dress up and plan for some extra time to walk the grounds- the homes are fascinating and charmingly picturesque.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh5que9AE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2023-2-12"},{"Name":"Ashley White","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqdnReqKThyQW8pDGOn7Ft0Welze6MRowcL0L5B4X-CKyLvY93=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely loved this tea house. One of the best ones I've been to. The ladies who run it are simply delightful. I enjoyed the stories they shared. They allowed us to bring our dogs and sit on the front porch and it was a beautiful, peaceful view. The scones were my favorite. I never would've chosen a chocolate coconut tea off a menu, so it's smart to make that the house tea. It was surprisingly delicious. I also ordered Lucy's and my mom chose Creme Brulee, both were great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDJkOHRzQE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2023-7-9"},{"Name":"Magnolia Crow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9TtUxGycQ9_eQDbdgiANre_c8eF_z3dbiNftLeDnsf9CwRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing customer service from the get-go, Pam squeezed us in last minute and was absolutely delightful to speak with. Traditional tea treats were served in a most beautiful historic home and district. Everything was thoughtfully set up and no detail was spared providing my daughters and I a most memorable afternoon tea! We'll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJhqiOsQE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2023-6-25"},{"Name":"Elka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHnzQwpYy6OB3xWPPYhTIiEGNorzK1fL5CezpW6EuLfLCnoq3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our reserved group had nine people. We were seated in the front room next to the little shop. Pam and Blanche were our guides and there was also a gentleman. The ladies were so sweet, took our photos, and told us some interesting history. First, we were given the house tea, Coral Tree Tea. Second, we picked two more as a table. Third, we were given a three tier plate offering savory and sweet treats. They gave us a bracelet and showed us a coin. There is one bathroom in the building. I hope to return. I think it would be so fun to work here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDlm8nk7wE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2023-12-4"},{"Name":"Hali Clacher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ-IebVNRgs0qg_tihnN4sEnphwvpr7cbapDEJo0YU7bxs831A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"10/10 would recommend for a friend date!

My best friend and I had the queen set. We were able to pick out two teas from the menu. I picked the vanilla black tea and she picked the shallimar ( I think that's how it's spelt). We were served finger foods that were really delicious. All food is made in house according to the owner! The tea is kept warm over tea lights and the setting is perfect to spill the tea (chat).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDOmPHtygE&fid=0x0:0xd4c8fcf565a5f95f"],"When":"2022-6-26"}]

Adult signature required for delivery… but GLS apparently misses delivery commitments all of the time per Zee at Old Town Tequila.  Rather than hold his shipper accountable, he prefers to argue with his customers. It’s all in the attached screen shots. The only reason it’s not a 1-star review is because of their selection.  However, will never order from this merchant again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYaQjzZ0llG7lxc7NJicvz&fid=0x0:0xae779f0185618947"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Stacey Cooks","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIcVughyv-H23BTnJYIbROWNwsKLfThEnvWenXm4OfA1exm8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This place is the absolute worst for their shipping options and resolutions. I ordered a bottle of Tequila upwards of $85. The seal was broken, the bottle leaked majorly not just a little bit, and their resolution was oops, we'll give you a credit of $15. Like why I would want to purchase another shipment that you aren't concerned with most of the product leaking out and unsealed bottle which sounds very unsafe to drink out of. I wasn't offered a new shipment or the option to ship their purchase back for a better refund.

I would never order a shipment from this place again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBvhf7T6o7HpnIe-TtmWnCQ&fid=0x0:0xae779f0185618947"],"When":"2025-10-15"},{"Name":"Lefty fingers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYxl0m5NfzFtI3N-MM6iuGxf4AZ1LlI8hqLeJ8tganHoaesF2d=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great service and huge variety of Tequila.

Wow!  the selection they have is fantastic..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKHg2YfHtq7FlQE&fid=0x0:0xae779f0185618947"],"When":"2025-5-23"},{"Name":"Mihir & Sofia Pearson-Shah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOaPHHD7zovIR02OEzU9uyxDaqP_gObUL45A560jBh3jC4yWqe=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had to ship gifts to around 30 different addresses for the holidays, they were so incredibly responsive over the phone and via email, which made the process seamless and so easy. In addition, the holiday gift note that I requested them to include for each of the boxes were unexpectedly handwritten, making it even more of a premium presentation. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"영광","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKIzaBYYUbkRjrHR3VmkUaTzUh4G6gW3Lrm9cJS0C6bOXwtaw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Before visiting the store, I checked by email to see if they had 'Iztic Reposado Cristalino' in stock. I was a bit surprised when I arrived and found out it was sold out, but luckily, I was able to find a different grade.

I had bought this tequila once before in Cancun. Since then, I’ve been searching for it and finally found it here.
The price of the Extra Añejo made me hesitate, but since it's hard to find, I decided to go for it.
After trying it at home, I was really satisfied—it tastes amazing.

I'm very happy I visited the store because they have such a great selection of tequilas.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIxOec5QE&fid=0x0:0xae779f0185618947"],"When":"2025-4-7"},{"Name":"Elliott Serbian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyq-V1yKyrGJaGrWg2KMryOQZt7hwQtVUXBtx08elpIcJjwFM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This place is a rip off.

Yesterday I came in and bought two Fireball Whiskey single shots, and was charged $2.16 after tax (I'm tapering down, so I only need what I need for the night and don't want more than is necessary)
Today I came in and bought one, and the jerk behind the counter charged me $2.49 for one. They are labeled as 5/$5, and I told him I was charged a very different price yesterday. I asked him to scan the item so I can get a receipt and see the price but he refused. If there was another liquor store nearby which sold singles, I would have told him to eat it, but I needed it so I paid and left. I'll stop somewhere else tomorrow, and never come back to this hole. Terrible customer service by a guy obviously stealing either from his employer or customers.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Very beautiful nature experience with bird chirping,squirrels everywhere,  and open terrain and trees. We enjoyed the quick walk around the church and enjoyed the view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyOcpUIYmITDA_uFWlHF8Q&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Scott Rowden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXp4khaWn0mz3n3QPgWP3Xm3Zq7xyH3HwFjL90bZ04GX76ZAmA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Short, beautiful trails radiate from upper parking area. Lush verdant foliage offers plenty of shade, and old historical sites spread throughout park.
Superb spot to watch sunsets and/or have a picnic. Presidio itself is a significant historical treasure worth visiting.
This is a special place right in the heart of SD.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDB1K0bJ_rUDWEfHrhrnd4k&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Mamie Zembal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJDXrVACqYnqcPjkB1xwBMIaeCpsA3VeC0LbXsIAVqwZd0dhpe-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Beautiful place. It was quiet and peaceful when we went and explored. There is a museum, trails and picnic areas. There were some homeless sleeping around the building but weren't a problem.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKdyo2osZeEcqAXEuqgOKj&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Saif Alameri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCwGSE1VjD5ocTqmSFjz-rY48LP-vP1cmnjuOXU7jxIRp7P3-9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This beautiful place is perfect for spending some quality time with your loved one. It’s quiet, has easy parking, and offers multiple views that are ideal for watching the sunset.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKhtOsg73SV7PAsD5L9Pbb&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2025-9-24"},{"Name":"Angel Almanza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXXSLHUG6lKn1vz6zd2iEfxYJmku1APurOXcUEsVLvRDO4xXfJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Presidio Park is beautiful and peaceful — perfect for walks, picnics, or just relaxing with great views of San Diego. The historic feel, clean trails, and shady trees make it a favorite spot to unwind. Always calm, safe, and well-kept. Definitely a 5-star park! 🌳✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZ69guG62lzCMOTrBgePpH&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Lina Eryani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXMAjS1Jc46fIPRFrzSarae6BPLchngA53QZR17jWPH8kKGdg5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Presidio is a stunning public park in San Francisco, offering breathtaking views of the ocean and the iconic Golden Gate Bridge. The park is rich in history and culture, as it was originally established as a military post by Spain in 1776 before transitioning to Mexican control and eventually becoming part of the United States in 1846. For over 200 years, it played a key role in the military history of the region, and many of its historic buildings and landmarks still stand today.

The park is a haven for nature lovers, with several walking and hiking trails that wind through forests, open meadows, and scenic overlooks. There are plenty of seating areas to relax and take in the surroundings, as well as a large grassy field where pets can play freely. For those looking to grab a bite or a coffee, there’s a cozy café within the park.

Weekends at the Presidio are lively and bustling with visitors, adding to its charm. Free parking is available on weekends, making it convenient for families and tourists.
Keep in mind that it can get windy, so it’s a good idea to bring a hat or jacket. Whether you’re walking the trails, enjoying the ocean views, or learning about its history, the Presidio is a beautiful spot to spend the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDv3Y3EeQ&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2024-12-23"},{"Name":"Benjamin Hoga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeKCHzFlj5RaUbPJ4ME678u1cNoknGxjzjUNqOTePUfazSS3M94w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you've never been here, it's certainly worth exploring. May you gain an expanding degree of unimaginable internal fulfillment 🎉","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBrC5uW-yCz0qxGYfT4Dmma&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2025-10-28"},{"Name":"KA Boom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7sLUG8LeWPolFebHePO4ARuY3VAcvgm6XRhZT-Dh9z0exX9mG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Such a beautiful place and so many nice restaurants to stop and have lunch, highly recommend walking around and enjoying a day at presidio park and just for your information:

Presidio Park in San Diego is where the San Diego Presidio was originally established in 1769 by Spanish settlers.
It was the first permanent European settlement on the Pacific Coast of the present-day United States.
The fort was built to protect Spanish missions and settlers from attack and to help control the surrounding territory.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwVS7kgkkDO5dMAJyiH76I&fid=0x0:0x93634f654e243c50"],"When":"2025-9-15"}]

[{"Name":"Jasmine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKYoA-XAAhoc0rBHFblYL-_-nlxeP8KXTGLOARsidKlmPXHFA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Oh my goodness , I don't know where to start because this is like the best Italian restaurant in San Diego. From the time you walk in to the time you walk out everyone is so friendly, polite and welcoming. It's almost like eating at grandmas house!!! Grandpas in this case because the owner SAL is amazing. He has the perfect staff. All smiles, everyone is so attentive and patient. Now for the food... Oh my Gosh !! Literally finger licking good!! The salads, the pastas, the pizza, calamari, fried shrimp, the soup... the cheese bread !! Mmhmm me and my family ate all of that in one setting and I could not complain about one single thing !!! They should be in a food magazine or advertised on tv if they haven't been already, that how awesome this place is. 10/10 from my party of 5!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCBy6s_edQv3yJ8zccOiWoP&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2025-10-7"},{"Name":"Bre Stotts","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRiP4cilMCCo6-wZlzq8--7gGzEc6ajrqb09K6hmoLpTL9DjZ43w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The service here was awesome and the food mostly good. Great calamari, beef ravioli and pizza. Didn’t love how the sausage turned out in meat lover’s calzone but it was HUGE which some may love! Overall a good experience and we would try again if in the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAE0NxREYeqT_ZoSbj2U4J9&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Deborah Waters","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU82XpCrSfPV52ujmfUDLrdEHdPitPgZKo85c7FZ-T-bWfblWGj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We happened to find this restaurant because it was near the Garten. It turned out to be a great decision because their food is out of this world. We had chicken marsala veal parmesan chicken parmesan spaghetti primavera chicken piccata minestrone soup dinner salads that came with the dinners that were huge cheese garlic rolls out of this world. We will absolutely be back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClQeXqfXjqCmK1ZlQ43FZM&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2025-8-8"},{"Name":"Jasmine I Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkwISylhOI9jqJmqRUZR4aageNl15QrHPMl0SHn8QGT9No-R-7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time trying this Italian restaurant. Loved the food we were recommended & ordered. Portions are good and definitely enough to share between 2 people. We ordered their meats pizza & a half and half pasta. Angel hair with shrimp and white wine sauce with the other half ziti and sausage with broccoli. I don't usually eat sausage as I don't like it BUT THIS sausage was thee best I've ever had. Very good and it didn't give me heartburn or have an aftertaste. Got some spumoni for dessert to end the perfect meal right. Definitely coming back on our next trip to San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBj5K6cywMhORxcCsg9pwn8&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2025-7-14"},{"Name":"Greg K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVteB3SxUow5d-uRC0xzibGgkGf_MkBA9Sm3LqcVqdWw-N7nH-a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went there for a business lunch. It was loud in one room, so we went to a separate room and it was totally quiet and we were able to achieve all that we needed to do for the business meeting. The food was great and the service was really quick so it was exactly what we needed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKxsi_0Q7lfTS07u4BEsiM&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2025-7-31"},{"Name":"Taryn “TAZ Photography”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsAFmvwmXOXxdnQoYnh6qwm5SLbWtw4iqgya413WEZsXW-Xm4E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had an excellent experience at Sardina in July! The calamari was the best I’ve ever had, the salads were fresh, and the cannolis were absolutely delicious. I ordered the lobster ravioli; it was good, though a bit on the fishy side. The atmosphere was wonderful, especially outside, though the echo under the building’s overhang can make it a bit noisy. Service was friendly, but we did have to ask a couple of times for a few forgotten items. Overall, a great experience, and I’ll definitely be coming back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karina Rondberg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV68SsUZq_V3Dk0EgCIbe4-GQYJtO2h3EIb3E5CxcfJnwJstm4PPg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service and the atmosphere are very good. The waitresses are very pleasant and nice to interact with.
The food is so so.
Ordered the Salmon and the Pasta Ala Giovanna - the food came too quickly (which was already suspicious)  and it was nothing special really. Wasn't even able to finish the dish.
The waitress did offer to change it, but I didn't want to.

The pizza was very good on the other hand :) and the kids were happy .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDdjfjBkgE&fid=0x0:0xc77502d5f3f5e105"],"When":"2024-2-26"},{"Name":"Olga S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUH6pY1izGZiPOLZO3_KThqcpf0idLspSaEH8WCLtZMNZgBIz4q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered through uber eats. Wanted to do a hotel in room birthday dinner. Ended up vomiting everything I ate. Please make it right. Disgusting food, undercooked, old products. It was towards closing time and they just messed up. I feel sick on my stomach. I’ll keep contacting until someone makes it right.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"RedBullKC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUE0VNHbFLRgM15VezO8r_lCph6xZrJiQJKrOY8N2GEJYtGIIjNkw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fun and colorful! We enjoyed walking in and out of the shops looking at all the stock! It was enjoyable to see all the vibrant colors of the buildings and the merchandise for sale! They have a little bit of everything! After a great meal at the Casa Guadalahara, it was a perfect place to walk throughout! Enjoy and have fun!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDetYvF4AE&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2022-10-16"},{"Name":"Adam Fryski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb_xg9_IN1jJwwr2HOhKmG6d4mOp5Z0iUUSplHuAcrWFUqQVj7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Not a good restaurant. We have been to many Mexican restaurants and this one was one of the worst ones. The service was terrible and the food was not tasty. I would not come back to this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDeNxaHSsMQZJZP0p8QOL5x&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Carol Lynn McConnell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkRTJj0u068aTGPr8w9YWZQ_K4-JBr6M75dQdXK_3EXPlv2bc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The presentation of high quality arts and crafts is classy and elegant. I collect hand painted ceramic plates, and Bazaar del Mundo has world class examples of many styles. When I’m there, I’m in my happy place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOvej-K2pKDYDQ&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2025-5-9"},{"Name":"Maria Severance","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL33agEqSl8bG3DwHeXzDPlcJ1qqmMaxSK-S3V4R4IcYpQ-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Not a very welcoming place to enter. Every time I’ve gone in, no one greets. Ever! They are too busy with paperwork to look up and say hello. The staff spoke nicely to each other though so maybe they don’t prioritize making a customer feel welcomed.
I guess I’m old school and like to be acknowledged when I enter a store. A smile and a hello never hurts.

I did find warmth, kindness and friendliness at the shops in the Historic Park just down the street from Bazaar del Mundo. I’m looking forward to going back there and skipping Bazaar altogether.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K Mulcahy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgulG6aKptbHno3wdc2UN9HV6Sxb-FdXE0lXk2B-mO914wLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite shop of its kind outside Mexico.  In fact, this wonderful store sells housewares, art, books, jewelry and clothing from many countries but everything exudes a Mexican vibe.  What makes the place really special is how beautifully all the items are curated.  You'll find very high quality things and incredibly beautiful as well.  The emphasis is on authenticity and craftsmanship.  Nothing is dirt cheap but many things are very affordable.  They also have sales, like Christmas ornaments right after the holidays.

I've always found the sales people to be super nice and helpful.  The place is laid out like a mini-mall with separate "shops" specializing in different things.  The largest shop is for housewares:  linens, bedding, fabrics, ceramics, kitchenwares, etc.  Free parking right outside is ample and you're right at Old Town so there's lots of nearby attractions and eateries.  Really, Bazaar del Mundo is so lovely and colorful I get a lift just by coming in.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDi2LSWdw&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2020-11-24"},{"Name":"Indies Windies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULmXSBH5Fusgs2ZIGCwykvpLElSDat4CiWzGlALsoqsIim8Bg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I really loved the design and curation of the shops. The décor, the layout, the way goods are presented everything felt thoughtfully done. But not all items are handcrafted some are mass-produced souvenirs, and those didn’t feel quite as “special.” If you go expecting museum-quality art everywhere, you’ll be disappointed. But if you go expecting finds, surprises, and something to bring home that tells a story you’ll enjoy it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sarah Twamley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ5yA5QyVWxh4NZG8-sZ_VGVFX6yRd6lLf-I6-fSloY5CzUHRVOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An instant boost of happiness and visual splendor!!!!

More than one vendor to enjoy.
Perfect place to buy gift for housewarming, hostess, birthday, or reward formgood behaviour...wink!

Fun place to shop with girlfriends or women in your family.

*Save your appetite and enjoy Guadalajara next door for Mexican food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx3JjpogE&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2023-6-3"},{"Name":"Alex Flippymom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK60LHijfFpgK8aFGmKL2cKbuCaiJVly0jpL9lFwGLF1jzVP6HV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super cute shopping center with lots of little tienditas. The shop that had the pastelitos, also had Mexican hot chocolate, Abuelita brand, mmmm. The churros were fresh, hot and delish!!!😃
The place is mostly a tourist trap with super expensive, but gorgeous Mexican made dolls, clothes, blankets etc and lots of food ! Even a restaurant in the center","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEuMDaEw&fid=0x0:0x65de61a6293a96d8"],"When":"2019-5-22"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Y Núñez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpfB84T45NjRloaMSTXTDLv-lvULHMr8IxwBSGMd3JOQxSr1Zm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely must-visit for spice lovers!
The Crazy Pepper in Old Town San Diego is a hidden gem for anyone who loves hot sauce. They carry an amazing selection of locally made sauces, including some seriously bold options featured on the Hot Ones show. Whether you’re a seasoned spice pro or just getting into heat, they’ve got something for every palate.

Beyond hot sauce, they also offer a great variety of Mexican candy and delicious paletas (Mexican ice cream bars), which are perfect for cooling down after sampling the spicy stuff. The staff was super friendly and knowledgeable, happy to offer recommendations and samples.

If you’re in the area, don’t miss this spot—it’s a flavorful experience from start to finish!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELfR0Mf7ppfTsgE&fid=0x0:0xd7176c09ee053d8e"],"When":"2025-5-9"},{"Name":"Kyle Pittman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmBNluD-miGm6IFySePiWvbxyjt68AaUrw6jYDQAaiXj3tnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you’re a fan of all things spicy, The Crazy Pepper in Old Town San Diego is an absolute must-visit. The shop is packed with an incredible variety of hot sauces, salsas, barbecue sauces, and condiments, many of which are handcrafted locally. The staff is super friendly and knowledgeable—they helped me find the perfect sauce based on my heat tolerance and flavor preferences.

I loved that they have samples available, so you can try before you buy. The shop itself is vibrant and fits perfectly into the charm of Old Town. Whether you’re looking for a mild kick or something to truly challenge your taste buds, this place has it all. I’ll definitely be coming back to stock up on more unique sauces. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC_teb7ygE&fid=0x0:0xd7176c09ee053d8e"],"When":"2025-1-17"},{"Name":"Rahim S.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIBNxBlcRyjl74oVN39-wrIGM8k7LMGo0Se8XoWXAFIBrUu02Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an amazing experience at The Crazy Pepper! The staff was incredibly friendly, helpful, and genuinely passionate about hot sauce they made me feel right at home. They took the time to walk me through their massive selection and even offered some great recommendations based on what I like.

The variety of bottles here is unreal — everything from mild and flavorful to insanely hot (like, challenge your friends level). Whether you’re into smoky, sweet, fruity, or straight-up fire, they’ve got something for every kind of heat lover.

Prices were very reasonable, especially for the quality and uniqueness of the sauces. You can tell they curate their selection carefully many of these you won’t find anywhere else!

Definitely worth a visit if you’re in Old Town San Diego or just love hot sauce. I’ll be back to stock up soon 🔥🌶️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_wlfcDPh1VddUYGXZCgc4&fid=0x0:0xd7176c09ee053d8e"],"When":"2025-7-13"},{"Name":"Matt Boston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9s1l6H-YIn0__evlloMkz4ZiZ6DTI-yGWz85jA8rcsogwvcmL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Huge hot sauce person and this satisfied my cravings for sure. The Awesome Hot sauces are incredible.  The Crazy Pepper sauces were phenomenal as well. I grabbed a couple bottles. Every year I come to SD I come here. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDZ5I797QE&fid=0x0:0xd7176c09ee053d8e"],"When":"2023-9-24"},{"Name":"Martina Malainer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJU_hfU9lhQemdjh4-XgtZAQ4Z2Cvq8a9wYnjYbbxRcdcI4wg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Each time we visited Old Town, we bought gifts for friends and family in this hot sauce store. Today, we picked few bottles and my 7 year old kid bumped a bottle sitting on the edge that fell and broke the cap. The sales associate immediately became rude and aggressively asked us to pay. My kid got scared and started to cry from her intimidation. We paid f$15 for the small bottle, put down the gifts and left.

We are ourselves retailers who carry breakable products including Christmas ornaments, glass candles among other products and we always downplayed it  when customers accidentally broke our merchandise and never asked them to pay.

We had a bad tome trying to calm down our kid.

We will never shop at this store again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOe22bmxrdzbeA&fid=0x0:0xd7176c09ee053d8e"],"When":"2025-6-15"},{"Name":"Amy R. I wish they had the option to add some kind of almond butter or peanut butter and chocolate bits, but the options were way better than the places by the beach and so it seems like that is normal for the area. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I are moving things into our storage unit today nearby and he recommended us to go to this BBQ place for lunch. It definitely felt like a hole in the wall it wouldn't be something that necessarily catches your attention when driving by. Inside is a very cute old school style Saloon. We both ordered the pull pork sandwich, a side of fries, onion rings, and my husband also ordered beef rib on the bone. These bones were huge and the meat just fell off! Everything tasted amazing! I really like that they do not add barbecue sauce on two the sandwiches instead offer it on the side so you can decide the spice level and how much sauce you actually want. Also it's s also dog friendly! They will even offer a bone for your dog. There is indoor and outdoor seating. Limited street parking but was easy to find on the Sunday afternoon.
Overall, really cute spot and highly recommend if you were craving BBQ in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyN8Ij57lnjocWPQs2T0ta&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Sean Whinnery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWczLJAM_1ocaAiRWOzvBarCF6l4l-Ytf5BGaw62thZB7V0zv-i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was hottest day in San Diego and we arrived early.. 15 minutes early. I, a ginger was baking in the sun but they welcomed us in early. That was just the start of the excellent service.

I did the Duo sandwich… very smart choice of both brisket and pulled pork. What an amazing combination! Paired with Cajun fries and I was in BBQ heaven. The sauces were amazing.

I’m glad we drove over 10 miles to get here, this is the BBQ spot. We’ll be back often. I highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKq4Q2rMoLOWX3i4mgwXII&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"jaylin guerrera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaItyjw1BiQxmTD-GnmCoNIWPrgljUocw4AR6_hTNDic1OgBsGqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The woman at the bar was super sweet and attentive while we were ordering and even while eating. She went through the effort of helping pack up our food and she made our first meal of our San Diego trip wonderfully memorable!
The lamb shank, beef brisket sandwich, and pulled pork fries were amazing! Seasoning complimented the meat, and the sauces were equally delicious!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqmXerYLsfldV7No-dg89s&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-11-14"},{"Name":"Zach Sainato","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU1pQGxZVzp6F3258CYLtO_IQVn2P6DXQi5fhnh5LrUc5C_85z8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a quality choice for BBQ within the city limits. The brisket is well smoked and the pulled pork was flavorful. The sauces were excellent and the mac n cheese was tasty. Only qualm was the meats were saturated in juice, atypical for BBQ joints","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzDDIKHt8w_VI0Jq34VXhU&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2026-1-17"},{"Name":"Rasheen Cooke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXa2Go3Ys2fo1TWo0MxXvwtRll83QPTbq2UpVMOR0YlqTgXUx0g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When you think of San Diego, good bbq is the last thing on your mind. Lemme tell you, this bbq joint right here had me thinking I was traveling from Memphis to Texas. This bbq is by far the best I’ve ever had in the west coast. I copped the Lamb Shank and beef Rib; meat was so tender that I could’ve pulled it off the bone with a spoon. Their house bbq sauce comes in three varieties and they all bussin. My fat ass got the Mac and cheese and some onions rings on the side. This place is like the one other restaurants that has an outdoor dog friendly seating area (also have doggie bones if you ask the server). Wifey got a chicken salad which was served with some smoked chicken that was hittin. I’m telling you, I don’t beat around the bush nor do any of that bs; if you want some authentic bbq, get ya ass down to this place and you’ll won’t regret it. Good meat, good treats and good drinks. I couldn’t try the beer since I was driving but every thing draft and all local beer. Get here and hit em up. I even bought all of the bbq sauces.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwk8z0hQE&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-3-28"},{"Name":"Karl Whinnery","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUGzsX5-0p5pX1bdKV4Gf5wzM38gw500CsWqT8rFESVTHY-Idz_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I needed bbq in my life. Been on tour and playing next door and…….. 🤤 success!!!

Bull’s Smokin BBQ is EPIC. Great atmosphere, fast service, and the most important part - epic and delicious BBQ!!

Today I ordered a duo sandwich with brisket and pork and snagged a beef rib. The beef rib is huge and soooooo good.

If you want or need bbq - this is the place to go.

Staff were super friendly as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOXk2fbS94XaqAE&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-6-3"},{"Name":"Lex Horne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWL_q2jRqkZGFoqlenXJAcEq8MV2C1j8CYZkwdpAbDi8pugqXp7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just ordered enough food for 12 people including brisket, pulled pork, chicken, Mac n cheese and baked beans and OMG!!! Everything was delicious from top to bottom. The woman who greeted me on the phone was amazing I should have asked for her name she was so sweet. Highly recommend this bbq spot. We will be ordering from here again very soon. Keep up the great work!!!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dave C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKAuPwUUKdjqJbeTnU_MnhBLyaWYfkRYVySS9LDGVXL5kJsWEOf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I am in town for business and my co-worker recommended this place.  I love me some good bbq and this place has it.  I am a rib person so I got some with my favorite caesar salad.  I too recommend this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDA1oltL1mCXRhSOKxwG9Ht&fid=0x0:0x179d108986bab13b"],"When":"2025-7-2"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Walking into The Huddle feels like stepping straight into a time capsule ... nothing but the prices seems to have changed in the last 30 years, and I absolutely love that. It’s the ultimate neighborhood diner with servers and cooks teasing each other behind the griddle while greeting regulars and even the furry dog patrons outside. Everything is classic, comforting breakfast goodness, plus they sell their own jams and seasonal treats like pies and holiday cookies. If you’re craving a true old-school diner experience, this is the place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAa8-eQEJgL1fCjpa1mrwEV\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2025-12-17"},{"Name":"Jerry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGojdpKotvKCIrSOtTXO2fhiojvTNKLoj5pQ32ys1Cc-1GCllwQA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stumbled upon this during a trip to San Diego.  Everyone was so friendly. Hole in the wall family diner. Reminded me of growing up at my grandmother's house. Was a little chaotic, but that was the charm. Food was delicious abd made with love. Will be definitely be back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"J Miller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb0AYYzDEdtTV5OSqFN10W6J_98g_U4hy9ia8WvkmlxqXEoUc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tuesday special, 2eggs 2 sausage french toast apple butter. $11. So good it didn't last long. Classic diner vibe. Service is perfect and very personable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAg28ngqU2XmseTOkGPDn5y\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2025-10-6"},{"Name":"Teresa Clark","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9e9tekHgaqDIkAfQ15URf78x8KT3mX8rtVpIFpBQ7ktf9-Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good food.The staff was great.  The staff made us feel welcome and appreciated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCcgw5VI9vqc9hJLQP_WKHz\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"kristina kiehn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXqD8UfJEtX3fVE5foOWMm3divHqFszR-9JX5EiVcXMqXQXeCGD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My boyfriend and I stopped at Huddle for breakfast while we visited San Diego for the day. We were seated right away. We ordered French toast, chicken fried steak, biscuit and gravy, plus a cinnamon roll to go! We loved the French toast! It was delicious and thick! The chicken fried steak was different than we’re used to but good! The gravy stood out! And the home fries were good too! The biscuit and gravy was yummy! Now the cinnamon roll we brought on our way out. I wasn’t entirely excited to get it because a lot of the time I’m disappointed by cinnamon rolls. I was wrong with this one! It was very yummy! I was sad it was gone when we finished it! I hope to come back to the Huddle in the future! Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh-Z7ZWA\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2023-3-13"},{"Name":"Liz Noska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXn6RSLb-im1Y50mNE_ITBHzXyMVdHklC9YjI7qfAxDXGG9ifPU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of my favorite breakfast spots. I’ve been eating here for years. We try to go at least once a month. My favorite dish- kielbasa, eggs, and hash-brown.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnjoSHYg\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2024-9-26"},{"Name":"Felicity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2p0Le-PMxO5_1GXj3OMalG02p3VFpXnWX7rbNEIG07s_X_7Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"\"I am home.\" This was exactly how I felt.\n\nMy dad and I were seated right away. It was nothing fancy but it was one of the warmest dining experience I have had. This is what a classic local business looks like. Dad had their Thursday breakfast special. Again, nothing fancy, just 2 eggs, 2 sausages, and 2 pancakes. Very, very reasonable price. The portion was perfect. Definitely will come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl-vumPA\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2023-11-17"},{"Name":"Juan Luis Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU915Jm1p9NbO_icuFIv9D2hfip67lvHCXaKnazbiQeNnlE7qqa=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craving an old-school breakfast with charm? Look no further than this hidden gem! This classic American diner might not be fancy, but its delicious food and warm service will make you feel right at home. Homestyle cooking: The daily specials add a touch of variety to their menu of breakfast staples. Wallet-friendly: Enjoy generous portions without breaking the bank. Friendly vibes: The welcoming atmosphere makes you feel like you're part of the family...If you're looking for a no-frills diner experience with fantastic food and friendly service, this is the place to be!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDtwcP23QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x820c14f7ec2de51b"],"When":"2024-2-5"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Yeahoo Whoyah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlmvkmcPwOEwViECgmaNcbNl_o7vRZ8STBYwHJ9-C22c0croQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Tuesday 2:00 PM parked in one of the two India St. curbside spots in front. Lucky! Place was virtually empty,  only 2 or 3 customers on this sunny January day.  I had the good value Lunch Special Pizza and Salad.  A bit more dough than I like, crispy on the edges but soggy in the middle.  Generous portion, I didn’t leave hungry. Southwest facing windows bring in plenty of light but adds a bit too much interior heat.  Concrete countertops and hard walls and ceiling make for harsh acoustics.  Place could use a sprucing up, looks tired and dirty. Service was prompt and easy going.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVudQQBqVWDAc-3lyv53Fh&fid=0x0:0x48658e8c46775861"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Kirk Degler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyEXgHbnOI0QjKjd7eH8b4hD9GCqvalKY2iWPvdp5pJTCeRyI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Pizza was solid. Loved the pepperonis. I do feel like the edges of the pizza were more thoroughly cooked than the center, which was too droopy. I've eaten deepdish pizza by hand but had to use a fork for this. For some that might be fine, but I found it irritating. I'd put the pizza at 6.75/10. The wings were REALLY good! ~9-10/10 for me. I want to go and get the wings again at some point.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDslrDs6o0asgCod7wl0Wk1&fid=0x0:0x48658e8c46775861"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Marci Norris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKTdCl8-DcDNXMGgtxto4wpw0nmMD7D2lQ1PxwKdlwuu_tTbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Live in north county the husband and I are always looking for good pizza places when we come down south.  Pizza e Birra didn’t disappoint!! Wings-FIRE!  Pizza-FIRE!!! I had the white margarita and the hubby had the meat lovers, crust was amazing. That’s a lot coming from a carb and bread lover. The staff was super chill; Isaiah the manager and guys in the back Zack and Leo ( I think, sorry if I was wrong)   Grabbing the teenager next time when we come back!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBKQWrf12biGqI7_sX8HgpD&fid=0x0:0x48658e8c46775861"],"When":"2026-1-3"},{"Name":"Andrew Garner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqRlNgCT8XOZz9V4Q_XQXnamPKSQ9F2CHjNsc8vKl5qykFuA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pizza E Birra is nothing short of incredible. Went here looking for some good pizza & wings and couldn’t have gotten luckier. Not only was the food amazing, but the owner Sam & his staff were top notch. They made me feel like I was right at home. 10/10 will absolutely be coming back often.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTcqf3dSdqEImEoiw5EnLC&fid=0x0:0x48658e8c46775861"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Erik Carlson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7Nj2pyH5g3F4s6YtS-ev2NTGjb_87t-mKY7_k6Vjh-r97OhnN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is seriously the complete package. Excellent recipes, quality ingredients, with service that makes you feel like a close friend.

We ordered the cheesy garlic bread and two regular pizzas. Every pizza on the menu has a well thought out flavor combination, it took us forever to decide! The quality of the ingredients was great plus the crust was perfect! At other wood fired pizza places, the crust is often chewy or tough, but here it’s soft and perfect.

What puts this spot over the top is the personalized service. After we sat down, within a few exchanges, he made us feel like a regular customer and friend. We can’t wait to go back!

Definitely recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kylie Angus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWClrSkYQt065NtUm_8U3QkwYtiF9leVnxRJg-2b5r0kRYUufOu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved it here! Everyone can eat different foods at the market and wal along the place, play at the mini golf.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCj8DIGcTAfGWubrBpcaler\u0026fid=0x0:0x68c4e63f811f4fc7"],"When":"2026-1-4"},{"Name":"Katy Lamers","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyuEXo82MFxRGBgxeSI2o8o3pcCIrzustsLpd4zTSm103cylo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When I was planning our quick trip to San Diego I just knew we had to check out Liberty Public Market and I am so glad we did! It was really colorful, casual with tons of authentic and unique options for food and drinks. A must go spot in San Diego!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA_EpMRVi99e96M8fbq_PJ\u0026fid=0x0:0x68c4e63f811f4fc7"],"When":"2025-6-24"},{"Name":"Ilona Kiss","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKrQRGt6nkAdWU1fCEURoFJUXBMbWO9rSVItJYcplho7d1E_g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Various food vendors, seating in main hall have a beer or cocktail. Got the reverse seared pacana sandwich and the skirt steak burrito. Burrito was mushy and feels kind of greasy, wasn't a big fan. But the meat was good as I'm a big fan of skirt steak, maybe next time order the meat platter instead? The sandwich was pretty good, taste fresh with the herbs and meat was tender.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASj5Aq-_asuJPqxB0TXtjZ\u0026fid=0x0:0x68c4e63f811f4fc7"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Justin Thornsberry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV5GS4r7GdTvYfKCUY-DvjGNrcga24AsWVMUblIZ45Vg5O2W795mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a great location to try a variety of different food options and drinks. We visited on a weekday around lunchtime and it wasn’t overly crowded.  There was plenty of parking available on the street and in surrounding parking lots.  Just be mindful of signage so you don’t end up parking somewhere you shouldn’t and be patient with the traffic flow in and out of the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3neOW92WmuBNdOkpQ_nGt\u0026fid=0x0:0x68c4e63f811f4fc7"],"When":"2025-6-15"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Cheryl Hollis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV0UoknEH-WV7CUzvri_c2pfL6l8vuSIURfjML-HL4PxBv_z3GS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was good and the portions were generous. There was a very entertaining live band, Full Strength Funk Band. They even had line dancing during the band's break. I genuinely enjoyed myself.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBG_Ebut1R7QJrCMOmb6XdN&fid=0x0:0xb1b272e62e9b5a5e"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Keith Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5or4qERi1wPzxSRNSrlv_TW0SUQ05GUX7e3TRo5VD25uta9twWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Chips and salsa are excellent as always.  Food was generally good. Not happy we paid $30 for two crab enchiladas that had overcooked canned crab inside. They used to be better.  Waitress was helpful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAi0DhA-ofk433wpyQ3cKgT&fid=0x0:0xb1b272e62e9b5a5e"],"When":"2025-8-15"},{"Name":"Sarah D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-yyVGEuMfpHedwuAyRDccsWSbzYaTzLXehdMH2pjEXB262jjQKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We happened to be in the neighborhood looking for a spot to grab dinner, and Tío Leo’s was right there—so we decided to give it a try.

When you walk in, there’s a bar area to the left that had live jazz music playing, which looked like a fun time! We were there to eat, so we followed the hostess to the dining room on the right and were seated right away.

The staff was friendly, and our food came out quickly, which we appreciated. I ordered the #5 combo plate with a grilled fish taco (you can choose grilled or breaded) and a cheese enchilada. My husband had the chimichanga plate. Both were pretty average—nothing bad, but nothing memorable either.

The restaurant itself is spacious and seemed popular with locals and families—we saw a few birthday dinners happening around us. It seems like a good neighborhood spot, but we probably wouldn’t go out of our way to come back for the food.

That said, the live music side definitely caught our attention, and we’d love to stop back in for a drink and some live jazz if we’re ever in the area again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMuji87Gj5fndw&fid=0x0:0xb1b272e62e9b5a5e"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"England Boy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1Jsq6PI4ZR-YdqxIrwTjcgNVZQQy_dGAFZoZfrtd6DrbQFvBxOg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place to go for the older crowd. Live music from various musicians around the San Diego area in particular if you like live Jazz. Old school funk and R&B make for a great evening out. with friends and family. Food is good , but it is a tad pricey. Service is excellent and the bartenders make great drinks. If going to a concert get there early in order to get a seat with a view.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Craic Pirate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaLrAWSggkEK0kHNwsEy9l5_aswGWU2y-fM0owyUad32iIbuo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Surprisingly good Mexican food. Generous portions. Prepared fast. Variety on menu. Easy access from road, parking is limited. Very popular with locals. Dimly lit. Live band entertainment.
I ordered take out and they provided plenty of salsa cups.
I will definitely be returning with my whole crew 🦜🏴‍☠️ Yarrr!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwgLa3ZA&fid=0x0:0xb1b272e62e9b5a5e"],"When":"2025-3-15"},{"Name":"Tamilisa Miner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-bMPwFQHzmthAFjPTsIukJO_0tW0lQ1XfzhITL1G--zZQHoVpUA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mmm!! I have eaten at a lot of Mexican restaurants. This one was so tasty. The beans were delicious. I got a combo plate with 2 enchiladas, one with cheese only and one with some chicken added. It had the red sauce on top. loved it! The salsa was very fresh tasting. It was a tad too spicy for me but for any one else it is probably perfect. Lol. Our kids all found something to eat... grilled cheese and chicken strips. The waitress threw in some ice cream them. We had just arrived in town after a 7- hour drive so that was helpful! We could hear and enjoy the live music coming from the bar/club area that was attached to the restaurant. I had the fried ice cream (I consider myself a connoisseur of this) with simply some chocolate syrup on top (they offer other toppings too). It had a yummy, lightly fried texture. So yummy!! The atmosphere was nice with the dimmed lighting and the layout, etc. Plenty of room for large parties. Prices seemed normal for the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1_6vqCw&fid=0x0:0xb1b272e62e9b5a5e"],"When":"2024-1-4"},{"Name":"D. Shannon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXH6EhFRpMSZGBI_2sEI_ZsNZeivHmFE9gdehDP-7wWVqUPE3j1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good food and a live band in the bar made for a fun New Years Eve dinner.  Stay away from the Santa Claus bouncer.  He yelled at us while we were in the lobby cuz we had a teenager with us.  We were just waiting for a hostess to show up and seat us.  We didn't let him ruin our dinner, though.  The waitress rocked.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amaranth R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvIf-SUN9gY1lpk1AmRPHrfdjAPWOcJi9Ne0XMqrRWpzfxwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great live music venue. Staff was friendly. Tacos were large, tex mex style. They have a large dance floor and had great local jazz band playing with a variety of seating options; booth, stool or bar seats. Fun venue.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mrod SD","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCQx1rXycJ-9aqbSWIZoZn1xojj0hsOu-rRR05xGoCWi50DKx-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They remodeled and looking so much cleaner and better! The new seating with tables give it a more open feel with cleaner look. Services is good and haven’t had a bad server, very fast with making drinks (heavy poor btw and cheaper than most bars) the food is delicious with low prices compared to other restaurants. For entertainment we have two pool tables inside and the newly built pickle ball court outside with seating! They made a good call putting that addition and utilizing the empty parking lot in the back.

Also, it’s right next to Exposé gentlemen’s club which gives you some good people watching at night time! 🫣💃🏽

FYI kid friendly :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzR8XmdPGaKARjW7uZzeKT&fid=0x0:0x7f123bfb7930a999"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Sean Wuestenfeld","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIfvX-fwbcp6JmKYs7KKCzvwo4WWjzplKY6kbmQ6m00-6lkew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Atmosphere is great, awesome staff. Love finding gems like this as I travel alot for work and this is exactly the type of place I love to find when out in the road working. Met son many great people here from staff to patrons, Shannon, Brenda, Carly and Rich if ypur looking for a great hangout look no further, you won't be disappointed.
Back in town and they never disappoint, a must stop when I visit SD","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhByZLhpReJyP-S43i_ewtRl&fid=0x0:0x7f123bfb7930a999"],"When":"2025-8-14"},{"Name":"Aly Neely","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB-Ne5uNkBesZmaLEqZe0GXJPROeMD2Ofb9ixS01Wo5sYQsh8Y=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wow! Just walking in, there’s so many beautiful things to look at - the design of the restaurant, how it all flows beautifully together, the warm glow of the lighting, to the happy welcoming faces of the staff. Then when we were seated, we were greeted with careful attention to our requests, they gave my husband a handmade card for his birthday, and quickly brought us the most amazing cocktails. Which by the way, the cocktail menu is really cool, with one of a kind art. Our waitress Lindsey was a gem, and helped us sort out what items on the menu we could have - being gluten and diary intolerant. She made ordering with the exceptions easy, and made sure to take extra care to double check it all. When the food came out, we were blown away by the presentation, flavor profiles, and portion sizes. All exceeded our expectations!! I HIGHLY recommend you try this place. You’ll be glad you did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michiko Lindsey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU05wu9InvCUQoU1TFWxY05mYp0yRb9F_mj9eLHh2NwUxXGR6oS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I came in to try the $2.50 steak from a coupon I got in the mail. Love this place. Very nice bathroom for a dive bar. The bartender Shay is 24, gorgeous and friendly. I will be a regular. Kudos to the cook Tino. Food was fantastic and very inexpensive. The steak was good and usually sells for $14. Dailv specials. Come anytime and meet some new friends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKbz4LDCkrTWMQ&fid=0x0:0x7f123bfb7930a999"],"When":"2025-5-28"},{"Name":"Billy Salazar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7fM4r9zU1OO9OU0uGata7mlUen94_IcN8uoDPGHFVJmd8TOLw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered through delivery service, the food arrived was not as described. Overall a bad experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9QOrc5GtcgLM1WxIXp6DZ&fid=0x0:0x7f123bfb7930a999"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"James Parker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJRR99aZJaOJOlVh995TEAToS4jucQXyv_coKynXLZXPQLqwg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I visit this bar every time I'm in San Diego, it is a dive bar with great service and food. [{"Name":"J V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHZJKV_9M8S83ZjMFoLN-y6QHtuoK3ozrfgoBK4N10k9qpYpBooA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great location. Close to the airport, great bars and restaurants are a 2 block walk away. Accomodations are standard but Leanna at the front desk is incredible.

Part of the entrance to my room had fallen victim to the atmospheric river that pummeled San Diego that week. Leanna listened to my concerns and was able to help me relocate. She was sincere and genuine in her communication and made the experience much more pleasant than I expected.

I would give the hotel 5 stars if it was based just on her customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jo Wiedmer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYWB8T2-fHaOHbbIttG15wynXzHQA5kWI0Blvx8cu10BuJjWo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stayed at Courtyard by Marriott San Diego because it was close to the Marine Corp Recruit Depot. Our son was graduating from the MCRD San Diego. The room was perfect with a comfortable king size bed, a sofa with a pullout bed, very nice size bathroom, and a refrigerator. This was all we needed for our stay with the hotel. The room and bathroom were very clean. The location is perfect being close to Old Town and plenty of nice restaurants. I have only two  complaints. The first is the hotel charges $30 extra to park on the premises, but don't worry there's plenty of streets to park close. The other is the highways can be confusing when going beyond Old Town, so be sure to use Google Maps.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rose Cuellar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIriCHLbPJL_QjYFFe3Qt38j3jm-xBYE37Zry0eaXcjHbez5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Rooms were "ok". Beds doable- but not a comfy stay. Bathroom good size, but toilet needs a good scrubbing. Mini fridge didn't work that well. No microwave in room, but one available for use in lobby. Deadbolt to room and latch for Bathroom door didn't work as should. Sofa in lobby was dirty and ripped. I was embarrassed to have friends meet in lobby for a drink. Staff was very nice but would NEVER stay again, especially NOT for the money spent. Also $30 additional cost DAILY to park in the garage - no other parking provided besides a few in front of lobby.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"billverojam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL3HjbEXEVd-UxnRf23GXr5eO-J842qEJESb17TRpgEy6u_7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Awesome staff.  Brian at the front desk, made my 30th wedding anniversary celebration much more special and I truly appreciate him for that.  Their dining room is very nice. Will be back again.  The Courtyard, by Marriott is centrally located one block from Old Town San Diego.  We stayed for 5 days and enjoyed every minute of it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhASwT1c27wjSTCfVLmZTd7r&fid=0x0:0xf07643c9f4d9360e"],"When":"2025-12-5"},{"Name":"BarbaraT819","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfHhPp0vyvo1Wo3WY4NH1G5QOPAHGBMv_XiebXLZtHzVwVa3wkRhb3dykyKrUCZPlawDA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Exceptional staff, excellent customer service.  This is an older hotel, like many in the area, but management works to keep is well maintained.  It is conveniently located to the airport, Old Town (easy walking distance), Sea World, Barnes Tennis Center and lots of restaurants.  Unfortunately, it poured rain during our visit (who says it never rains in southern California) which made walking outside between buildings on the wet tile floors a bit dicey.  ||Enjoy being warmly greeted each morning by Mike at the front desk and great restaurant recommendations from Brianna at the front desk.  She always wanted input after we dined, which was really nice too.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabe A. C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUobVrbMrhz4bMP7n_3rWxE9YIc_jB6OHSi-3F1wVc4xVyvntCdgg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The rooms were nice overall, but there were definitely some inconveniences. I stayed in the building with the 100s rooms, which required going through an extra door—unlike the other rooms located in separate buildings. While I agreed to it, it became a hassle, especially when I had to walk to the main building at 1 a.m. just to get a bucket of ice.

The built-in lighting on the full-length mirror didn’t work. I had to get on my knees, move the rolling desk chair, and crawl under the desk just to figure out which plug powered the mini fridge—I initially thought it was broken, but it just wasn’t plugged in. The room had a mini fridge and microwave, but no safety deposit box, which was disappointing. The fridge also had some mold inside, so I had to wipe it down with disinfecting wipes.

When I tried to reheat some soup I’d ordered, I found that none of the cups provided in the room were microwave-safe—not even the paper ones meant for hot drinks. The bottom clearly said “not for microwave use.” I went to the front desk, and a middle-aged man told me the cups used for the complimentary morning coffee were microwave-safe and said I could take a few. I walked all the way back to my room, only to find those cups also had a glossy coating and the same “not microwave safe” warning. I was frustrated—not just because I couldn’t reheat my soup, but because I’d been misinformed by staff.

To make matters worse, I later found out the Bistro doesn’t offer any microwave-safe mugs either. So if you plan to reheat anything, ask specifically for the Starbucks-branded beverage cups.

Housekeeping was also quite noisy in the early morning, with doors to the detached building opening and slamming shut repeatedly. On the bright side, the staff was consistently polite and attentive. The food at the Bistro was decent—nothing fancy. Some menu items were overpriced, others reasonably priced. I had ordered a turkey sandwichwith fries.

One last heads-up: the hotel is tucked far from the main road, and one of the connecting cross streets is poorly lit. If you’re walking from the trolley stop, be prepared for a five-block trek—make sure your luggage wheels and straps are up for the challenge!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"18611956","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The rooms are a bit dated. They need to change out the carpets I felt they needed a good cleaning. It made the room smell musty.  The bed was comfortable. Now the TV was so large it took away the space on the counter area. The location is great for walking into Old Town. The food at the restaurant was good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy Nelson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIJgkiYUfbKqgBdZnnfRJvmICn7ojAzLiY-IbF2rJZviuH-zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I'm not sure I would classify this as a 3 star hotel.  It does have a nice location, convenient to Old Town and the airport. The room was fairly comfortable and quiet with the exception of the doors.  You could hear doors opening and shutting constantly.  They were quite heavy, and the handles/locking mechanism was really LOUD.  There was a living area with a tv that was fine.  You could not comfortably watch tv from bed,  (2nd tv) because it was on a wall running parallel to the bed, and as mentioned in a previous review, trying to get from the main screen to a channel was a bit of a challenge.  It did have a mini-fridge and a small microwave, which was nice.  We did not bring toiletries, as our experience has usually been that the nicer accommodations had decent supplies in the room.  There were containers for shampoo, conditioner and body wash in the tub area, but the conditioner was completely empty. Personnel seemed pleasant enough.  The parking is tight and it took a couple of manuevers to get a compact car into the covered space.  We had a bit of an adventure, as we were awakened at a little after 11 pm to a VERY effective fire alarm.  Lights were flashing everywhere, a very calm but very loud recording let us know that a fire alert had been triggered and we were to evacuate the building immediately.  That was accomplished efficiently, and luckily it wasn't raining.  We were outside for about half an hour & then were cleared to return to our rooms, for the most part.  There had been a water leak, I'm assuming a sprinkler system malfunction,  affecting several rooms on two floors, and the covered parking which resulted in a free "carwash".  The in-house food offerings were adequate for breakfast.  We were not there for other meals.  It was, all in all, clean, fairly comfortable, and in a good location. It just wasn't our favorite stop on our trip.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Pasole soup, shredded beef tacos, chile verde burrito & ranchero burrito for the fam. All tasty. Plus a margarita on the rocks. Drink seemed a little spendy but that’s vacation prices for ya.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhVXiQpm34VuZglh2akvq2&fid=0x0:0xb426ced7028c554b"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Ms Carey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLG-jVpPofQUXIfnLwag8u8bXBq8B_EMxtChXBTCjoCWguegZcdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is inside the hotel and if you stay at the Kings Inn you get a little discount.

Great little bar too, standard drinks and beer.

If you’re looking for a good Taco Tuesday bar or just need dinner on a stay in town definitely check it out.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"angie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEhUIPBVdFE6lvVVlN3UwRyQr5VNTF4B8rjWQTAClbaa2JFuo0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Never in my life have I ever had horchata this good, everything in this restaurant is amazing! The chicken was okay but it wasn’t that not bad to an extent it’d make my review go down. A place like this genuinely deserves 5 stars! The lobby smelled really good too haha 😆","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nicole Vilogi-DiPietro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAmEwgF1MNy3qsgSZX9ORspgpcnQqXd2TXYntf7TIYyar7_7tt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were exited to try this spot after seeing pictures and reviews. I ordered a margarita and it was the worst I’ve had in my lifetime. It didn’t taste like there was ANY alcohol and I think it’s an accurate assumption. If you’ve ever had a Skinny Girl Margarita you know they are gross and taste like limeaid. Ew.

Onto the dinners. One fish and steam vegetables the other chicken tacos. Steamed vegetables were undercooked, raw, and hard. My traveling companion left them on the side. Fish was good.

My chicken tacos were anticlimactic. Dark shredded chick with cheese only. No flavoring, seasoning, sauce, or limes. Just a flavorless dark chicken with a pile of cheese. I left my 2nd taco because it wasn’t worth the calories. My side of rice was good and edible.

Service was not good. We asked for a check and our waiter was chatting up another table, running plates before he came back and had forgotten we even asked for the check. We easily waited 15 minutes from the time we asked for the check to the 2nd time we asked for it. Also, when you have that much food left on your plates and a drink 3/4 full you should inquire about to because clearly something is off.

There are so many amazing Mexican restaurants in the area unfortunately this one isn’t one. All of the places we’ve eaten at while in San Diego were phenomenal except here. Best bet is just go to Old Town if you want Mexican food. This place is not worth the money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEOHQ36-1jfP49AE&fid=0x0:0xb426ced7028c554b"],"When":"2025-5-26"}]

The food is steaming hot and fresh and taste amazing and flavorful came with a nice big portion of pasta with bread and a salad. Would love to go sit down and experience this restaurant.10/10","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBxV6tLHQGyDbgsm6vn15ZO\u0026fid=0x0:0x134304b2e7cc7148"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Jamie Orr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJcLL6-F3h9UChi8Y01LG5cuC9k9hw8X4mNhvYZSCuP4gbBSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ordered delivery to the Holiday Inn after a long day of work and travel.  Right from the start this was a wonderful experience.   The gal that answered the phone was very polite,  and when I ordered the \"pizza Florence with added chicken\" she goes, ohhhh, that's my favorite, its so good.  Reassuring me of my choice in my sleep deprived indecisive state, LOL!  I also ordered a canoli for a sweet treat.  Delivery was quick and the delivery man was so polite and personable commenting that the \"pie\" looked great and that he likes the pizza Florence too and it was a good choice... amping up my excitement!  This pizza did not disappoint,  it is so blasting with flavor with fresh ingredients and the added chicken was a good call!  The canoli also was pretty great!  Will definitely grab pizza from here again next month when we visit our daughter that's stationed here in the Navy, and will be sure she knows about it to get a good pie!  Thank you to the gal that took my order, the master pizzaiolo, and the deliverer, y'all topped my evening off before my journey home tomorrow morning to the mitten state!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA7YauUMfxhJNlNMcnRpx0G\u0026fid=0x0:0x134304b2e7cc7148"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Sabrina Fischer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW06NyqGO01aQvgFmw2dVoIZPtMuNhWaHVmtHonQloEFN4gD-bR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We are staying at a local hotel and decided to get pizza delivered. I do think it’s the perfect kid pizza though. The breadsticks were good but overcooked. If they had been softer they would have been excellent. The sauce that comes with the breadsticks is more like a pasta sauce and is chunky. So if you want a smooth pizza sauce that’s not it. We requested ranch and didn’t get it so that was sad.
