user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Adriana Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6NZF3DCt836SobQhe3cJy4wC9r8TMlJJqzs7AGL-0CUcGyA_Daw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The moment I stepped inside, I was struck by the beautiful décor and the effortlessly good vibes. The space feels inviting, stylish, and full of life.

A huge shout-out to Susana, who warmly greeted me, sat me at my table, and helped me craft my own special meal. I ordered the chilaquiles and swapped out the beans and rice for the French toast banana split. Let me tell you… it was perfectly delicious. Truly the best of both worlds, savory and sweet done right. And the cafe de olla was nicely prepared.

Another special shout-out to the chefs and the bilingual staff. As someone who loves observing energy and dynamics, I couldn’t help but notice how well they all worked together. Their rapport is great and you can feel that positive team energy throughout the restaurant. It made the entire dining experience even better.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 5/5 – A Golden Experience at Breakfast Republic in San Diego
Once you find a parking spot, which is the hardest part, everything else at is pure gold. It’s all comfort, flavor, and fantastic service. Highly recommend! 🌟and there are many other stores and restaurants near by so a great place to enjoy the day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBfUfE7nXMejsNIh7Bz5PW2&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Melia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXja4ydA2CmRwCvm4rrxH1gbtk9NWpC1qYcsV-ZaeSjfUt1SSN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food! The decor! The service! Really loved our experience at Breakfast Republic and left with happy bellies. Our group ordered the chilaquiles, protein lover scramble, the Mr. Presley French toast, and the gluten free cinnamon raisin French toast. There’s a reason the menu says the chilaquiles are “locals favorite” because they are really good. The protein scramble is definitely indulgent with all the meats and cheese, but the flavors are delicious. You can tell the servers and employees have a good time working here even though it is a busy place. We had to wait about 20 minutes for a table but the walk around Liberty Station is awesome! Loved all of the chicken-themed merchandise for sale. Very fun, hip brunch spot with reasonable prices for San Diego! Come prepared to wait a little, but it’s worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB_37Cwf76E6ldRHbSU2OSN&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Holly Landis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK6-GlkyD0QY9TeyBYOrT0YcyWdTmua0VaajAmHNIlK5K4Y-Vx8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Breakfast Republic – Liberty Station
📍 2865 Sims Rd, Suite 106, San Diego, CA 92106

We visited after attending the 10 a.m. service at The Rock Church and decided to stop by for brunch. There was about a 45-minute to one-hour wait, so we headed back to our hotel, changed out of our church clothes into beachwear, and returned just in time for our table.

When we arrived, the hostess, Bella, didn’t realize we had our puppy, Kairo, with us and initially seated us inside. Once I mentioned it, she was so kind and apologetic, explaining that patio seating was required for pets. I asked to speak with the manager, Enid, who was absolutely wonderful. She went above and beyond—seated us almost immediately, made sure we were comfortable on the patio, and even brought Kairo treats to help calm him since he’s still getting used to being around people and the busy Liberty Station atmosphere.

Our server, Susanna, was equally fantastic. She was attentive, friendly, and had our food and drinks out quickly. I’m a bit of a brunch enthusiast and a longtime fan of Breakfast Republic, and they never disappoint! My shrimp & grits were delicious, the pancake was fluffy and golden, and my mango mimosa with a Tajín rim was the perfect brunch cocktail. My son enjoyed the Breakfast on a Bun, and everything came out fresh and flavorful.

The vibe here is that trendy industrial-style space with a lively patio, and the weather couldn’t have been more perfect. What really made this visit stand out, though, was the people—Bella’s sweet demeanor, Susanna’s great service, and especially Enid’s genuine care for both us and our pup. She even checked back later to ensure Kairo was calm when other dogs arrived.

All around, it was a five-star experience. Delicious food, great service, and heartfelt hospitality that made us feel truly welcomed. Thank you, Enid, Bella, and Susanna—you’re the reason we’ll keep coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtLx8M617KQVt2Jq53AcQY&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Alicia wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe2fiUwruOuv33dtlqt-5vieXa4nf9loWZ0nH43RuXBShFKqhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I give 5 stars to all restaurants making me feel comfortable paying what I got. And, this is a brunch that I’d like to come back again. Their Oreo pancake is way beyond expectations, and kids love their shrimp omelete. Jambalaya was flavorful too. The only meals that I was not happy about was their coffee and avocado toast. The toast was good, but the portion was not the same as other dishes. It does not feed empty stomach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtMdekj_EQlSJWKfj0j6TD&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"drawonnoodles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIf11UYkDy4s7H23IC7lrH2Hpy31x0wm8c7I3GeDEUmwB7PJg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When we arrived at 9am Saturday there was already a long line out the door so we ordered takeout. The employees were all smiles and very friendly. I was so hungry I forgot to take a pic of the Breakfast Burrito. It came with a side of rice and beans. They were not shy on using the salt on the beans which was why it was so tasty. The burrito was also very delicious. The meat was tender and the fillings were warm and cooked perfectly. It was pretty decent portion for the price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlw-kSvaSOnasZA7vxnlkU&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Blast Blast","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIv9lPatnQbldJvoxedCCe_VeDol54X3wiwxjl8rH-yLfWpeoi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Flew into town to see family and they brought me here. Sean was an awesome server despite being absolutely slammed in the building today.

Our food was delicious, inventive, and the portions sizes were large, especially in a world where the pricing has made a lot of places no longer worth the funds.

Loved my bottomless strawberry lemonade and pancakes. The Brussels breakfast potatoes were delicious and unique but I felt that my potatoes and Brussels could have used a few more minutes crisping.

My dining partner had the Bloody Maria and one of the Benedicts. Some of the best hollandaise I've ever tasted.

PS - order an extra side of bacon. Whatever they do to it here, chef's 💋!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA9jJgYC8Ee3iqKVXB1oex3&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Brandi Sealy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZElAsJuzVEi1ml1yBAYo6vR_y5fDf-SopuV4PUgukxO9kCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved this place. Gets crowded but worth the wait. Large plate portions, if you have small kids or light eaters a plate can definitely be shared. Go for the bloody mary has so many goodies. Coffee is amazing. Cute decor. Great menu prices.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtY2G4KOQjS7-uu9E5nUog&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"W Lewis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVorRNnKiiaCGFQ271HdXbCwRpeGAtqrLkZWxLlhsgge_3fqI8iLg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our waiter was fantastic. Sad I can’t remember his name but he was welcoming and knowledgeable about the food being that we were first time visitors. The aesthetics. Did not lie it was so beautiful in the inside. We did dine in, they do offer outside seating. Our cocktails were very pleasing we will be sure to come here for breakfast anytime we’re in the San Diego area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAC-opSCvshnLh2U1Qyr4Gu&fid=0x0:0x5241fb98eec95bd3"],"When":"2025-7-20"}]
